Convicted felon Donald Trump is shaking down countries in exchange for tariff relief. He’s pressuring them to sign contracts with his sugar daddy Elon Musk’s Starlink to spare them from costly trade deals.
An internal State Department memo stated, “As the government of Lesotho negotiates a trade deal with the United States, it hopes that licensing Starlink demonstrates goodwill and intent to welcome U.S. businesses.”
India, Vietnam, Somalia, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Bangladesh, and Pakistan have also signed deals with Starlink as Secretary of State Marco Rubio has ordered officials to get regulatory approval for Starlink.
And... they get a twofer from Vietnam- Starlink contract for Elon and a Trump resort for Donald!

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 6/1/2025
body:
Boulder attack. Rising crime. Wolves. Lies. Truth still matters.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**June 1, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
We begin this week’s digest on a somber note.
Today in Boulder, a peaceful [pro-Israel demonstration turned violent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) when attendees were intentionally firebombed. Several people suffered serious injuries in what the FBI is now investigating as an act of terror. This horrifying attack, on American soil and _in our own backyard_ , targeted innocent people simply raising awareness for hostages held in Gaza. We pray for the victims and vow to continue covering this story until justice is served.
The timing is striking, given Colorado was just named the [second most dangerous state in the nation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a new report that ranks violent crime, property crime, and overall safety. While cities like Aurora are showing promising signs of recovery under strong local leadership—like [Police Chief Todd Chamberlain’s crime-reduction efforts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—Colorado’s broader trajectory remains deeply troubling.
So how do we turn the tide?
**We believe messaging matters—and so does truth.** One of this week’s featured stories highlights how a grassroots, value-driven campaign by Caliber Contact helped voters [defeat Colorado’s Prop 127](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). It’s proof that even in a tough climate, the right message can still win.
That’s why we continue to revisit [The Covid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—a time when messaging was weaponized and truth was twisted. This week’s edition explores how the definition of “Covid death” became increasingly slippery in May 2020—fueling fear, not facts.
And finally, if you’ve spent any time on our social media channels this week, you probably saw the viral uproar over [Colorado’s expanding wolf problem](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Between rural safety concerns and ecological imbalances, it’s become another flashpoint in the urban–rural divide that defines so much of our state’s tension.
Each of these stories—whether it’s firebombings in Boulder, false narratives from 2020, or wolves threatening ranchers—reminds us why truth matters. And why Colorado needs _more than soundbites_. It needs a movement grounded in courage, clarity, and community.
Thank you for being part of that with us. Join us IN-PERSON for our huge **[Mountain Majesty Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** on June 21st to celebrate this movement together, with our special guest Eric Trump. Tickets are running low so [get yours](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before it's too late!
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Two CVRs, one pattern: Arapahoe County rewrote its election record, critics say–and no one’s accountable](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Arapahoe County quietly replaced its 2020 general election cast vote record (CVR) in early 2025 – years after the election was certified. The change came without public notice, audit, or oversight. The reason? A Yale professor raised concerns about a strange pattern in the data.

**[Activism over science? Ballot measure #82 would gut CPW authority, opponents say](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Critics across Colorado’s hunting, ranching, and wildlife management communities are sounding the alarm over a 2026 ballot measure they say could upend science-based conservation and rural land rights.

**[Police Chief Todd Chamberlain’s first 8 months bring sharp drop in Aurora crime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The City of Aurora is seeing a significant drop in crime in 2025, a shift that many attribute to the leadership of Police Chief Todd Chamberlain. Since his appointment on September 9, 2024, Chamberlain has implemented a series of reforms aimed at targeting violent crime and increasing public trust.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Multiple wolf attacks hit Western Slope ranchers—CPW accused of broken promises](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Ranchers are calling multiple wolf attacks on cattle over Memorial Day weekend in Pitkin County “devastating” and evidence Colorado Parks and Wildlife is failing to keep its promise to alert ranchers when wolves are in range of their livestock.

**[SB276 would fine deputies $50K for helping ICE—Sheriff Mikesell says enough is enough](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [PIKES PEAK COURIER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Teller County Sheriff Jason Mikesell is so concerned about the effects of Colorado Senate Bill #276 he appealed in a letter to Immigration and Customs Enforcement last week.
**[Polis’ $10M ‘bridge to nowhere’ sparks public backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[AXIOS DENVER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) To celebrate Colorado’s 150th birthday, Gov. Jared Polis wants to build a pedestrian bridge to nowhere. The project — financed with public and private dollars — is generating significant opposition from those who say it would serve little purpose and upset the aesthetics of downtown Denver.
**[Free speech fight hits Colorado: XX-XY Athletics sues over HB25-1312](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The women’s activist sportswear brand XX-XY Athletics is suing the state of Colorado over a recent state law that the company claims would interfere with its ability to market its message.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[“Thank you, President Trump”: Musk exits DOGE, $175B saved—says mission will endure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) On Wednesday night, Elon Musk made it clear that the reason he was leaving his role leading the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) project was due to a rule limiting special government employees to 130 days of service rather than any rumored feud with President Donald Trump.

**[Don Jr. helps launch American Rights Alliance to fight for Tina Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[GATEWAY PUNDIT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Few names evoke as much passion—and as much injustice—as Tina Peters. As the duly elected Clerk of Mesa County, Colorado, Tina uncovered what she believed were unlawful alterations and software deletions in her county’s election system.
**[$1B in home loans: Company markets mortgages to illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) After decades of mass illegal immigration into the United States, untold millions of illegal aliens have settled throughout the country, competing with Americans for government benefits, jobs, and now, for homes.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[DOJ declined to indict, but questions mount over Colorado Springs mayor’s role in hoax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A black media personality was convicted last week of faking a hate crime against Colorado Springs Mayor Yemi Mobolade to gin up votes for him, with the ringleader Derrick Bernard testifying that Mobolade was in on the hoax, and the FBI testifying that the mayor misled agents about his contact with Bernard.

**[Denver Schools say lease-financing is lawful, critics say it skirts voter oversight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a motion to dismiss filed Friday in response to a lawsuit, Denver Public Schools (DPS) defended its use of lease-purchase agreements — a financing method critics say sidesteps required voter approval for public debt that could leave students without access to their schools if the district defaults.

**[El Paso County defies state sanctuary push, gives deputies ICE powers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) On a day when the El Paso County Sheriff’s Office announced the transfer of 16 people to Immigration and Customs Enforcement, its sheriff, Joe Roybal, said Tuesday he intends to enter an agreement that will give his deputies specified powers of an ICE agent.

**[10 months after killing Kaitlyn Weaver, ICE arrests illegal teen prosecutors let walk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) An illegal immigrant teenager who was spared jail time after he was convicted of killing a Colorado woman in a high-speed crash has been arrested, along with his family, by immigration authorities.

**COMMENTARY**
**[Devotional: Why your heart needs the breastplate of righteousness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In a swirling sea of spiritual confusion—where feelings often masquerade as faith, manmade systems can overshadow true surrender, and emotional highs might be mistaken for holiness—it’s no wonder that many sincere believers feel exposed, exhausted, and uncertain._
__
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: The Constitution isn’t a suggestion—it’s a line in the sand](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Something is happening in Colorado. You can feel it. Not on the surface, but beneath it. Beneath the silence. Beneath the carefully packaged language of equity, sustainability, and progress. We are being conditioned. Slowly, quietly, and deliberately._ __
**[O’Donnell: Behind the headlines, Colorado’s job growth tells a different story](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Last week, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) released April 2025 job creation numbers by state. The national numbers were released earlier in the month and for the nation as a whole 177,000 new jobs were created in April, and this was considered a “solid” number by those who consider themselves experts._ __
**[Garbo: Fear Is Not a Strategy And It’s Killing the Republican Party](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There’s a growing tone in parts of the Republican Party – loud, bitter, and angry. It presents itself as strength, as boldness, as “fighting back.” But listen closely, and you’ll hear something else beneath it: fear._
__

Today in Boulder, a peaceful when attendees were intentionally firebombed. Several people suffered serious injuries in what the FBI is now investigating as an act of terror. This horrifying attack, on American soil and in our own backyard , targeted innocent people simply raising awareness for hostages held in Gaza. We pray for the victims and vow to continue covering this story until justice is served. The timing is striking, given Colorado was just named the in a new report that ranks violent crime, property crime, and overall safety. While cities like Aurora are showing promising signs of recovery under strong local leadership—like —Colorado’s broader trajectory remains deeply troubling. So how do we turn the tide? We believe messaging matters—and so does truth. One of this week’s featured stories highlights how a grassroots, value-driven campaign by Caliber Contact helped voters . It’s proof that even in a tough climate, the right message can still win. That’s why we continue to revisit —a time when messaging was weaponized and truth was twisted. This week’s edition explores how the definition of “Covid death” became increasingly slippery in May 2020—fueling fear, not facts. And finally, if you’ve spent any time on our social media channels this week, you probably saw the viral uproar over . Between rural safety concerns and ecological imbalances, it’s become another flashpoint in the urban–rural divide that defines so much of our state’s tension. Each of these stories—whether it’s firebombings in Boulder, false narratives from 2020, or wolves threatening ranchers—reminds us why truth matters. And why Colorado needs more than soundbites. It needs a movement grounded in courage, clarity, and community. Thank you for being part of that with us. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Our for-profit medical system is killing people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
People are demanding a system that puts people before profit. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW2mGf1i1AjOP-7GiOFyWV5DnQ_6J_oAFNV-07vZddxMUue7jTubf-e9yh4GPf02tCj2G6L5KRxJEWUVYdlHrNuUIwsIv9RhvYnaEakRFCUC0NAqnyqGDluT53e80vxwDWlFT3XYj3O8eLWHGdqRzSN6AMYJJb7-ADgbjRKTgDKnvAPwEuF1xZltvARUWhWj21d-UiPoJF5DnXAxETY1FvJQ/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h0/h001.OXrnRQdyJ2YKwv2lA3jJMAPQ_VqkebmIiTpOapp5cIU)
---
Friend, Everyone has a right to healthcare by virtue of being human, regardless of how much money they have in their pockets. But our for-profit healthcare system forces millions into crippling debt just to afford the care they need—if they can access care at all. Yesterday, grassroots groups and people around the country held actions demanding an end to our cruel for-profit healthcare system—advocating instead for single payer healthcare for all, including improved and expanded Medicare for All. [**Sign on today to join the demand to Congress: Block healthcare cuts and instead prioritize policies to guarantee universal access to healthcare as a human right.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2ng8tVbH3QD7WeSZjGrn7TDkBF2Yte2IMTMm-0Fevv_WRusi9pDhMRrOA3gVBjR-XCLX-MXZA6KyWoT4XkwgA8yO3y-P3V-Bz27wqRQzN29Upv8elwmfpPMZBpxAzA6DBqnmtyWCa--xnQy1ct_kzrbR8QxanWj2Wey3SHb1aQuxxqB_EiwlkK9gliTMXrXiQP40uOkvJMNbbSbGAzdFUXWwLmqKfypP6uh1_Cj8E8_WylaikICb9cEynPkaIQYHWEb_Kguh6bwtR0zDW8hXFINwnwO9OEL2PNee6rBwCz7Tw/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h1/h001.x7-EWgfsI-6pjY6BCdvgFPBY64Dl3FXA184o0MFoC7g) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2mnXY3P0kOcTCFrfgT7L8DAz2xNsaP5Rvr8MeABEbS-viYaKtcOrFDXOmVNdWLWGvcFAuxCm2fcbDkjyt6fQv20rKlIQ1tYI_fpmkhA_GYdL62vdlgLhvB9SgogQUmyrU0dxp2Lyd2COd_JRcAAGeXWdtvbuuyaNjE00j_K2um6YUrW8w4jEPeBW0r4J6uG15DZIqxsm61AaPr2PeVtr6k3XHzUl_2pZMtPDT1aX5Ombyq7RPwvV8VilkZkxwKDW_TLSWx8cMlS-YXIpUfflOf6Ah76bq3DAcUGUMY5LLP0BA/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h2/h001.be-pwMcC0wKCP1jR67itYMWRprpEX_75pD05FSzADX8)
---
While more families struggle to afford bills and access healthcare, pharmaceutical and insurance corporations’ profits have skyrocketed by billions of dollars.
**As we fight against healthcare cuts, we must do more than protect our current flawed healthcare system.** **We also have to think bigger, and** **strengthen our country’s health policies to treat healthcare as the human right that it is.**
Adopting improved Medicare for All—where the government would run non-profit healthcare not just for seniors, but for every U.S. resident—would not only guarantee healthcare access but also simplify our needlessly complex and expensive system, which currently costs more for much worse health outcomes than similar countries.
It’s time for government representatives to listen to their constituents: Poll numbers show that 70% of Americans support Medicare for All.**We need more Congressional champions prioritizing Medicare for All and committing to fighting for it.**
[**Will you join people around the country and sign on to demand Congress fix our broken healthcare system by passing improved Medicare for All?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2mORKCfZTrGLtxEeqishNFauZJyXhhbm-3d9ZoeMQobCtYr7TD-_StaSsKJNgLCTrGKZMVrXQjI_mk7SE9WocAsQhSpWzP4aawc0LNurA0_OC6F1jZ7_L3JKS7vsdNbXH7huR2gETk7FMz1QZJ4trmOCy6xw_UAT4qnpRhFYEM9g-NKLC-w1GExp-URcaGy2jVnp6eHkLVL_x6ozYUQqZsgXUhEpk-0MLK5uYXnuNRlifTYBCnGwT-yZEgKfE3VhBv18nOaHj5pngM5JxhJH6HSIYLA0JNHKt3xNUoBvTVMbA/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h3/h001.BGBaCn36xyAV2UATJuBE_i1M4Myh9o7WNay6jv6gy0I)
Thank you for taking action today. Together, we’ll continue demanding a government and economy that works for all people, not just the wealthy few.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, May 31, 2025
Subject: Our for-profit medical system is killing people
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Today is a National Day of Action for Single Payer Healthcare for All (also known as expanded Medicare for All). In my district, my team is supporting a prayer service and rally for people who’ve been killed and harmed by our for-profit medical system.
People are demanding a system that puts people before profit, where healthcare is treated as the human right that it is. They’re demanding**** a publicly financed, national single payer program that would provide comprehensive coverage to everyone—and an end to medical debt.
With increasing attacks on healthcare access, activists are raising the alarm to not only protect our current coverage, but radically transform and improve it. I’m supporting Medicare for All legislation in Congress, but we need to get more members of Congress on board and prioritize this urgent issue.
[**Will you add your name today to demand Congress support universal healthcare for all?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2l2R_1mmv1ePoj5h3jidHFoIil7YvbTUNiadiRZS5ECXMnmoBr_gGQeUohjDTehy_u796zVHZsmhNteZccVnst6g2B2HFXhZuK18BQDlDgeFUgouMs1agYKV-lRa6ESPK8OOhqJyzbClKgT3DPwwSx2IS2TwlLHJC6q2RzCvnTYZ772cVQhd_EkD-8emPClmaoqgvLBZl43whcupS9kBF6Dg1tsmAUYuZp_9blZ8-ayRwbYgNagtnOhfYayLDqA10M2X3oijQgQs_WmYOvOE_Qllfth3V8pGKs_OPD1wgvf2A/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h4/h001.FRharFWpwDxeJalmnGDygMJfHn86ax5fU5FPbz9DM5E)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2maCb6-6YtZVDTOuggaeE6yPZvefyIybBXaXhs9X1WuUxvtvnNjhmuguUPjv71vX1jmTEuYXPJDhXRpfb2Yv-90wou1xCIezaWWfcUtdBJAiHbVvlNcztcs_jf_sxxELLi6YsTA7YtNvaTONcY_cSOnwoA1qAhDPN6JFwL1wUC9E0c6ZrztH70bdYr8iSfqAFdPtSPFISWbaa6JsUF-S83WqxJaO72B5Y7Mf4BExhtJ8WsNZ9WLESsE_bXzoHLX2lklkv0BL-Vi2daf5ztQ8LtjXhnnYfRj4ZH2YZyb-swzhw/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h5/h001.iNIpYlUPtY4rjkP-NfYo7Au4CHxSRsVx0FuEqYxdwuc)
---
You can also check out below for how to find in-person actions happening near you today. We know the vast majority of Americans support Medicare for All—even a majority of Republicans.
Our profit-driven healthcare system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. As more and more families struggle to pay bills and meet their needs, these companies are profiting off our pain. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of healthcare by passing improved and expanded Medicare for All.
The grassroots group National Single Payer explains: _“A study published in 2021 in the Lancet found that a single payer financing system under Medicare for All would eliminate the high administrative costs of private insurance billing, marketing, and CEO salaries resulting in estimated administrative savings of $225 billion annually. The study also found that a single payer system would create efficiencies from negotiated drug prices and save over 68,000 lives every year.”_
The lack of health insurance leads to thousands of preventable deaths each year—just because people can’t afford the care they need to survive. If Republicans' budget bill passes, millions will be kicked off their health insurance and more people will die. **No one should have to die because they can’t afford care.**
**No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick.****** But 90% of bankruptcies are due to extreme medical debt, and**** nearly 1 in 5 U.S. adults have medical debt on their credit reports, which means they may be denied housing, employment, transportation, or other necessities because of a sudden health crisis or visit to the emergency room.
So I’ve passed policy and worked with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to take medical debt off people’s credit reports. Now I’m fighting to protect this progress from Trump’s attacks. And I’m continuing to fight for expanded Medicare for All, which would improve the successful and beloved government-run program for seniors to cover all U.S. residents and take care of people’s needs like dental and vision care and more.
**As Trump and Republicans in Congress try to kick millions of Americans off public health insurance, we need to not only defend our current system but also demand real change so that**** _everyone_****can access quality healthcare.**
[**We must urgently save lives: Please sign to demand Congress guarantee quality healthcare for all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9e9S3Cg5tSlRMNjY_vtcBXVBmBtzVWU-PB98CNXwVj2kuuiPzplyGMSpiiV4F-LQqrKBjDPTW2x-Hu5MK-_HUsNgat3ShmLI304PW84hRdJ7opV61y-0FWVFsaZTKlW5codxZ7vt_4PhHR0zIQK2FIx7AhaWcUrE5mBgXTRk-u-TcQe5DTTjeB4SA-e3j9MGXfGIDVSBPReYjhGLinsI5Z7B9guFD70WZgg40m2-LHFzyAhp0qHkzfpdt9HWmSkaHQW88RF5ufrGUBvdspxsxAayosYt3kGJS6m_3j0tFVdiskHmbKbIp20OqaPPRKDKNm6LJxuDrHQUfOGkHJvbGBw/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h6/h001.Dfv-ek-qV6NMNgVjYojiaDSkOlYnl7RenyfFW7p7bsc)
Thank you for taking action today! Here you can also find actions happening around the country today: [https://nationalsinglepayer.com/national-day-of-action](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.nTQp_FEIcSHl649vCJCiclHUblvvnNCgD4XJ7Ahy-Hqu0dRcApr91N7dzVV2EQ9bkd6Jk5Rgw96mXoNexy9SdBFF1IXnxN5wWGLbBgdaiBnSekoL7vJU4g2Yx73xUiPOUGtMm368wY6Jf8i_9lD-CRYMDZqNK5sobrE9LV_2G2mPB5OXgLevVlUq123qtJyrnh8Lhxyc7kxxqaOPttP7lnEB10R6-PTAfUPpWFDndqoD6r6tdNhVx_E9ZQJGViTQ4avheJJ5VtsIAhaSac2_Xgxiqxrj4SwW8ZPW8Jb-lnr_W1PgdWzWyvfzDqIq2CMlvYRsDjgdxRK9EOQnRODVara6cwmz3l23HnuGaIVWvss/4h0/aEDb_3IYSWaa_scXfE4Arw/h7/h001.rGkLPzjPSF9sVOw5IsEAgCOlhLhqHozqx6LZNj9mvZ4).

clean_body: People are demanding a system that puts people before profit. | | | Friend, Everyone has a right to healthcare by virtue of being human, regardless of how much money they have in their pockets. But our for-profit healthcare system forces millions into crippling debt just to afford the care they need—if they can access care at all. Yesterday, grassroots groups and people around the country held actions demanding an end to our cruel for-profit healthcare system—advocating instead for single payer healthcare for all, including improved and expanded Medicare for All. | While more families struggle to afford bills and access healthcare, pharmaceutical and insurance corporations’ profits have skyrocketed by billions of dollars. As we fight against healthcare cuts, we must do more than protect our current flawed healthcare system. We also have to think bigger, and strengthen our country’s health policies to treat healthcare as the human right that it is. Adopting improved Medicare for All—where the government would run non-profit healthcare not just for seniors, but for every U.S. resident—would not only guarantee healthcare access but also simplify our needlessly complex and expensive system, which currently costs more for much worse health outcomes than similar countries. It’s time for government representatives to listen to their constituents: Poll numbers show that 70% of Americans support Medicare for All.We need more Congressional champions prioritizing Medicare for All and committing to fighting for it. Thank you for taking action today. Together, we’ll continue demanding a government and economy that works for all people, not just the wealthy few. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, May 31, 2025 Subject: Our for-profit medical system is killing people To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Today is a National Day of Action for Single Payer Healthcare for All (also known as expanded Medicare for All). In my district, my team is supporting a prayer service and rally for people who’ve been killed and harmed by our for-profit medical system. People are demanding a system that puts people before profit, where healthcare is treated as the human right that it is. They’re demanding a publicly financed, national single payer program that would provide comprehensive coverage to everyone—and an end to medical debt. With increasing attacks on healthcare access, activists are raising the alarm to not only protect our current coverage, but radically transform and improve it. I’m supporting Medicare for All legislation in Congress, but we need to get more members of Congress on board and prioritize this urgent issue. You can also check out below for how to find in-person actions happening near you today. We know the vast majority of Americans support Medicare for All—even a majority of Republicans. Our profit-driven healthcare system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. As more and more families struggle to pay bills and meet their needs, these companies are profiting off our pain. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of healthcare by passing improved and expanded Medicare for All. The grassroots group National Single Payer explains: “A study published in 2021 in the Lancet found that a single payer financing system under Medicare for All would eliminate the high administrative costs of private insurance billing, marketing, and CEO salaries resulting in estimated administrative savings of $225 billion annually. The study also found that a single payer system would create efficiencies from negotiated drug prices and save over 68,000 lives every year.” The lack of health insurance leads to thousands of preventable deaths each year—just because people can’t afford the care they need to survive. And I’m continuing to fight for expanded Medicare for All, which would improve the successful and beloved government-run program for seniors to cover all U.S. residents and take care of people’s needs like dental and vision care and more. **[Published on THE HILL at 4:00pm, June 1, 2025]**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cb4ce784-49cb-46af-bd67-58ee309f0c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

On the campaign trail, President Trump [promised](https://substack.com/redirect/d6c50a9d-845f-4033-9ba2-7e265d9eea3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to revive the American economy and deliver greater opportunity for working families: to create "a middle class that is once again the envy of the entire world." Making that pledge a reality starts with tax cuts and deregulation but doesn't end there. It will require policymakers to reconsider who has access to wealth-building opportunities.
Unfortunately, far too many Americans lack the tools available to the wealthy. More Americans deserve the opportunity to invest in private markets, and that's something Trump's administration can provide.
The Securities and Exchange Commission has a unique opportunity to...

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/06cc041b-0e71-43f1-b152-3085d54fa140?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/eaa0e864-84db-4a41-8fb4-6b080b78e71e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/86321955-4826-48e3-a6ed-7533aa1dd8b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

Let's open up a wealth building strategy to more Americans | | | Jun 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | [Published on THE HILL at 4:00pm, June 1, 2025] | | ---|---|--- On the campaign trail, President Trump to revive the American economy and deliver greater opportunity for working families: to create "a middle class that is once again the envy of the entire world." Making that pledge a reality starts with tax cuts and deregulation but doesn't end there. It will require policymakers to reconsider who has access to wealth-building opportunities. Unfortunately, far too many Americans lack the tools available to the wealthy. More Americans deserve the opportunity to invest in private markets, and that's something Trump's administration can provide. The Securities and Exchange Commission has a unique opportunity to... () | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. Navigating Uncertainty is a reader-supported publication. ## Ukraine Hits Russian Airfields in Drone Attack
Ukraine launched a major [drone attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO2zAQBNCvoToK1IqiqIJFgEBACqdNKazElbwJTRokbUP5-oMP9wdXDzCYeX8uywU5cDx-441c3dMS6VUC1Up5efzLyJGKzynSGrj-PwJuTHkBBYNURipYPHI4F914txMB9Q25btTWDtYOY3N1ZsWJSG_awDQZbcns1oI1etg36Aw17N5tyijolBr7odUjQmeVAjUi6QmFVuS5ptz-TRzrlfZwpifldku3Jrhrrfci-h8CZgEzrtv7QXukdyxg_hUr5YiVU8QgYM6PUhijzMjhhadcM_uDitxSCHgvJEFmOjjFIteUPWWOh_ySEDCXmvIp-pm96H92AP3UdUo12fn7i0PgYkah1XFDDp_76rdQnw4-AgAA__9GyIwr) on four Russian airfields Sunday, claiming to have left more than 40 bomber planes burning and destroying $7 billion worth of military assets, including nuclear bombers. In a surprise attack some have labeled “[Russia’s Pearl Harbor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ9G3hjQ9G8GD1283a4dDcZmEjayZIhyAt-nL1z0DbpwIfCd851fX9MXq9fw-MmrDPkepyAf85KzpGl_JdYgtqQY5OY1fz88zyppIqQGsAWkaWH1x1QXy3AXIakKGcqu7vum75uueA5t2UpVVg0jIV77XqitiJmarrvKfO0LHU4atkglYlc1l7pjKntEwo6lvrKrURbNMV1-Rw35KXd_xLekyxzXwg_PnDdz1Q9Ho6MxHFu0fL4cjSfY0YjteUpH4ycmv8Cp6Gj8pwcf3cQg7hmW-C3BIN4h7WbKAcI-e-EEt7jeJBlogJXN9C1ge9qSmgDnzPMLYgDWBDc2MXgd-gbj48wp0rBsH_Vere1cjY-V1f8tn_9r8fdAfwIAAP__8m2WBg),” the Ukrainian military launched drones from the back of trucks concealed in makeshift “mobile houses” with remotely operated roofs that released the drones. In a statement, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said the operation had been in the works for a year and a half and was carried out “solely by Ukraine.” [See a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdKDx-JfCxZUiuk2bEg1mYJ31wso4izZPH5FXuPXROTrf9-s23ijltK0_6cmhLvu48XlkrpXL-OdRKG18zGXfeMqp_l0zxcRlREDTgm0Bx5lS_oy6mcPCjKwaDtJp7433xjX3QAB9j46tsnaKMjoHZBfspYwA0bgmhWsNLKAEcMp02hFKD4DgiHVPQgPPqe6l-72nrd55yZ_9zaWL-7PJ4V7r6xDqS-AgcDjPs5umeGUChwtG4JDTmwUOcS2re3B-aFOFGl77UYX6QcfBVaBRX2jnpdegW61l32oyvvXG9-0SWU9IXkmSAtXVa0qYX2fKOR3WCQ3rk1L-f6h-y-I74L8AAAD__7sGgSk). Moscow called the attack an act of terror and claimed to have apprehended Ukrainian operatives involved, while Ukraine said all their personnel escaped Russian territory.
## White House Pulls Isaacman's NASA Nomination
President Trump has [withdrawn](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNiP7BbAZPHRhS9eO6IEf4aXGjmwnKP36iv5Ctysd6V7d83Wdrsiew-0Td7JljVOgI3sqhdL0_E7IgbJLMdDsufzcPC5MaQIJnZC9kDA5ZP-e2trZlQjoUpNVujWmM6bT9WaHVjmtO9U5JY0CNcxDL9WyzgOYoZ_Xmu3ZJnsJSkp96ZpWIygjJUiN1A5YtZIcl5iae-RQNlr9O74oNUvca2-3Uh65unxUMFYwHsfRLHM-X5y8gvGMJ9i4kNjiM5N4PL0XIe4csHAM4o6JnOCMuOwYRMCMFYx1su5xsPece1218rYj-7_R8i9TLwu_AQAA__-xa32g) his nomination of billionaire Jared Isaacman to lead NASA, just days before a planned Senate vote, according to his post on Truth Social Saturday night, citing a review of Isaacman’s "prior associations" without further detail. Conservative commentator [Laura Loomer suggested](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ-G6misVj-UCxZp1F3alMKeuDQ3R5ECSdtwnj5w8ghXD2YG3_frY_sgiZJuP-lg23zeEj9r5Na4bPevQpK4upITf0Zpf26RduGyIeCkYdaAmyOJr23snPXMyEPHtjfjskzLMpkuWKbeDz1M89x75oHxioDGe4f94vcrdGLfazAD9gBmmC6jIewXAARDPF5JjcBOWi6X31lSC-zjKz-4XPZ8dNGG1s6qhh8KV4VrCxwkxnemcA354DeQwpXcIUlqK9QkJ4XrNKAxy6RjzgcXXQNzeOnzXoP-pP1Lt3I_Tp2okna8S_3f6op151NilDobNcLtIPn31rVv6XtY_BsAAP__jgaE7A) that Isaacman’s close relationship with Elon Musk played a key role in the White House’s decision to withdraw his NASA nomination, citing sources familiar with the matter. Additionally, research group OpenSecrets reports that Isaacman has made donations to the Democratic Party throughout his career, including during the 2024 election. Trump says a new nominee will more closely align with his "America First in Space" agenda.
## Affordable Housing Shrinks to 11 U.S. Metros
Only [11 U.S. metro areas are considered affordable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF6ZwWBSUKShe2lTolk8LJMM9sqet2Tz9RH5hVfd4kpH956fH8sHsnB6_MCDJt3ykuisQqpUls_fBTlRjSUnugvr34fgylQWcNBbN1gHS0SW9-KbOG1EQF1DUxv8OPbj2Idmn7YtbNG3ATZwnu40UOuCB-yG6HCLvuHpornBQetc6PqbDwjt6By4gOS_ofGOImsut1-Zk-60yTu_qNzWfDQy7arParrvBmYDs-60s8jVGZj3fNB1yMCc6E9VLMtBkXE5uZCBue8ghG60OxWq9rzCplwOFPuk_BSyKyZblUXs_fNtL161uK65RE4Pq9kWQrFUFZVsREUDc1Om-DxZhOsQjHePA_n_oka_pPg1wb8AAAD__--QkrA) for median-income families putting 10% down on a home, according to new Zillow data. Affordable areas are primarily in the Midwest and South, where lenient zoning and responsive building have kept costs lower, though even these regions have seen sharp price increases since the pandemic. Cities like Detroit offer median home prices as low as $180,000, while a 20% down payment expands affordable options to include Cincinnati, Indianapolis, and Oklahoma City. However, in places like Buffalo, strong job growth and limited housing supply are pushing prices to unaffordable levels for median-income families, even with a 20% down payment. Zillow’s Market Heat Index can help you see [if your area leans buyer or seller](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6jAQheGncbpE48HBpnBxm3TcdsvIiScwyyRGjsGCp1-xr7DdkY70Ff_XeTwHFt4u_8NKvixp3KjuQqVQHh-3HHijPea00SRc3hcJM1MeEbBv4dgCjjGwvEbTRL8QIR0a8toa53rnettcvdZgYMG4aD3NMGnERVt3iicNs3ETNuw_GhwBNYA99J2xAbUDQLCBzCkoAxS5pNx9J97KlRZ5pSflbk5rI_5ayn1Xh38KB4VDrbV7s0iqn1vhIBTypnCYHi_Ke5tyu5PIZ64h36goHJrs472yCO9Hqwxc1sDyq5c_JXl6_AkAAP__0C91KQ).

clean_body: Ukraine launched a major on four Russian airfields Sunday, claiming to have left more than 40 bomber planes burning and destroying $7 billion worth of military assets, including nuclear bombers. | | | | | | Monday, June 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1953, 27-year-old Queen Elizabeth II was crowned in Westminster Abbey. It was the first British coronation ever broadcast on television. Watch . Today at The Flyover , we're digging into from across the U.S.--from deep-fried butter to ghost pepper wings, and even scorpion lollipops. Ever dared to try one of these? Hit reply and tell us your story! Protect your identity and data while on the internet with today's sponsor, . | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Ukraine Hits Russian Airfields in Drone Attack Ukraine launched a major on four Russian airfields Sunday, claiming to have left more than 40 bomber planes burning and destroying $7 billion worth of military assets, including nuclear bombers. In a surprise attack some have labeled “,” the Ukrainian military launched drones from the back of trucks concealed in makeshift “mobile houses” with remotely operated roofs that released the drones. In a statement, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said the operation had been in the works for a year and a half and was carried out “solely by Ukraine.” . Moscow called the attack an act of terror and claimed to have apprehended Ukrainian operatives involved, while Ukraine said all their personnel escaped Russian territory. White House Pulls Isaacman's NASA Nomination President Trump has his nomination of billionaire Jared Isaacman to lead NASA, just days before a planned Senate vote, according to his post on Truth Social Saturday night, citing a review of Isaacman’s "prior associations" without further detail. Conservative commentator that Isaacman’s close relationship with Elon Musk played a key role in the White House’s decision to withdraw his NASA nomination, citing sources familiar with the matter. Additionally, research group OpenSecrets reports that Isaacman has made donations to the Democratic Party throughout his career, including during the 2024 election. Trump says a new nominee will more closely align with his "America First in Space" agenda. Affordable Housing Shrinks to 11 U.S. Metros Only for median-income families putting 10% down on a home, according to new Zillow data. Affordable areas are primarily in the Midwest and South, where lenient zoning and responsive building have kept costs lower, though even these regions have seen sharp price increases since the pandemic. Cities like Detroit offer median home prices as low as $180,000, while a 20% down payment expands affordable options to include Cincinnati, Indianapolis, and Oklahoma City. However, in places like Buffalo, strong job growth and limited housing supply are pushing prices to unaffordable levels for median-income families, even with a 20% down payment. Zillow’s Market Heat Index can help you see . We have big plans for this summer, as we continue our work to _advance the Trump-Republican agenda to save our great nation and lay the groundwork to protect our hard-won majorities_ in Congress next fall. We can't afford to be forced to scale them back.

subject: Michigan Republicans voted to hold me in contempt

body:
We need to put people over politics. Progress over partisanship.

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tead52d41-8d4c-4d1c-bcec-70cf60d74905/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06dbfceb-1739-48e7-9884-c21b0c525338/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, this is Jocelyn Benson. Michigan House Republicans voted to hold me in contempt for refusing to give them access to sensitive information that could undermine the security of our elections. The truth is that we’ve already given them thousands of documents. They want documents with details that could allow bad actors to tamper with voting machines or impersonate clerks. Let me be clear: This is no way to govern. Every day that House Republicans spend time playing political games like this — while the people of Michigan are struggling to pay for housing, child care, and basic needs — is an affront to the people they’re elected to serve. We need to put people over politics. Progress over partisanship. I’m tired of the cruelty and chaos in politics, and I’m running for governor to be a leader who rises above this. [Help me and Blue Amp Action fight back. Pitch in today to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to send a signal to these Michigan House Republicans that we won’t back down, and that you’re with us.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e06d953-77a8-4240-88a3-eda38295836e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T533df344-abce-4eda-9d06-6228164a5300/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

# The Fed’s Plan to Control Your Money Is Live!
While everyone is focused on tariffs and inflation, the Federal Reserve is quietly rolling out a new program that could give them unprecedented control over your bank account.
They’re already working with over 100 banks to:
* **Track every transaction** you make.
* **Freeze your account** at any time.

# Monday, June 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1849, [Maj. Robert S. Neighbors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0D-OqzAQgPHTmC7IHsy_wsVr6PLaLZHBExit8SB7FJLbr7JH2At8P-n7us93T5HS9t8f6OT14DnhVSKKYJ4jbsTpKCenwlmwSAczaGhvurtpmIOn-J5tFdyiw2gqdKa3w9CBAVvtLixmxGE07Wrt2o9tGILvbLO0TfNYe-Mrcp-Y7jQYo0FDbazXISxjOzZoDS7KagwknGvZUfDlyyO--Ym5XvmoottFzqKafwomBdN1XbWU3XOKlLDmvCmYdp_CwvytYMIkmbAomBLSti-cyw1f50cgTlV24bwoRipdr6zeDk_x15E_j3k6-AkAAP___Vt2yQ) arrived in San Antonio after leading an expedition to survey a northern route to El Paso. The state legislative session comes to an end today. Over the next few days, we'll highlight some of the most consequential bills that are slated to become law. ## Flurry of Bills Approved
Texas lawmakers approved bills addressing several contentious issues in the closing days of this year’s regular legislative session, which ends today. On Saturday, [protesters gathered](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckDGOgzAQRU8DndF4cCApXGxDl223RAYPYMkwyJ6F5PYrcoTtv57efz_P_ulCDNv87Vay8pq43-jMkUQo9ZHmwNuad94yJ6EsDfYIeFPQKMDeuxDfvSm9HcA_dElWt-Z-b1CjKRfrEDx4ANf4ljzpdqq9rgddN5Nx95spg71g0ABqDQhYaePA--Fxe9RkNA2FAfJBOFWykNDL5Sm--aBUjbyW0S4iey7qrwK7ArvzPKuJX637zRK2a1Jgd90psNsTX_6UslpdGhf1oanR7UE4qtHFq4I6SJiymhKvauZDuWFgkTJZv58hxpCbtjAwry7Ej4L8u9lh8S8AAP__cNCBNw) at the Capitol to call on Gov. Abbott to veto some of the proposals. House Bill 229, approved by the Senate on Wednesday, [limits sex designations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL_upCAQx58GOwyMqGtBcY3dXnulQRl1cggGJuvu21_ce4NfO5PP99-f5_R0FChuv92Blt9rmiJeJSAz5ingRike5UyxpMxYuIMJFLRSdVLB5B2Fz2Qqb2flB12h1b15PDrQYKrdtr0D8I--XXBpuqFvzdLg0szKDcqsja_I3mKqU6C1AgW1Nk55Pw_t0KDROAuj0BOnXPOOjG9X1vBJL8z1ko4q2J35LKL5JWAUMF7XVf99u3g_BYx3EQHjF5NnCsS03IcNo8csPa4UiSlFOVMI8nSlYJEU5X-iYHSMckfni-Qkt9s3pixgrLL150UhUOl6YdR2OArfSPzjDV8W_gUAAP__KKaGHA) on government documents to male or female as determined by a person’s reproductive organs. On Thursday and Friday, both chambers [passed Senate Bill 17](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckbGO6yAQRb_G7iaCCSahcPEad_vaV1qDGRy0BCKYTTZ__-T9hO2udKQjHd1_H-sHpZzK_pfuPMt3rGvhV88swm3NvKda7v1RS69NuIvFFRVOoCwoXAOl_F7NGGavgtMjz_pirleLGs14m8_OobJmCoTknI4xGhOu0fu4XX24XMY0HzJlFWqtUOFJG1IheDe5MxvNfjCKQ5LaTnJj4W_qMb_rk9tpq_cxzzeRRx_OfwZcBlxer9fpk0ufDjrgQk3SlnnA5WgacHnUnCRtx_yRQakCsTbolBl8yhk8Fdi4CaVyEE57ga1-FWmJO_ivdyo7ZCoBbkyBA-z1CeR9FYHA_XPABa2DSDi5GB1ERgdGUwS_OYbzpshoOymKdmxzeLxSzqnby2DUfqeUf8Lk1088Z_wfAAD__zDWm9w), which was revised to ban land or business ownership by citizens of China, Iran, Russia, and North Korea, regardless of visa status. On Saturday, the House and Senate [passed Senate Bill 12](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckDGO5CAQRU9jZ7SgTONxQLCJs9l0Q6uAoo222lhA2zO3X7mDPcBkpfr6T3r_z-fyiYnT9viNT7LtK-Zlo7MytUZlYXqkvD3rnreaS6PaDCwg4S6kERKWgIm_F90H62SYVE9Wjfrjw4AC3a82ROcdKKPGkQgVuLuUfkIgHHUY0PTJXjBpJCglQcJNaZQhuOk-DaQVuU5LCqnlcmsrNfrCGvk7H1RuPj97tmtre-2GXx3MHczned7-Hi-6wg5mLC15pg7mS6mDec-cWvLX-WaJy68ytleh_79ASTjcxP5ynLyofs2Zq4hpQxa47yUfyGLNr0qi0obtqoKZBCHpGGEQXkUS2pASjlCKcQgeQEZHCvpiw34m5lTN2Gn5eGLit0v78fiHhX8BAAD__5xFl7w), which prohibits schools from sponsoring LGBTQ clubs, enabling a student’s social transitioning through the use of preferred names or pronouns, and implementing DEI programs.
## Protests Target Avelo Airlines
Immigrant rights activists organized protests around the country this past weekend, targeting Houston-based Avelo Airlines, which has been [operating deportation flights](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL-OozAQh58GOiN7MIYULq6hy7VXIiceYCTDIHsuJG-_YrVPsP3vj77v3326B0q0L3_Dhl7eM087niWhCOYp4UK8b-XgvXAWLOJgAg2d0k5pmGKg9JlsHf1Dx5up0ZveDoMDA7ZefdeCdSYMaGLrnj3Opm-7bmg7i9AHGGry15h2GozRoKExNugYH7fu1qI1-KisxkjCuZEVBd-hzOnDL8zNk7c6-VXkKFX7p4KxgvE8z2bmN7iV_xfh_QpVMF5AFYz0RBXx4CxBiHc1J1pWUUfmC6yon5IKL0ysAuVEO5Y6-3iclBIV11dWL1ug9P0uv9b18vAVAAD__wmlfq0) for the Trump administration since the middle of last month. Protests were held in Houston and more than two dozen cities Avelo serves, including locations in Michigan, New York, Florida, and California. The [Coalition to Stop Avelo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJycz0GOrCAQgOHTwK5NUY2oCxZv467fdpYEpVQSFAMV7b79ZOYIc4D_T76vl3v5mOKx_vc7WX4v2R1010TMVFyiNeZjr2c-ai5MlQ06BGwfYB6ALviYPk7LYCcIg5JkVaf73qBCLTcbZlJLMIa6eZh8aDtQxs_9UyFBPyPIaH9mYACVAgRslPYQwjS0w5O0oklooBA5l4Y3Ynr7uqRPvqg0c95lshvzWcXzn8BR4Hjfd1M5n_6ilJtcVoGjLDacd0wpVtMJDevuY_qt-c_cy-J3AAAA__-2xGcd) organized the demonstrations to pressure the carrier to cancel its $150 million contract with ICE. A demonstrator at Avelo’s Houston headquarters said she thinks “people should be given due process in courts.” A [protester in Rochester](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2OqzAQhZ_GdI7swRhSuLgNXW67JRriIVgy2LJnk_D2K9Jsv_XR-fnO1226YYhhf_zHjRy_lzTt9KqRmKlMkR4h7VvNaa-pMFW2MIGCTiorFUweQzwm03g3K3_VDTndm2GwoME0qxtsC0bNC3pt_WJ117UL9rrvBgOdn-9NcGeYsgq0VqDgog0q7-drd23JaJqFUeQDp3LhlZjeWJd4pCeVyz1tTXQrc66i_SdgFDDq9rXidkoCxl8M-ZkpYMwlnQwyR9x38nJJRVbk7-LxkPMhS7qvVE8HhpJT4aY4n18hxlBtL4x6bBjip5r__NXTwU8AAAD__9p6fbY) said he was “concerned about the cruelty of snatching people off the streets and deporting them to countries they’re not even from.” In a statement, Avelo Airlines said that “we recognize the right of individuals to peacefully assemble,” insisting their “main priority will continue to be maintaining the safety and timeliness of our operation.”
## Falkenstein Castle for Sale
A castle described as “the crown jewel of the Texas Hill Country” has been [listed for sale for $15 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGO6yAURL8Gd7bgQuy4oHiNu7x2SwvDJUaLIQvXcfL3K-cTthxpNEdzvm7zzYQY0v2_2VDTy-c54VEjEmGZI95DTlt95FRzIazUwwwcLi3vWw6zMyG-Z9U4vXA3iga1GNT12oMA1azagbdOWulgsGqw3Evw3ID0yyjG4SqboM8x3nMQggOHTijDnVvGyyhRCVyY4ugC5dLRioQvU3185yeWzuatiXolelQm_zGYGEzHcXQFTTz7Nm8MpvMLg2lP4WfHds0bntGb-I2pEobUWlMpYrvsJSG1HwSDqSnaPY4QY6j9wBS_bybED5P-LOmp4TcAAP__pXF6xQ). Built in 1998, the 14,000-square-foot Falkenstein Castle in Burnet is modeled after plans designed by the 19th-century Bavarian King Ludwig II. The castle was built by architect Terry Young and his wife Kim, who [saw the plans on display](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DGOpDAQheHTmKxadkFDExBsQjabbLAhKnABpTV2y65phtuvpo8w-dOnp__vx_RBEiRuv-ngQb_WNEU-S2BVzlPgTVI8yjPFkrJy0RYntHgH24LFyZOEa2oqP8zW967iwXXN49Giw6bah2Vhx3XriR53t_g7u9n2a23ndnUP67pKhm_Mthads2jx5hqy3s_9va-5cTybxrIXTfmmOyt_UVnDlV6cb0s6qjDsqs9i6l8GR4PjeZ63Qstnzhz1e2FwLBQpaoqSDI4ECxUNDBJBd4a3CLuEAEv6jJovOJLnwB5oVc6QIoPnIltkD_MFM70oCxU4yMM_iRtIgTVlKBTY4PgniOeyp9PgWHetw67vqjz45ykhSGk709jtIAnv__rj4K8B_wcAAP__ghSVgQ) while visiting Germany’s Neuschwanstein Castle in 1995. The iconic castle inspired the creation of Disneyland’s Cinderella Castle. Boasting seven bedrooms, four full and four half bathrooms, and a game room, the castle is situated on a [110-acre estate with six tiny homes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LHOozAQBOCngQ5kL8bgwsU1dLn2SrTBS7BusRFeheTtfyWP8HdTjD6N5t9tvmHkmB5_cScvrzXPia7CJELnzPSIOe3lyKnkU6iIhRkU9I2yjYI5YOT3bOrg7yo4XZPXgxlHCxpMvflR94MOtPRu1Q5Ga9zSd86Ctf3QKefq6D-Ysgq0VqCg1QZVCHfXu46MpntlFIUo-WxlI6EXlpXf-Ulnu-S9Zr-JHKXq_lQwVTBd19Xu74IJk-QU86dUwXQSMhVBoQomPCUu_ElfrlmR_1MqQjE1CxZhagoyNaA6M7pxaI_tqE8fjisyx2KHyqjHjpG_C-TXlz09_AQAAP__86l9yQ) overlooking the Highland Lakes. After Terry Young’s death a few years ago, the property was converted into an Airbnb and wedding venue.

The castle was built by architect Terry Young and his wife Kim, who while visiting Germany’s Neuschwanstein Castle in 1995. The iconic castle inspired the creation of Disneyland’s Cinderella Castle. Boasting seven bedrooms, four full and four half bathrooms, and a game room, the castle is situated on a overlooking the Highland Lakes. JB Pritzker is a disgrace to his office, and to our country - and we will not stand idly by as he attempts to reignite the violence and terror inflicted on our people in 2020.
That’s why I’m asking you to join a powerful, bipartisan movement of true patriots who refuse to stand by as the unhinged rhetoric of Far Left Democrats like JB Pritzker desecrates our nation.
I’m calling on you to spread the word by getting as many people as you can to join us in this crucial fight.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Abundance Movement
body:
A couple months ago I interviewed Derek Thompson about his book with co-author Ezra Klein, Abundance. It was, in many ways, a positive, wonky book about reducing red tape and enabling 'a liberalism that builds,' literally and figuratively, to solve today's problems. I've been supportive of many of these ideas as I agree that making government work better is a laudable goal. And their argument has filled a need, as "Abundance" has been on the bestseller list now for 10 straight weeks.

# [The Abundance Movement](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=164822053&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0ODIyMDUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDg4NjU5NjQsImV4cCI6MTc1MTQ1Nzk2NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.9DLoLEELA3xPIcFIpX3RSQvhMqdzK4vZUAos71aK6Nw)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYW5kcmV3eWFuZy9wL3RoZS1hYnVuZGFuY2UtbW92ZW1lbnQ_.xEmliZE8ABJd4BhhyLAd989XxOze710iqKUy-UtQPFo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/the-abundance-movement?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

A couple months ago I [interviewed](https://substack.com/redirect/c246d27a-1b6e-4b35-96bc-75e69b2a62bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Derek Thompson about his book with co-author Ezra Klein, _[Abundance](https://substack.com/redirect/38390431-913c-4077-a932-d9cef40a3c68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. It was, in many ways, a positive, wonky book about reducing red tape and enabling 'a liberalism that builds,' literally and figuratively, to solve today's problems. I've been supportive of many of these ideas as I agree that making government work better is a laudable goal. And their argument has filled a need, as "Abundance" has been on the bestseller list now for 10 straight weeks.
In early May, more than a dozen members of Congress in both parties launched the Build America Caucus that was explicitly inspired by the 'abundance movement.' The new caucus is meant to focus on energy permitting and enabling housing and infrastructure to be built.
So, we're all good, right?
Of course not. We're talking about politics here.
Ezra and Derek have been attacked as anti-government, libertarians, tools of big corporations, and reheated neoliberals among other mean things, mostly from the left. Why? Because their critique is a different one than that brandished by most on the ideological left, which generally holds that big companies and the wealthy are the string-pullers keeping good things from happening, not government being bad at doing things. It is not lost on these critics that Ezra and Derek are straight white guys, albeit self-proclaimed liberals who write for the New York Times and the Atlantic.
Why are these attacks so animated? Jonathan Chait in the Atlantic [notes](https://substack.com/redirect/3fce5848-0773-42cd-ac3f-f32b7bde23b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "The abundance agenda is a collection of policy reforms designed to make it easier to build housing and infrastructure and for government bureaucracy to work . . . the abundance agenda contains a radical critique of the past half century of American government . . . it is a direct attack on the constellation of activist organizations, often called 'the groups,' that control progressive politics and have significant influence over the Democratic Party."
Jonathan goes on to pose a question regarding various failed policy launches: "Why was everything slower, more expensive, and more dysfunctional in states and cities controlled by Democrats?" And what happened to the government that built the Hoover Dam or the Golden Gate Bridge?
Chait asserts that limits on government remain a core part of the interest-group politics that have dominated the Democratic Party's progressive wing for decades now. This form of progressivism consists largely of citizens groups utilizing influence and lawsuits. These interest groups and lawyers have over time become pretty good at keeping government from doing things. But they may have become a little too adept. As Chait puts it, "[the groups] sought to prevent the government from doing harm, but in too many cases, they ended up preventing it from doing anything at all."
As an example, all of the environment regulations and associated lawsuits have made it nearly impossible to build new energy infrastructure that would help address climate change. Hence, Joe Biden's energy revolution, in its first several years, struggled to actually build charging stations or anything else. There are many similar examples in infrastructure going back at least to the Obama administration.
To Chait, the attack on the abundance agenda is not just tribalism as usual but "the logical outgrowth of a well-developed belief system." Progressive groups believe that citizen empowerment is the key. The government is assumed to be potentially malevolent and subject to corrupt influence. Empowering government is not exactly the goal.
Who should determine how and when to build, the government or the groups? If a lawsuit is brought that will gum up a housing development for years, what is the right recourse? Progressivism and abundance come up with very different answers.
Chait observes that the abundance agenda does have a few political upsides. It addresses the lack of faith in public services. It could bring down costs. It seeks to make the state better at things. And it actually could provide a positive vision of the future. He forecasts a civil war in the Democratic Party over the vision of the abundance movement versus that of traditional progressive groups, who see the abundance bros as either naive or corrupt or both. The abundance agenda could become the de facto policy platform of the moderates of the Democratic Party and is already being embraced by many figures who represent that wing.
I feel for Ezra and Derek, who I think are leveling a very sincere and well-founded critique that identifies the frustrations held by many Americans. I'm not sure they realized that they would be setting off an ideological civil war based on their wonky analysis of why government can't build anymore. What leftists don't seem to realize is that if government could actually do things, we could have a more honest conversation about who gets what instead of simply presiding over an inept government that can't deliver and is breeding further mistrust. I remember when I was running for President hearing from people, "I like the idea of healthcare for everyone, but I'm not sure I trust the government to make that happen without fouling it up." That's not a great environment for big solutions.
Versions of this critique arose before _[Abundance](https://substack.com/redirect/c246d27a-1b6e-4b35-96bc-75e69b2a62bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , including _[Recoding America](https://substack.com/redirect/88383c4e-5254-400e-b584-8cd88b4b7fd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by Jen Pahlka, _[Why Nothing Works](https://substack.com/redirect/aa0fb11b-5eb4-4990-82f8-ee20b154e8c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by Marc Dunkelman, and _[Stuck](https://substack.com/redirect/0cb5fcaa-1d5d-4d31-8339-7f15f2b8384c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by Yoni Appelbaum. I interviewed each of these authors, read their books, and recommend them all. But none of them was as big a deal as Ezra and Derek. Still, multiple people have come to the same conclusion, including Jen Pahlka who was the U.S. Deputy CTO and spent years in government trying to deliver better services. Red tape truly is holding us back.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/595449e1-5bd7-411a-97e1-a38deb613fe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Why is the abundance movement restricted to the Democratic Party? John Arnold, a philanthropist, noted "Every governor/mayor, regardless of party, faces challenges related to housing, energy and transportation. Abundance is being presented as the Democratic solution when it should be framed simply as the solution."
At least one commentator asked Ezra and Derek, "What do you think the odds are that the Democratic Party will actually make these changes? Wouldn't you be better off advocating for a third party?" One of the major weaknesses for Democrats right now is that they are unlikely to get a majority in the U.S. Senate for the foreseeable future, which makes any Dem-led legislation unlikely. Ezra has been saying in interviews that he thinks a third force in politics is a good idea, in part because he sees the need to compete in places that the Dems are uncompetitive, which right now is a pretty big chunk of the country.
I am pumped that Ezra and Derek made an explicitly political case and set off to meaningfully answer the question, "Why are Americans so fed up?" Including outcomes is an enormous development instead of trying to win the argument or morality play of the day. Outcomes in the United States have been getting worse in terms of the affordability of housing, healthcare, a college degree, childcare, and a lot of other staples of American life. Why are we saddled with such dysfunction? Unaccountable bureaucracy is one big barrier. Corporate interests are another. They're both valid.
But another one staring us in the face is a polarized two-party system that will continue to push solutions out of reach. Abundance will have to be more than a new faction of the Democratic Party to achieve its goals. And a desire for abundance stretches far and wide well beyond party lines. It might even help erase them.
For my interview of Misha Chellam, founder of the [Abundance Network](https://substack.com/redirect/299d053a-95c7-4a84-b1a9-af7a2399424b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a group dedicated to making government work locally, [click here](https://substack.com/redirect/59411af6-4a92-478d-961a-3f51a451de99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in your State to create a new option, [click here](https://substack.com/redirect/d2ad57fc-7507-4612-9a68-8cfee906a818?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..NlaZKdlqotSdESQIKSc-ywabQLTlW8ykOfQlTV3zeQo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164822053)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf0d2166-7902-47dc-8598-60864a99e635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Still, multiple people have come to the same conclusion, including Jen Pahlka who was the U.S. Deputy CTO and spent years in government trying to deliver better services. Red tape truly is holding us back. | | ---|---|--- Why is the abundance movement restricted to the Democratic Party? John Arnold, a philanthropist, noted "Every governor/mayor, regardless of party, faces challenges related to housing, energy and transportation. Abundance is being presented as the Democratic solution when it should be framed simply as the solution." At least one commentator asked Ezra and Derek, "What do you think the odds are that the Democratic Party will actually make these changes? Wouldn't you be better off advocating for a third party?" One of the major weaknesses for Democrats right now is that they are unlikely to get a majority in the U.S. Senate for the foreseeable future, which makes any Dem-led legislation unlikely. Ezra has been saying in interviews that he thinks a third force in politics is a good idea, in part because he sees the need to compete in places that the Dems are uncompetitive, which right now is a pretty big chunk of the country. I am pumped that Ezra and Derek made an explicitly political case and set off to meaningfully answer the question, "Why are Americans so fed up?" Including outcomes is an enormous development instead of trying to win the argument or morality play of the day. Outcomes in the United States have been getting worse in terms of the affordability of housing, healthcare, a college degree, childcare, and a lot of other staples of American life. Why are we saddled with such dysfunction? Unaccountable bureaucracy is one big barrier. Corporate interests are another. They're both valid. But another one staring us in the face is a polarized two-party system that will continue to push solutions out of reach. Abundance will have to be more than a new faction of the Democratic Party to achieve its goals. And a desire for abundance stretches far and wide well beyond party lines. It might even help erase them. For my interview of Misha Chellam, founder of the , a group dedicated to making government work locally, . To see what Forward is doing in your State to create a new option, . | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Andrew Yang 111 Sutter Street, 7th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckoa3603hsdm6n7ppfp8d0s4ce7p3hotui92ie0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8pf2dh1cm9kcag01nnv9fnev89l2haufm4mdgvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zub0go9aeda4s7kn5avn20chkh2bt3h2ql0flqhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehm17nk5is5nf9vn6ob58sfir8nl5vmdeoqnreo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr8uea0jibok71cf2q5vo6cs2rj5na7d90kcebi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0989itgl19btvdgsjp2qnufdmhomji7e1rf5uuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaueq1c3rqkt9emtagveq42jjuc2pe5emansl400_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zollvlm7tudlvi21n43mbm2u6iln0tfu9ogofeag_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge0o31c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

## Alaska Man Monday – Heroes, Myths and Thunder Funk – RedState
We all need heroes. They inspire us, they make us strive to be better people. The term “hero” is overused these days; I’ve never liked the term “sports hero,” for example, as just being able to play sportsball isn’t heroic. If the player did something else heroic, that would be great. name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Joni Ernst proves again that she is a jackass
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand a real apology from Senator Joni Ernst](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te11b260e-6a23-46de-b1ab-d5455bded23f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e345e95-3d68-453b-8b54-d0ab7104b86e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Senator Joni Ernst just [showed](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3809324-1c52-4a09-ae49-e5d9a288e6d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) herself (again) to be a truly awful human being. Please join us in condemning her actions, and demanding a real apology. [**Add your name to our letter:**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta91cf93b-c86d-492d-a222-1a90e47a140b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" Senator Ernst, I am writing to express my deep concern and disappointment over your recent comments regarding Medicaid and the vulnerable Americans who depend on it._

_During your town hall meeting in Iowa, a constituent raised a serious and heartfelt concern about the consequences of proposed Medicaid cuts, particularly the risk of death for those who rely on the program for life-saving care. Your response — "Well, we all are going to die" — was not only dismissive but alarmingly indifferent to the fears and realities faced by millions of Americans._

_Your subsequent social media post, in which you delivered a sarcastic "apology" from a cemetery, further compounded the harm. Rather than showing empathy or reconsidering the impact of your words, you chose to mock the very real distress of your constituents and downplay the life-and-death consequences of policy decisions made in Washington._

_Senator Ernst, elected officials have a responsibility to listen to their constituents with empathy and to engage with serious concerns in good faith. Millions of Americans — including children, seniors, and people with disabilities — depend on Medicaid not as a luxury, but as a lifeline._

_I urge you to issue a sincere, public apology. Not just for your sarcastic video, but for the original callous remark. Your constituents deserve better, and so does the nation. "_ [**Add your name**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f4b7e60-cc8c-4ad0-bb6c-6663a119baca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75f6f92d-6451-4708-b02b-6e73fd4cfa61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T478ae38b-dfec-4e02-b71e-d4e8ede9c0dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**

__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
