name: Maud Maron
subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp0q3m85kt24csvrpj045uhsv19j7v7ifs3se96o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge8o72cdh2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmo88kp97p4dfdp0kqpk1tn1s64u8rrtmitf1i68_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge8o72cdh2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5dahh6n0j0r229fapc9l5iqic6l4794j5v0l1m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge8o72cdh2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9gae8vhpeh3rk9mq7bs9b7mpoesudfbpjef0d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ge8o72cdh2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=01e8307315e54aa8acdc0fffaad05e8f&_e=xHlrtRYzlgj2Tsxby6MSUCHJp0aPd6Xue4IDI91cFSJajyAfXQAUN31xEYAdWaQJ2GjuplhCByoFwJHKkkx9ZcTAp5T2_PPJTjotyDjnvyyoaZgthyKSB-81ZN6CC_SuoQrHrh0r8BGuD65D4_ybYprUqtHiC0hgJXz9hWRxAnXU5sniQIJNZzIvzCPyffoEFL-hNl1MWKtAgtQH01zXKZui6xDrxHLdetvukf5dlt_COYARK64bLAmltL-oBmTAGPZquJxP1bemj9JG4MK6EF0mHNTVkrzYdiTw3qes7HGmmeLSO5pJm09pQWJ_ZqOsv2RxZ8yA5VO6gbT9vK8RVXFaXSEOQ4qlTJR5VwW0wx8%3D)

This is where you can make the BIGGEST impact. | Watch my announcement video below! I am fighting for everyday people in America. I don’t believe in letting special interests and political elites determine my agenda. Every single day, I go to work for YOU. My next post will be no different. I will continue to fight alongside President Trump to advance the America First Agenda. Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

****
When RFK Jr. was a kid, he had never heard of juvenile (Type 1) diabetes, _so he’s pretty sure it isn’t real._
Maybe if he had actual medical training, he would know that it is real and that it is one of the oldest known diseases, discovered in 1550 BCE.
Insulin was discovered in 1921. Before its discovery, children with diabetes DIED.

clean_body: | | | ** **RFK Jr’s FDA leader’s RX for diabetes? A recipe book! ** RFK Jr. and his FDA Commissioner are a danger to patients with diabetes and all Americans. They are suggesting that instead of taking life saving insulin, diabetic people should take cooking classes! We now have people who blame diabetic patients for their disease overseeing our national health! This is NOT good! People with Type 1 diabetes need insulin to live. RFK Jr. and his science deniers within the Department of Health and Human Services are toying with our lives! ** | When RFK Jr. was a kid, he had never heard of juvenile (Type 1) diabetes, so he’s pretty sure it isn’t real. Maybe if he had actual medical training, he would know that it is real and that it is one of the oldest known diseases, discovered in 1550 BCE. Insulin was discovered in 1921. Before its discovery, children with diabetes DIED. RFK Jr. and his minions are trying to destroy life-saving science! ** Thank you for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ---
Peter—

Since _Roe_ fell, anti-abortion extremists—backed by Trump's anti-rights administration—have been working relentlessly to make abortion care inaccessible. People are being denied essential, lifesaving care. Clinics are losing funding. The goal is clear: control our bodies by dismantling our rights.

If we don't act now, we risk losing even more.

[**Starting today, your gift to the Center for Reproductive Rights will be DOUBLED up to $100,000, thanks to a generous group of donors!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824491/549137575/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824492/549137576/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) In this environment, it's often the clinics and providers who are on the front lines fighting and struggling to stay open under a wave of bans and legal threats. [**We are their defenders, and supporters _like you_ make that possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824501/549137585/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) Our community powers the expert legal support we provide at no cost to clinics and medical professionals who rely on it to stay open and deliver care despite relentless attacks.

Without your donations, independent abortion providers—our clients—could be forced to turn away patients, cutting off access to critical, often lifesaving care for the people who need it most. [**Please, make a gift today and it will be DOUBLED, amplifying your impact on these clinics and the care they provide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824502/549137586/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824503/549137587/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT")

[**Please, don't miss this chance to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT on the work to keep clinics open and abortion care accessible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108824504/549137588/1126318745?sourceid=1150722&utm_campaign=25emage-0601aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDExOGJjMi1iMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MywllQrJtLe2Gd2vxK9pjUy0z-7cuEiSeX0P5LuU32I=&emci=8a8d190a-743d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64118bc2-b33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

Nancy Northup

clean_body: 2X the impact on reproductive rights | Peter— Since Roe fell, anti-abortion extremists—backed by Trump's anti-rights administration—have been working relentlessly to make abortion care inaccessible. People are being denied essential, lifesaving care. Clinics are losing funding. The goal is clear: control our bodies by dismantling our rights. If we don't act now, we risk losing even more. In this environment, it's often the clinics and providers who are on the front lines fighting and struggling to stay open under a wave of bans and legal threats. Our community powers the expert legal support we provide at no cost to clinics and medical professionals who rely on it to stay open and deliver care despite relentless attacks. Without your donations, independent abortion providers—our clients—could be forced to turn away patients, cutting off access to critical, often lifesaving care for the people who need it most. | "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT" Forward, Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S. This generous match expires on June 30—we must meet this moment. name: James Carville
subject: We gotta get serious about Jon Ossoff!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
After all of my years in politics, I've learned that sometimes things that are said are true, and other things that are said are less than true.
#

[
---
Hey Peter: it's James Carville. As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — we gotta get serious about Georgia's Senate race. After all of my years in politics, I've learned that sometimes things that are said are true, and other things that are said are less than true. **This is the truth: Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state won by Trump. That makes him Republicans’ top target.** But I'd rather not predict. I'd rather affect — and Jon Ossoff has a critical fundraising deadline this month. If everyone reading this pitched in a few bucks, we'd reach his goals with room to spare. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So they asked me to reach out to give you a push to act before it's too late. [**Please use this link to contribute directly to Jon Ossoff's campaign before his FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close this month.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250602&t=2&akid=407%2E5691347%2EjHmafO) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-june25.kCL-cM&refcode=em250602&t=21&akid=407%2E5691347%2EjHmafO)**

Palantir, the company Trump is paying hundreds of millions of dollars to develop the new database, was founded by MAGA ultra-donor Peter Thiel. In just the first 5 months of his second term, Trump has: Tried to pass legislation to shutdown non-profits opposed to him, signed executive orders attacking Dem fundraising platform ActBlue, arrested a Wisconsin judge, defied Supreme Court orders, floated the idea of suspending habeas corpus, arrested a sitting Democratic Congresswoman on frivolous charges, and now - building an unprecedented database to spy on all Americans.
We are in the fight of our lives - the fight for American democracy and against fascism. The upcoming 2026 midterms may be our last to save America. We must win back the House, cripple the Trump administration, and immediately move to investigate Trump's crimes and impeach him. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I’m not here to nibble around the edges.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Tired of watching our country lose its spine.

[](https://trk.email.vivekforohio.)If you and I sat down together, I think we’d walk away as friends...
In fact, I think we’d leave as close allies in a battle for our country's future.
[This is Vivek Ramaswamy: I’m a husband, a father, and an America First fighter who’s sick and tired of watching our country lose its spine.](https://trk.email.vivekforohio._ny_rjI9AA)
Why does the single mom in Toledo have to work two jobs while illegal immigrants get handed luxury hotel rooms, healthcare, and debit cards?
Why are kids in Cincinnati stepping over used needles while bureaucrats lecture them about “inclusion”?
Let’s call this what it is: America is being hollowed out from the inside.
And I’m not here to nibble around the edges.
I’m running for Governor to overhaul the system from the ground up. I believe Ohio can be the beating heart of America’s revival.
That’s why my entire campaign is centered on:
1. Supporting President Trump's America First Agenda.2. Cutting red tape3. Slashing taxes4. Empowering families5. Unleashing innovation
And let me tell you, the Democrat Machine is ENRAGED by this mission. They’ll do everything they can to stop me from winning this race.
**[So here's my final pitch to you: if I have ANY chance of winning, I desperately need your help right now.](https://trk.email.vivekforohio._upLaxy1Md-S1ow)**[ GIVE A SMALL DONATION TODAY
](https://trk.email.vivekforohio.)The fate of my campaign and our country rests wholly in your hands.**
**God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy
* * *
[](https://trk.email.vivekforohio._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDYwMl9FTS1JVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDg2MjAtMzYyMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA2MDJfRU0tSVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ4NjIwLTM2MjMifQ/axcX9TT3OjHyv2g7H26Kfg)This is Vivek. I’m building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence —Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country.
But I can’t do it alone. I need your voice behind me.
**[If you believe in this mission, please endorse my campaign today:](https://trk.email.vivekforohio._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDYwMl9FTS1JVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDg2MjAtMzYyMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA2MDJfRU0tSVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ4NjIwLTM2MjMifQ/l1NwyfaBylodDZLEY0GxVQ)**[ ENDORSE VIVEK

**$3.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $3 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. Did you see this message, Peter?

Senator Mitch McConnell, the longest-serving Republican party leader in U.S. Senate history, is stepping down, and our endorsed candidate, Colonel Pam Stevenson (D), is officially running for his seat.

This seat is winnable: **Democrats have been elected statewide in Kentucky consecutively since 1983, and although she didn’t win in 2023, Colonel Stevenson outperformed every Democrat in every race below her on the ballot – and outperformed incredibly well-funded previous statewide candidates, Amy McGrath and Charles Booker, by nearly 4 points each. We have a __real__ chance to win this seat and take back the U.S. Senate!**

[**Col. Stevenson has served our country with dignity and honor. She is one of the highest ranking Democrats in the entire state of Kentucky – and certainly the most qualified leader. Help us get Col. Stevenson’s campaign successfully launched by pitching in $20.25 or more today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108827465/549143892/-527673297?refcode=EM_F_250529questions_N_CB_90DO_9_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZjcxYmU3LWI5M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=madUAu-JlfWnJ2swz7tufLvrOWqNvrXQfnhoO8EyJpA=)

Together,

Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

For the first time since 1972, Senator Mitch McConnell will NOT be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate. That means his seat might be one of the keys to Democrats taking back Congress in the midterms.

You may be wondering if it’s realistic for a Democrat to win this seat in a state like Kentucky. We think this email will help answer that very question.

## Featured Video:
Charlie Kirk, alongside Riley Gaines, had **[a tense and awkward confrontation](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a student during a TPUSA campus event when he accused Kirk of debating students "unfairly."
He gets a major reality check...
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The student approached Kirk and Gaines' table with a preamble of "good conscience" in debating.
"You gotta go faster man, what is it?" Kirk hurried the long-winded student along.
The student finally made his point, **["You called our campus 'an island of totalitarianism,](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**... that SF State is much like Stalingrad or Leningrad, a Maoist-type concentration camp."
**["Do you guys agree with that?"](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kirk asked the crowd, to which many cheered in agreement.
Kirk explained that San Francisco State University is where Riley Gaines was "literally locked in a room for hours because a bunch of trans zealots were threatening her life, and they canceled her event in a classroom and the university did nothing to punish the people responsible and instead sent out an email apologizing that her presence even came on campus. What do you think about that?!"
Watch Kirk give this student the reality check he needs. He definitely should have done his homework before challenging Kirk...
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f3ea50-7ab6-40b9-b4db-8dce8cae96f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an
American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...

## News You Need To Know:
# Colorado terror attack suspect reportedly in the U.S. illegally
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f48e1af-70cd-43b2-a71b-83403b2ec1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Mohamed Sabry Soliman, 45, **[allegedly used a makeshift flamethrower and Molotov cocktails to attack a group](https://substack.com/redirect/1e94f31d-ae0a-4b0b-81a9-9eeaaf15e1af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of mostly elderly people (ages 52-88) participating in a solidarity walk for Israeli hostages held by Hamas, sending eight victims to hospitals with at least one in critical condition.
* **The suspect was in the U.S. illegally after his visa expired in March** \- Soliman entered the country in 2022 on a non-immigrant visa, overstayed his original permit, received work authorization in 2023 which expired in March 2024, meaning he had been living illegally in the U.S. for about two months when the attack occurred.
* **He had previously been denied entry to the U.S. in 2005** \- Law enforcement sources revealed that Soliman was rejected for a visa in 2005, though it's unclear if he made other attempts before being approved in 2022, raising questions about the vetting process for his eventual entry.
* **Federal authorities are treating this as a targeted terrorist attack** \- The FBI confirmed they're investigating the assault as terrorism, with DHS Secretary Kristi Noem and FBI officials emphasizing that Soliman appeared to be waiting for the group at one of their scheduled stops, indicating premeditation and targeting based on their support for Israeli hostages.

* * *
# Climate radical Greta Thunberg sailing to Gaza
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/993f245e-64b1-4cc9-8226-76536b3b71c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What you need to know:
* **Thunberg is joining a humanitarian mission to Gaza to deliver aid and protest Israel's blockade** \- The 22-year-old climate activist will sail aboard the "Madleen" with the Freedom Flotilla Coalition, citing a "moral obligation" to fight for a "free Palestine" amid what she calls the "systematic starvation of 2 million people."
"The world cannot be silent bystanders," Thunberg said about the voyage. "We are seeing a systematic starvation of 2 million people. Every single one of us has a moral obligation to do everything we can to fight for a free Palestine."
* **Critics are calling her out for aligning with Hamas and virtue signaling** \- Sky News hosts and online commenters have attacked Thunberg, with some calling her an "urban terrorist" who will "fit right in" with Hamas, while others suggested she's treating Gaza "like some sort of idyllic holiday destination."
* **The mission comes after a previous failed voyage and Thunberg's controversial protest history** \- The Freedom Flotilla Coalition's last attempt in May was allegedly struck by a drone attack off Malta, and Thunberg previously faced backlash for being arrested at anti-Israel protests and initially failing to condemn Hamas's massacre of Israeli civilians before later clarifying her position.

* * *
## _Don 't Miss: MAGA Moment_
# **Trump UNLOADS on fake news reporter who calls him "a chicken"**
President Donald Trump **[fired back at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/8793823b-2d2c-4afd-956a-5608eb66f3ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who asked him to respond to foreign leaders accusing him of "chickening out" of bold tariff positions.
He did not appreciate the way she asked the question...
"Don't ever say that to me! That's a nasty question..."
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8793823b-2d2c-4afd-956a-5608eb66f3ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Kirk asked the crowd, to which many cheered in agreement. Kirk explained that San Francisco State University is where Riley Gaines was "literally locked in a room for hours because a bunch of trans zealots were threatening her life, and they canceled her event in a classroom and the university did nothing to punish the people responsible and instead sent out an email apologizing that her presence even came on campus. What do you think about that?!" Watch Kirk give this student the reality check he needs. He definitely should have done his homework before challenging Kirk... | | ---|---|--- Trump 's Push For America First What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- News You Need To Know: Colorado terror attack suspect reportedly in the U.S. illegally | | ---|---|--- Mohamed Sabry Soliman, 45, of mostly elderly people (ages 52-88) participating in a solidarity walk for Israeli hostages held by Hamas, sending eight victims to hospitals with at least one in critical condition. The suspect was in the U.S. illegally after his visa expired in March \- Soliman entered the country in 2022 on a non-immigrant visa, overstayed his original permit, received work authorization in 2023 which expired in March 2024, meaning he had been living illegally in the U.S. for about two months when the attack occurred. He had previously been denied entry to the U.S. in 2005 \- Law enforcement sources revealed that Soliman was rejected for a visa in 2005, though it's unclear if he made other attempts before being approved in 2022, raising questions about the vetting process for his eventual entry. Federal authorities are treating this as a targeted terrorist attack \- The FBI confirmed they're investigating the assault as terrorism, with DHS Secretary Kristi Noem and FBI officials emphasizing that Soliman appeared to be waiting for the group at one of their scheduled stops, indicating premeditation and targeting based on their support for Israeli hostages. Climate radical Greta Thunberg sailing to Gaza | | ---|---|--- What you need to know: Thunberg is joining a humanitarian mission to Gaza to deliver aid and protest Israel's blockade \- The 22-year-old climate activist will sail aboard the "Madleen" with the Freedom Flotilla Coalition, citing a "moral obligation" to fight for a "free Palestine" amid what she calls the "systematic starvation of 2 million people." "The world cannot be silent bystanders," Thunberg said about the voyage. "We are seeing a systematic starvation of 2 million people. Every single one of us has a moral obligation to do everything we can to fight for a free Palestine." Critics are calling her out for aligning with Hamas and virtue signaling \- Sky News hosts and online commenters have attacked Thunberg, with some calling her an "urban terrorist" who will "fit right in" with Hamas, while others suggested she's treating Gaza "like some sort of idyllic holiday destination." The mission comes after a previous failed voyage and Thunberg's controversial protest history \- The Freedom Flotilla Coalition's last attempt in May was allegedly struck by a drone attack off Malta, and Thunberg previously faced backlash for being arrested at anti-Israel protests and initially failing to condemn Hamas's massacre of Israeli civilians before later clarifying her position. Don 't Miss: MAGA Moment Trump UNLOADS on fake news reporter who calls him "a chicken" President Donald Trump who asked him to respond to foreign leaders accusing him of "chickening out" of bold tariff positions. He did not appreciate the way she asked the question... "Don't ever say that to me! That's a nasty question..." * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . | Hi Peter, Lexy Doherty here — the unapologetic Democrat who made history in 2024 against MAGA Mike Collins. Last time, we broke every Democratic fundraising and voter turnout record in Georgia’s 10th Congressional District. And we proved that our historically red district isn’t so red after all — and now, we’re back to finish what we started. **Today, I’m officially launching our campaign to take down Mike Collins and flip Georgia’s 10th blue.** **[Will you chip in now to help us reach our $50,000 launch goal and become a founding donor of our historic movement?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7050313f-a115-495a-96ad-9e6fc25e09d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

* _He led the far right's crusade to pass abortion and IVF bans._
* _He blocked all efforts to pass gun control after the devastating school shooting at Apalachee High School in our district._
* _He was investigated by the NAACP for praising a group of white fraternity members at Ole Miss who harassed a black female student protesting on campus._
* _He called the Jan 6th insurrectionists “peaceful protestors” and blamed Joe Biden for the assassination attempt against Trump._

**But Mike Collins’s extremism is exactly why we can win.** Because unlike Collins, I don’t play partisan political games. I’m focused on getting the cost of living down, removing guns from our streets, making health care affordable, and improving our schools. This is our moment. **If we hit our $50,000 goal, we can launch our campaign with more firepower and more national attention than any Democrat who’s ever run in GA-10!** And send a message to Mike Collins, the media, and the MAGA machine that we’re coming for this seat, and we’re not backing down. [**Can I count on you to chip in right now to help us reach our $50,000 goal and be part of the largest campaign launch this district has ever seen? Let’s show them what a fired-up, fearless Democratic movement looks like!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff54e4f7-53e9-4a5b-b24f-d16c5d761ee8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. After publishing [yesterday's post](https://substack.com/redirect/73229e94-5712-44e9-b49d-874b7a4e7dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the start of the 2025 Atlantic Hurricane season, I received a couple of questions along a similar line of thinking:
Is there a greater risk for some areas during this combination of oceanic phases than there is for others during different combination of phases?
As your resident hurricane climatologist and geographer, I'm happy to take a stab at answering that question!
Hurricane climatology isn't just about how many storms we get or even how strong they are, but also _where_ they tend to hit...

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Was Elon Musk High While Slashing Federal Jobs? Demand Action.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Reverse Elon Musk's DOGE cuts ASAP, since he may have been high as a kite when he made them](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8512c74-f9aa-4a91-bf1a-32e59027b462/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58b6e6cf-a952-4a2f-8b3c-7620af6a5a22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | A lot people thought Elon Musk must have been high when he and his DOGE team started randomly firing federal employees (including critical ones who oversaw nuclear weapons), shutting down essential projects, and taking other steps that just seemed bonkers. Well, it turns out those people may have been right. According to a [NYT Times investigation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a68f817-e1c3-4dd7-a8d2-3436e4668a1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), Musk was using so much Ketamine on the campaign trail that he started having bladder issues. Which we didn't even know was a thing. And that may have been just one of many drugs he was taking. If Musk was still downing pills in Sasquatch-sized batches when he was driving the DOGE effort, there's no way in hell he was in his right mind, and no way in hell we should follow his lead as he drives us off a cliff. Congress needs to immediately reverse Musk's actions, hire back employees who were let go, and reject any additional DOGE cuts being considered. **[Add your name: Demand that Musk's cuts be reversed ASAP](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3a92c45-d6bb-4f83-8fbf-138a4ce00657/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffcc0240-ebe7-4709-bff6-7a928db39d23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e40b4e1-e34d-445b-b5e9-cf4de776d149/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbf4bb99-e540-4006-b256-a70da65e9dbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: General John King
subject: Shot and stabbed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. |
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=279a8906917d47bf838c7066bc4a1fa1&_e=64yRrD4bFdmrFCkCjRdTw6-Muaw2CWRGfUfoLShX5Vvk84Kc953sChvEmqHaxprrWaxsfHLE9ffRM491OXwNcl5yT_gnCCK9Ek_F0mf_boO09ui0j_gdldCcLskweTnFjrFAEKYaXE_wze0hr4QM2GGBDGhWqSIBiplKwCR6GTeP0HtK-wdspAhoUKRsO2AnkKCAhdFMUcmCNToOYQkLgCqshzyk6b0dDwazhn8pJAn0h9ac9han3sITZXhxK-r_dlRqfn6CvMzcW3b7Afl4C9X2oEuduLCgr71GXm8bsOQueVSVNHG7SQRXCFoGZAIbMbA-O1141beldBLX0ey-lPl5-PaGI4rMmguJstGGfwrYp0Ar8UERorKdkiqhYcpVQBqejPkqFoUWHf6KIZWGwg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop.

My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

**I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.**

That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors.

**I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders.

Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure.**

[**But I can’t do it without your support.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=279a8906917d47bf838c7066bc4a1fa1&_e=64yRrD4bFdmrFCkCjRdTw6-Muaw2CWRGfUfoLShX5Vvk84Kc953sChvEmqHaxprrWaxsfHLE9ffRM491OXwNcl5yT_gnCCK9Ek_F0mf_boO09ui0j_gdldCcLskweTnFjrFAEKYaXE_wze0hr4QM2GGBDGhWqSIBiplKwCR6GTeP0HtK-wdspAhoUKRsO2AnkKCAhdFMUcmCNToOYQkLgCqshzyk6b0dDwazhn8pJAn0h9ac9han3sITZXhxK-r_K2YGhmmZ5-rxNZXWuxwwJra2wb-mmwbnmN0xxcKnZ0Q517ZSIQkMkkBjqAKpcdt--vGZhT2pMyMe5ffM6il6wxqJ10FcTOGZ2eff2iQxITwsUQ9d18wBrcHMEbYECF3HGmKpK-g9jj87EqE8Al-sBw%3D%3D)

When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when __**"Cop City"**__ protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center.

He must be defeated.

[**Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will help me bring determination, resolve, and support for our law enforcement officers to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=279a8906917d47bf838c7066bc4a1fa1&_e=64yRrD4bFdmrFCkCjRdTw6-Muaw2CWRGfUfoLShX5Vvk84Kc953sChvEmqHaxprrWaxsfHLE9ffRM491OXwNcl5yT_gnCCK9Ek_F0mf_boO09ui0j_gdldCcLskweTnFjrFAEKYaXE_wze0hr4QM2GGBDGhWqSIBiplKwCR6GTeP0HtK-wdspAhoUKRsO2AnkKCAhdFMUcmCNToOYQkLgCqshzyk6b0dDwazhn8pJAn0h9ac9han3sITZXhxK-r_xuPMooV46eiCh44Ry_TsMt6TbIf8dzAihyxrz_o2wtQWFAOA_rAzhe9wSZWxSXpVcsTLH4BlfuRv-ESL_p9dajwEndDRhUH1_xP_UXqI_SddN6hePyLbkcRcCH93CLTv5ph1LOWmpWODslIlc715Iw%3D%3D)

[**Will you stand with me? Please donate now to help me take this fight to Washington.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=279a8906917d47bf838c7066bc4a1fa1&_e=64yRrD4bFdmrFCkCjRdTw6-Muaw2CWRGfUfoLShX5Vvk84Kc953sChvEmqHaxprrWaxsfHLE9ffRM491OXwNcl5yT_gnCCK9Ek_F0mf_boO09ui0j_gdldCcLskweTnFjrFAEKYaXE_wze0hr4QM2GGBDGhWqSIBiplKwCR6GTeP0HtK-wdspAhoUKRsO2AnkKCAhdFMUcmCNToOYQkLgCqshzyk6b0dDwazhn8pJAn0h9ac9han3sITZXhxK-r_OloWmhlYmEb-T6wYEfLARL9YdtcYOGZ8tCrIBdD_AZ_hEAXKhi__WGyaMhsI-F5py0MMuveYjc8YRs7Fcl8DPyMWQFUn76edKw9N1OENWaaSem1nourlkkA2lusyZ-fh6UiAT63pej07NLp3fn5PuQ%3D%3D)

I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together.

Thank you,

He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. clean_body: During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. | Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop. My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors. I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders. Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure. When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when "Cop City" protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center. He must be defeated. I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) - STAND WITH OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS - | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Breaking through the noise
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We want to hear your story.
#

Team,
For many Americans, gun violence isn’t just some abstract topic on TV. It’s a part of their life.
Nearly 1 in 5 Americans say they have personally witnessed someone get shot. And almost every person in our country will know at least one victim of gun violence.
Gabby knows this firsthand. In 2011, she was shot in the head by a gunman at a constituent event.
The gunman tried to rob Gabby of her life, but she refused to give in. Since then, she has worked to recover every day -- and to build a national movement where nobody else has to experience what she has gone through.
Unfortunately, we still have work to do.
Many elected officials refuse to believe guns are a problem -- even though Americans die from gun violence each and every day. We need to break through the noise.
One of the most powerful ways to do that is by hearing from people like you.
[**Have you been affected by gun violence? If you feel comfortable, we would love to hear more about your story. Anything you share will be kept safe.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_Stories_June2025//?source=em250602-1-b&refcode2=10537.3935704.QtPc8-&akid=10537%2E3935704%2EQtPc8-)
**[SHARE MY STORY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_Stories_June2025//?source=em250602-1-b&refcode2=10537.3935704.QtPc8-&akid=10537%2E3935704%2EQtPc8-)**
Thank you in advance for sharing your story. Together, we will make our communities safer.
-- GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/62200?t=1&akid=10537%2E3935704%2EQtPc8-)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=10537%2E3935704%2EQtPc8-) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Farah
subject: Join us for a Virtual Town Hall with U.S. Senator Jon Tester and Representative Jasmine Crockett
body:
ECU Turns 10! Join us in a live town hall.| | | Join us for a LIVE town hall with former U.S. Senator Jon Tester and Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett!
---
| |
---
| | Hi Friend, I wanted to share some exciting news with you. My name is Farah and I’m the Vice President of State Campaigns here at End Citizens United and I wanted to send you a quick note to invite you to an exciting event happening **tomorrow**. ECU is celebrating its 10 year anniversary and we will be launching a series of events and we want to celebrate with YOU. [**[RSVP HERE to attend the Virtual Town Hall June 3rd @12PM ET]**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108833641/549156656/1125297529?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1NTcyMzdiLWMxM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UqELyytwVMNP4Yb9doFSg8EorgkvB1q3fLGT61mxxOY=&emci=40a13c37-bd3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6557237b-c13f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14405814) We want to ask our fiercest supporters to join us and come together as we reflect on how far ECU has come and to discuss how we can continue to fight corruption in our upcoming town hall. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We deserve better than backward deals and midnight votes.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108834531/549159551/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250602thanks_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmUyMWM0OC1jMjNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMjajAzF3nuIIAOvP8nVddy8d0tFDij8cdSJvdvpMKo=) Peter,

Last week, you helped me to hit my critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and it means a lot to me to have your ongoing support. I wanted to reach out personally and thank you.

While Republicans are working to take from the poorest people in our nation to fund tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans, my Democratic colleagues and I were fighting in every way we could to stop Trump’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill from being passed. Why? **Because working families deserve better than backward deals and midnight votes.**

**And we still have work to do. With your support, we will KEEP fighting to ensure that our nation works for everyone, not just a select few.**

Thank you so much for standing by my side. Together, we can work to hold Republicans accountable and protect our nation from the Trump agenda.

In this together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

clean_body: We deserve better than backward deals and midnight votes. = Peter, Last week, you helped me to hit my critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and it means a lot to me to have your ongoing support. I wanted to reach out personally and thank you. While Republicans are working to take from the poorest people in our nation to fund tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans, my Democratic colleagues and I were fighting in every way we could to stop Trump’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill from being passed. Why? Because working families deserve better than backward deals and midnight votes. And we still have work to do. With your support, we will KEEP fighting to ensure that our nation works for everyone, not just a select few. Thank you so much for standing by my side. Together, we can work to hold Republicans accountable and protect our nation from the Trump agenda. In this together, Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

We would like to hear from more voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Put simply: Missouri's plan is dumb. Put with more nuance: it's costly, inefficient, and a bad use of taxpayer money.

# [Missouri's $1.5 billion stadium grift](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=164837845&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0ODM3ODQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDg4NzcxMDksImV4cCI6MTc1MTQ2OTEwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SyOgdH6T3N8wL-KVWeUqz3FykJqB8gj4EOJn0UivhrY)
### Put simply: Missouri's plan is dumb. Put with more nuance: it's costly, inefficient, and a bad use of taxpayer money.
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---
| Jun 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=164837845&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0ODM3ODQ1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODg3NzEwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzUxNDY5MTA5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjQ0MDM5OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QywwtXZdAE9pm8l7l5twxbTqDz_VCTEtCmZwFeERXiI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
