TOP NEWS "Texas attorney general won 't get new powers to prosecute election crimes after legislative deadlock," Votebeat / Texas Tribune's Natalie Contreras - "Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears unlikely to gain new powers to prosecute election crimes after the House and Senate failed Saturday to reach a deadline to work out their differences on how much leeway to grant the state's top legal office in such cases. That development in the waning days of the regular 2025 legislative session ending Monday comes two years after the House voted to impeach Paxton on misconduct allegations that included bribery and abuse of office. The Senate later acquitted Paxton. was filed by state Rep. Matt Shaheen , a Republican from North Texas. The Senate passed a version that would have given the attorney general's office the power to unilaterally prosecute local election crimes when a county fails to do so. The House had previously agreed to grant Paxton's office more powers to prosecute such cases, but only after local prosecutors considered the case. Shaheen filed the bill after the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals, the state's highest criminal court, found Paxton's office does not have authority to independently prosecute criminal election cases in trial courts without the request of a local prosecutor. Paxton who reached that decision when they were up for reelection, leading a successful campaign to . The legislation would have explicitly granted Paxton the authority he sought in the court case. against Republican incumbentJohn Cornyn , creating an opening for a new state attorney general to take office in 2027. Under the Senate's version, local law enforcement would be required to send a report to the attorney general's office if it believes there is probable cause to suspect that an election crime has been committed. The attorney general's office would then have the authority to prosecute. Local prosecutors and law enforcement would be required to turn over any information they have about election crime investigations to the attorney general's office. Under the House's version of the bill, law enforcement agencies would be required to notify the attorney general's office when reporting a potential election crime to local prosecutors. The attorney general could investigate only if the local prosecutor took no action on those reports for six months. And under the bill, local prosecutors could challenge the attorney general's assertion of jurisdiction to investigate. A conference committee failed to reach an agreement by midnight Saturday, effectively killing the bill. Texas Gov. Greg Abbott could call a special session on the issue if he chooses. has made targeting election-related crimes a priority since he took office in 2015. He has pursued of suspected crimes by voters but has successfully convicted only a handful. Republican lawmakers filed to give him the authority to step into local investigations, but those bills failed to pass. That was the same regular session in which the House impeached Paxton. Some voting rights advocates have said giving the Texas attorney general more power over local law enforcement offices is that the bill seemed aimed at increasing election prosecutions, and potentially intimidating voters and local election officials." In fact, it must be working because Main Stream NEWS media outlets are now starting to cover exactly what we have been reporting ALL SESSION LONG.

**Sunlight and oxygen are the most effective disinfectants.** Before you accept a single excuse from ANYONE in this Texas 89th Legislature, let's get a few facts clearly stated: 31 Texas Senators: 20 Republicans, 11 Democrats 150 Texas House Reps: 88 Republicans, 62 Democrats **Republicans have a CLEAR and convincing majority in BOTH houses of the legislature.** _So...how did Democrats and their agenda prevail this session?_ **Here's how:** The HOUSE Republican Caucus met before the session and chose a Republican for House Speaker. Rather than ratify Representative Cook, 36 reps ran out of the room and made a dirty deal with the Democrats to choose Representative Burrows as what we now call RINO Speaker. As this was happening, we addressed the Texas Governor who holds the ultimate VETO power to make a public statement to all House Republicans that the Governor would veto the bills of any republican house member that BROKE the caucus rules and did to vote for the caucus choice, Cook. Abbott did nothing and let the RINO/Democrat Cabal rule over the Texas House. **THIS put the HOUSE in control of the Legislature.** We then publicly asked the Lt Gov Dan Patrick to simply do the same and tell the House that the Senate would simply NOT ratify ANY legislation coming out of the HOUSE, effectively a knock out punch to the RINO/DEMOCRAT cabal. Patrick did worse than nothing...Patrick starting making back room deals with lobbyist controlled Burrows and the RINOs. Now...you are naive and ignorant to think that Texas Governor Greg Abbott, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick & House Speaker Dustin Burrows are NOT fully committed to each other in a very sick and salacious loving relationship behind closed doors fueled by lobbyist dollars. THIS 89th Legislature SHOULD have been Texas most shining moment as a state. Instead, it has betrayed the voters in every possible way. If it were a person, it would be a boy that was groomed, transgendered into a woman, that lived its life as a butch lesbian pretending to be a man. **WE the VOTERS, Texans, sent them to Austin with a referendum for the TRUMP 47 Agenda. They have done everything to work against it.** YES...that is how messed up this ridiculous Texas Legislative Session has proven itself to be. Examine the record.

## $12,686,519
In politics money talks and TLR uses a megaphone. Texans for Lawsuit Reform (TLR): A Front Group for Corporate Interests
Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher, CRTX News Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. TLR, co-founded by Houston businessman Dick Weekley, is not a grassroots movement, but a front group for corporate interests. Weekley’s TLR PAC, funded by wealthy businessmen, including insurance companies and corporations, raised and spent over $20 million in the 2024 elections, supporting Republican candidates and legislators, so that they would introduce bills like Senate Bill 30 (SB30) and Senate Bill 39
(SB39) to protect corporate profits over legitimate injury claims of Texans. The Republicans, whom TLR supported that were elected, received over $12.5 million in donations. See below for a list of these Republicans. Is your State Representative or State Senator on the list of those who the TLR tried to buy off? Not all of them support TLR’s legislation, the TLR simply tries to buy their support. Most of these legislators support your constitutional rights, but they need to hear from you. Call them to encourage them to vote “No!” on TRL’s power play! TLR’s agenda prioritizes shielding negligent corporations, like reckless trucking firms or polluters, from having to compensate for injuries inflicted upon Texans. TLR should be renamed “Texans for Corporate Greed and Immunity,” because it consistently protects corporate interests by undermining the constitutional rights of those harmed by corporate misconduct. TLR’s spent millions in donations, over $20 million to Republican candidates in 2024 alone, to buy influence to advance their corporate agenda, not conservative values. By backing SB 30 and SB 39, TLR and Weekley undermine the constitutional rights of Texans to be compensated for injuries caused by negligent actions of individuals or businesses. Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. SB 30 was voted out of Texas House Judiciary and Civil Jurisprudence Committee on Wednesday, May 20, 2024 and is in the House Calendars Committee which sets the bills for a vote before the House. SB 39 is still in the House Judiciary Committee. Call the offices of your Republican members and tell them to vote “No!” on both SB30 and SB39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home You can monitor this legislation for committee hearings and votes on
SB30and on SB39 at (https://capitol.texas.gov (https://capitol.texas.gov/)). Why SB 30 and SB 39 Must Be Opposed 1\. Violation of the Texas Constitution
| 1. | Violation of the Texas Constitution
---|---
Both SB 30 and SB 39 undermine Article 1, Section 13 of the Texas Constitution, which guarantees that “All courts shall be open, and every person for an injury done him, in his lands, goods, person or reputation, shall have remedy by due course of law.”This constitutional provision ensures that you and other Texans have access to courts and meaningful compensation for injuries that have been inflicted upon you. SB 30caps health care expenses, denying full compensation for their injuries caused by corporate negligence, such as refinery workers maimed in explosions or families harmed in motor vehicle accidents. SB 39was written to “protect Texas trucking,” by restricting lawsuits against trucking companies, shielding corporations from liability for having negligently caused injuries to individuals. The Texas Supreme Court has struck down similar caps on compensation as unconstitutional (Lucas v. United States, 1988). These bills undermine our open courts provision in the Texas Constitution.
1\. SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
1. | SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
---|---
By capping medical expense recovery, SB 30 punishes uninsured Texans (over 4.3 million, including 623,000 children) and deters healthcare providers from treating them, leaving injured victims of corporate negligence with crushing bills. SB 39 limits lawsuits against trucking companies, even when their negligence causes catastrophic injuries or deaths on Texas roads. It protects corporate profits over families devastated by preventable crashes, undermining justice for those harmed by reckless corporate behavior.
Insurance Profits Soar, Yet No Relief for Texans
The Texas insurance industry, a key TLR backer, made an estimated $3.5 billion in profits in 2023 and $6.7 billion in 2024, an increase of over 90%, driven by premium hikes and investment gains. TLR admits that SB 30 will not lower insurance rates, nor will SB 39. These bills are not about helping you, the consumer. These bills shift the financial burden of corporate negligence onto victims, forcing families, healthcare providers, or taxpayers to cover costs, while insurers pocket record profits. SB 30 and SB 39 are about insulating corporations from liability for having caused negligent injuries, enabling them to make more profits at the expense of injured Texans.
1\. Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
1. | Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
---|---
President Trump signed an executive order making sure all commercial truck drivers speak English, but right now, Republican’s who support SB39 are opposing Trump's order for Texas.
SB 39 blocks admission of whether or not truck drivers speak English.
Texas Sheriffs oppose this bill because it makes Texas less safe.
You must act now to protect our constitutional rights and ensure justice for all Texans, not just corporate giants.
Call or email your state representative today, and tell him or her to oppose SB 30 and SB 39. Click on the following link to find your state representative: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home
As conservatives, we must stand for our constitutional rights that guarantee liberty, justice, and the rule of law. Let’s defeat SB 30 and SB 39 to protect Texans from TLR’s profit-driven assault on our Texas Constitution.
Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher of CRTX News
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu9t9d4lb3mi9105974j5bh9gua55bqesmu7g70o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ieapj6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5i2ivdun7ai58l25ec84pd5rsn8dpncug8ci8rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ieapj6c1h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkeq0l74hfmg678ni7rhlpfsh06cve8ao1n05fn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ieapj6c1h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhrpohhcm07lkjjbai7erdnljuuv53rfmplnbaqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ieapj6c1h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1uctpcarajjnmanf9qivddmke8osgvhe9j2rpio_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s3ieapj6c1h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---

clean_body: My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate. I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate... If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation... If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts... ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond. My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Actionisthe most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them. And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on theissues. Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to: Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections. Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes. All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend. We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from: voting in our elections taking benefits reserved for you being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes. Here’s the truth: the Uniparty and their Deep State allies are terrified of Musk and DOGE exposing their wasteful schemes. They’re scheming to seize control of the House in 2026 and unleash a witch hunt to stop the America First movement in its tracks.

body:
FINAL CALL to verify your status — we can’t afford to fall behind. | Fellow American,

Things are unraveling fast on the Left. One top Democrat insider just came clean and said the quiet part out loud:

_**“We're worse off than 2016... Our party's a total joke.”**_
_Yikes._ But don't let that fool you into thinking we can sit back. When the Democrats start to panic, they throw every wild idea they've got at the wall just to see what sticks.

Meanwhile, over here? **We're getting serious.**

Even the smallest donation helps more than you could imagine. >> **](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquC_OZTfE-bwysVUXvwfqz3nvOsm1fqeLwb26busOGpAskHDHhRCWXxGco9fAToL15aKZbphjOfxtrvwSUpnFld9apNIL1gUH0cJtHY9xABMmTNc_IE7BAiaXC-i1oj7z2Fp843pd6shnpda5qvo2ZnlCGBhwsga5G10RPtMAZXtxJ8Njj9Ub_1Ox7bQLrKG5CGMGx-LY9IF--2sL_m-V1xtdJz6fjX96BokHIxG8Udd1mqCJUW1zMysZhdnzkdOMpmyrE3ndtXihC_eMqp06wJkY6bgxx7bNYdC08GtbO4-Q/4h0/6hmtVtIXThmpH6L2FBJmyA/h1/h001.A9v17IDMjsFPFmxyqGPyL3_tCmXQNXBF0Rz8Lbvbz74) After Donald Trump was impeached in 2020, Susan Collins voted to ACQUIT him - claiming he'd "learned his lesson." If we build an unbeatable grassroots movement to flip Maine, we can stop Donald Trump in his tracks. | | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a1816c7f0ffb49aa870b901df97383c2&_e=8vGp18m9Om2GwiCWLOK-7hNY_kLH8-oDyUhBBcCrMMHk9j-xj7B5BxjjM17Igrc17UMXt-krK07oT51h5-_5J1bjJAcFU8teswd4bCfxng-gCR0L7gbrAazOvD55GamOPjA9RNHqXCo2pk0L0Qu0vr-8DYCuvlDtiJhiH4mkLpfj1q_FoUbBrKg8kcv2gQRSPLaY9lfhCLuWKSA9X18GWB59vyY5AEmvfZgh0mVta8r-UhzhPbN4mQ3goupv4cuhRrGi4kgofROYWhU_Zbi3QU9YIKGkW11DSX7X9AusIsc7-8UBKZl-7TGjpqJLcff3XZuVRj3Vk6w8sXsSRwjq4OxG2wPG0gVAB0hGWdSPLl8%3D)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**

In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. clean_body: Take the Birthright Citizenship Survey| | | | | | | | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message:From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. "" If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. "" Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and PresidentNumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. "" | | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. NumbersUSA.com | | | ---|---|--- | | NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation 1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209 |

On behalf of our entire country, we want to extend our heartfelt gratitude for your extraordinary service as you step back from your pivotal role with DOGE.

The American People

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [SIGN ON] Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
#

Team —
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
In 2020, hundreds of thousands of people signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022.
It meant the world to us, and to Mark.
Now, he needs our help again. He’s got a new mission: _Holding the Trump Administration accountable, combatting Elon Musk’s illegal actions, and getting the next generation of leaders elected to the United States Senate._
**And today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he’s got a big team backing him up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-endorse/?source=em250602-1-90&akid=6080%2E6688874%2ELjEz8i)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-endorse/?source=em250602-1-90&akid=6080%2E6688874%2ELjEz8i)**
With so much happening now this might seem like an insignificant action. But in times like these, everything we do matters.
When you join the thousands of others who have endorsed Mark it helps us put together a team from coast to coast that can do incredible things. It’s bigger than any one of us, and it sends an important message.
Actions like this are how we’ll get through this — how we’ll turn the tide.
Together.
[**So, please, hit this link and personally endorse Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-endorse/?source=em250602-1-90&akid=6080%2E6688874%2ELjEz8i)
Thank you!
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-endorse/?source=em250602-1-90&akid=6080%2E6688874%2ELjEz8i)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6080%2E6688874%2ELjEz8i).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
This is an update from the Elfreth campaign team: we’re reaching a critical point in our campaign cycle and need your help.
The reality is, these aren’t normal times. We have a President who is bent on dismantling our civil service, who is deporting U.S. residents without due process – all while he enriches himself in the process. This moment requires all of us to do our part.
Sarah is gearing up to run an aggressive organizing campaign in the midterms. We’re going to be on the ground in Maryland’s 3rd AND in Pennsylvania and Virginia working to support fellow Democrats win the majority and provide a critical check on the chaos in Washington.
But to do that we need resources. Will you chip in $5 to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-06-02]

We have a President who is bent on dismantling our civil service, who is deporting U.S. residents without due process – all while he enriches himself in the process. subject: WATCH: "We should never give up our sovereignty to some unelected, international bureaucrats like the U.N. or W.H.O.."
body:
| | | [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=969110d26dae4328b45f74a497cb6ac2&_e=hjLPzp3m-jm3UX4WsR3NCxK7XjSbn6odFWFi4UBvl1zbhDov0ZpzKqm0tImHs3Iyzsn09T0QbzDLzBVxgcdGHamlQ1RHHHQAZ0xcTL2TlvBQ4kjaaM6cMObhDx6zlHh6SKZJCa1r6ylZBps0CASjGskL1G-OP5UBYDIKkb6V3NrwMnEKJM_EdW8yaGVpyIhZIEKPtudvH3GAczLVzRYFyw%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
Friends,
---
HHS should prioritize the health of Americans first. President Trump says it unashamedly— a sharp contrast to the last four years of Joe Biden's America-last leadership. We can’t cede our sovereignty to unelected global bureaucrats!

I joined Carl Higbie Frontline on Newsmax to talk about all this and much more.
Watch below and make sure to forward this to friends and family! _**WATCH THE INTERVIEW⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[| | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=969110d26dae4328b45f74a497cb6ac2&_e=hjLPzp3m-jm3UX4WsR3NC0ioTmR_R7umrjE5TwE7k25Eix-F5aWbyvIU7GqgGrY87vWKTKPR9EO6MUAP2a1u11MLLyuBUrOiG3CrCZCGXqi6Fx3kcC_aHsgIcf8nkgPDAQA14As_IPnSVWUQesz3RSCRRu-4TQnnsE-Waeh6wdWGtG8_Tbu2GVVsT9sQ1RzCSOT-H55m5JEiChIncceLQOi47g5gCEO56BGmn3tzZbQ%3D "Bobby Jindal on ")
Here's a great quote from the interview: _"Many people want to give the W.H.O. all kinds of powers and authorities. They want to give them the power if there is a pandemic. They want to give them the power to declare public health emergencies. Some want to give them the power—and get this—to, quote, ‘redistribute more equitably’ vaccines, medicines, protective gear across different countries, across different national lines.

That’s ridiculous. Of course, every country should strive to take care of their people first. We should never give up our sovereignty to some unelected international body, some group of United Nations bureaucrats, W.H.O. bureaucrats."_
---
God Bless, Bobby
---
|
---

---

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Humbly asking you to personally endorse Ilhan Omar today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)

Friend — We were so proud to reelect Ilhan last November with the tireless help of supporters like you.
But politics moves fast, which means we have to start rebuilding this campaign and this movement to be ready for what’s ahead.
Not only are we months into a chaotic second Trump term, but we are already seeing the far-right’s strategy for 2026 come into shape.
So, with many important fights ahead, [**we’re asking you to take 60 seconds and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-personal-endorse/?source=em250602-1-150&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-personal-endorse/?source=em250602-1-150&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)**
Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from tackling the climate crisis, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy.
She has been a leader in taking the fight to Trump and Elon Musk, because she understands that now is the time for Democrats to do everything we can to push back — not lay down and let Trump tear up the Constitution and steal from the working class.
But when it comes to these big challenges, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future.
**[So please: Add your name today and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she fights for us in Congress. Help us show the size and strength of this incredible movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-personal-endorse/?source=em250602-1-150&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-personal-endorse/?source=em250602-1-150&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1658_791427_MBrpFg&akid=1658%2E791427%2EMBrpFg)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Sean Feucht
subject: THIS FRIDAY: Celebrating 5 Years of Revival!!
body:
We’re celebrating 5 YEARS of Let Us Worship—will you stand with us?| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=39d4221c4e7e4aee910833dfbd853f3f&_e=dlG87Ub-Lk7gmfdBlKfamZYFDAIRhoCskjQx2ZFa7AQ-G2o1P77JFKZW3yaIa8UCfb2eCQwZHM-gjGOIYKT8bV1CzKl-Tju7dE3BerjYDqcHM87iTF8n0F3yOmM91YzeaB2nafRZqhzzqIOgaSnrilq7n9OzmwAfH1yhFaMpCRufwWoWnuVjUAALEUWX_Usksfavm5VsbwCw0Mre17Z3_1tb2S5xXWy4ndbYssBp0HLhQJOaT151FiTuEZs2lbhkLE29UcislnjNiFOcjq6iZvevk7BKaes_wuy5syRetZnwXiLUPIgAYXQSqL_deMOr)
---
Dear Peter,
---
At the height of the COVID pandemic, we heard from the Lord and stepped out in faith. Believers gathered to march and worship on the Golden Gate Bridge and declare that **Jesus Christ is Lord!** It's hard to believe that was _FIVE _years ago! What many people believed would be a season of darkness and death, God was calling to be a season of revival and light. What they thought would be just a moment, turned into a **movement**! And this Friday night, we are celebrating 5 years of that movement! This Friday, **June 6th at 7PM, **we’re gathering on the rooftop of **Fearless Church LA** to celebrate **FIVE YEARS** of _ revivals, salvations, baptisms, and bold worship across America._ **But we’re not done. Not even close.** We believe God is just getting started—and this next season could be the most powerful yet. But we _can’t_ do it without you. _**WATCH THE 5 YEAR CELEBRATION PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---

We noticed you haven't yet read Laura Ingraham's CHILLING WARNING to Conservatives. We know you're busy and it's totally possible you simply missed it. But what happens after you read her message could change EVERYTHING!
Now that we have your attention, we're pleading with you:

Patriot, In November, the American people elected President Trump to secure the border by building the wall, cracking down on crime with LAW and ORDER, and ENDING SANCTUARY CITIES ONCE AND FOR ALL. And the stats in just his first 125 days are already MIND-BOGGLING.
---
* Migrant border crossings are down nearly 100% - March of this year saw less than _7,200_ border encounters
* Fentanyl traffic dropped _54%_
* Over _135,000_ illegals have been deported - THOUSANDS of which are CONFIRMED gang members. Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street - you name it

---
While we continue to work on getting these criminals off of our streets here in our own country, we’ve got to turn our attention to cracking down on sanctuary cities! **[AMERICANS, NOT ILLEGALS, DESERVE SANCTUARY!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkD-PnDAUxD-N6ViZZwO-giJ3G6LkpFNSJZcGee0HOMJ_zjaL9ttHkNXWaWd-9swbacNixltH2mcCMBudCABhnwjAx_tm4_rHvn4pr9-_0fKjebP17sLLHb3CA3ZKss-_vv74_fri0_Pbz1W_h-1aPfB8C_iA76EntNIsu9qeC92xUVNeYFe1XAghGg7F3AnOBEWNqm5arevLONbNE-e1gAunnEFhOqBQ04ZCJYBTekKtL-ypoqMWFVABhNMj5yQtRqNklfImY_TenpS3xdLNOYd0FOsJ9AnVGvG0GRdR7wSBfsZlGU3EMkhFoEenk3QqrzLelMkGU5p9zKU1Tl_8NC3GTSXa8nhLWL9mOyS_RoWEnUP0KaDKxk0Emt2yqM1qCTvPsrwvcugZ464CbWg9bLG6y0raIM3kDgtqWjM6IKUVf2rLeRz-p9ywN_v3mXcZXSbsfEhxPz7u1dg5xxUJNNLm4JPJxh-JRex02MyymNS0hNPpmHYf8trB3wAAAP__4gK-QA)**
---
[ **DEMAND AN END TO SANCTUARY CITIES** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkD-PnDAUxD-N6ViZZwO-giJ3G6LkpFNSJZcGee0HOMJ_zjaL9ttHkNXWaWd-9swbacNixltH2mcCMBudCABhnwjAx_tm4_rHvn4pr9-_0fKjebP17sLLHb3CA3ZKss-_vv74_fri0_Pbz1W_h-1aPfB8C_iA76EntNIsu9qeC92xUVNeYFe1XAghGg7F3AnOBEWNqm5arevLONbNE-e1gAunnEFhOqBQ04ZCJYBTekKtL-ypoqMWFVABhNMj5yQtRqNklfImY_TenpS3xdLNOYd0FOsJ9AnVGvG0GRdR7wSBfsZlGU3EMkhFoEenk3QqrzLelMkGU5p9zKU1Tl_8NC3GTSXa8nhLWL9mOyS_RoWEnUP0KaDKxk0Emt2yqM1qCTvPsrwvcugZ464CbWg9bLG6y0raIM3kDgtqWjM6IKUVf2rLeRz-p9ywN_v3mXcZXSbsfEhxPz7u1dg5xxUJNNLm4JPJxh-JRex02MyymNS0hNPpmHYf8trB3wAAAP__4gK-QA)
---
So places like New York City, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Chicago, and Washington D.C., better watch out... Because we are going to take away your federal funding! Patriot, just watch how fast those places are going to bend and break when we take away their money. [**Will you stand with pro-Trump Republicans in helping to crack down on sanctuary cities by chipping in a few dollars today?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkD-PnDAUxD-N6ViZZwO-giJ3G6LkpFNSJZcGee0HOMJ_zjaL9ttHkNXWaWd-9swbacNixltH2mcCMBudCABhnwjAx_tm4_rHvn4pr9-_0fKjebP17sLLHb3CA3ZKss-_vv74_fri0_Pbz1W_h-1aPfB8C_iA76EntNIsu9qeC92xUVNeYFe1XAghGg7F3AnOBEWNqm5arevLONbNE-e1gAunnEFhOqBQ04ZCJYBTekKtL-ypoqMWFVABhNMj5yQtRqNklfImY_TenpS3xdLNOYd0FOsJ9AnVGvG0GRdR7wSBfsZlGU3EMkhFoEenk3QqrzLelMkGU5p9zKU1Tl_8NC3GTSXa8nhLWL9mOyS_RoWEnUP0KaDKxk0Emt2yqM1qCTvPsrwvcugZ464CbWg9bLG6y0raIM3kDgtqWjM6IKUVf2rLeRz-p9ywN_v3mXcZXSbsfEhxPz7u1dg5xxUJNNLm4JPJxh-JRex02MyymNS0hNPpmHYf8trB3wAAAP__4gK-QA) [**_Even just $10 or $15 can go a long way._**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkD-PnDAUxD-N6ViZZwO-giJ3G6LkpFNSJZcGee0HOMJ_zjaL9ttHkNXWaWd-9swbacNixltH2mcCMBudCABhnwjAx_tm4_rHvn4pr9-_0fKjebP17sLLHb3CA3ZKss-_vv74_fri0_Pbz1W_h-1aPfB8C_iA76EntNIsu9qeC92xUVNeYFe1XAghGg7F3AnOBEWNqm5arevLONbNE-e1gAunnEFhOqBQ04ZCJYBTekKtL-ypoqMWFVABhNMj5yQtRqNklfImY_TenpS3xdLNOYd0FOsJ9AnVGvG0GRdR7wSBfsZlGU3EMkhFoEenk3QqrzLelMkGU5p9zKU1Tl_8NC3GTSXa8nhLWL9mOyS_RoWEnUP0KaDKxk0Emt2yqM1qCTvPsrwvcugZ464CbWg9bLG6y0raIM3kDgtqWjM6IKUVf2rLeRz-p9ywN_v3mXcZXSbsfEhxPz7u1dg5xxUJNNLm4JPJxh-JRex02MyymNS0hNPpmHYf8trB3wAAAP__4gK-QA)

Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street - you name it While we continue to work on getting these criminals off of our streets here in our own country, we’ve got to turn our attention to cracking down on sanctuary cities! So places like New York City, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Chicago, and Washington D.C., better watch out... Because we are going to take away your federal funding! Patriot, just watch how fast those places are going to bend and break when we take away their money. Paid for by Hellfire PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: And this is who they call a “moderate.”

body:
As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyORqVCTwfcykw5tm6B61IrGHL1iGGM9elhArMhAQ5kQPrYgAL-LAEYeGhFsnzDqxdEeNp7hXnIs0d-B8L1TtbyvJHCzNKBvgR6iDgOOGDvuWxSTXnhdzu4ISyNIx3SLYdghdV2Jke4MIAY0-t_esIy3w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOOmEoDLHaZuG5B32gARQ1KpRSnxkBZRZ6s50yXjzCdocqFvYv9bSFcjylXn4KGcDLKnFgSQvIlyimQP3oH4YjYxLHhohbrJTts1WvdXLTFOZFdYpmsurCdVadHOVfbKPdbOHK7ycaVREXNVU7GINpVg%3D%3D)**

[**SEND ADAM TO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyO6YJ4dynRFvPH9P_fBRjcumhu-IvrS3ffOv0BTXU63gYRE87PNzUbOWMVqF5Fyz94gqVI6zWUE6t9kEymlBpmviOrox-n9BLpw-d52rR0UFY37Mw1xzX7qkNiH3jN-lwrFxES9Pgx11_sC404PfDf8Q%3D%3D) **_
_**
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOsQhOIGG4fj6d_xeemVu1x5HfXXP6645VdZ0to34u4f3aenZqj20iSz0SBH8h4CNJgqYNpCBQotrx5KqYQQ00FuMG8NZtsNPF9Fc1cfqD_ZiABRqMzuI8RKwzNYg2VpfUr_pfwzS0nenneKjc6ZgL4Q%3D%3D)

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOFPIccrtey-oUOon-avYq-yuGkfRKvz8BnbndHbjiRIZ1hq8l5PzbilzoToXcNPq2J0IzgBM7AEUcfqCzbLA3TYg1rtnyxQfP-9xHFyQlJ38_Wg3mnPzAxwG0TQpQYBPr8gx8lphBkKdrxCIhjxc-FQ%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOtSg0GXBqqT9hvYhBXDXZzkcVsNCHscMAsT6aL5EQG-k5JAKFZ10JQn46_aHukU8Lxv1LxKVOCumBiPaRIh3kHC9QPPhVJ0ZKAFHS7HaXWTV8Rr7mrlwgD-Hlng1CLXsawst9FhbYp2bdPmP7KlOxPw%3D%3D)
Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOoLV0rBX85PRao4cEc7xK0qJvMjSqbWQrZGsyUmKc6qzNdyHjl233HB7TNe8qIIZm1wziGYnJlCdq1UxSXdgjbzrCLcuJhHPzBLexyqiHIfR90rsZz1vUZTLVk1KnRF4gd7jx97fj1yWLFYtJtinENQ%3D%3D)
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c8f4b850d9e6456785bf1910d916f49c&_e=P9F2OaLE4RMmEn65_9kPNSkbaoKsEqwROaRBogtrdry5POgqyUD7OzT2hwMXOYKsaMbho6Q44uM4NBC42fYZ-GMtBMrMKeS2gNQ86NRolTBdADauzpV56t2bG-RhOGxIvIGZ62UExKHkMrU-HP441ij1f6KqQlg5Xwkwaxmykqkmcl1FHE5rfCMMK7DQdROatRy8a7_7OkYnGRG_q1lqL9D9UD_jxxCOGglPIfYn-SWNonVEOnOPGK31h-dgNoyOX-JrcMSAtGfYHhhM3viUvH1sbw-Rr4iGAEE9ehQRIut62b_ZZZOMwRFt6_x7vOaAkQqlwSkIIf4L6CRy3M-JU1LH42X8jqHWiVKaDg4JZKqodKWAuSbjaOpqOAXOD_kevuM4WB7euDN17d6wxyB5ig%3D%3D)

Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: What GOP Iowa Senator Joni Ernst told her constituents re: Medicaid cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Taking back the Senate in 2026 will depend on competing in places like Iowa.
#
**_“Well, we all are going to die.”_**
Peter — that’s a REAL quote from Joni Ernst — the GOP U.S. Senator currently up for re-election in Iowa — after she was confronted by constituents during a town hall about GOP cuts to Medicaid.
In a moment, we’re going to ask you to **[help defeat Joni Ernst next year by splitting a donation between our movement and Iowa’s Democratic U.S. Senate Nominee Fund.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89421?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) But first, let’s break down what happened:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89421?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ)
Right now, the U.S. Senate is considering the so-called “big beautiful” tax bill that passed through the House last month. It’s a bill that would rip away critical healthcare and food assistance from millions of Americans while padding the pockets of billionaire elites.
At the town hall Joni Ernst held in rural Iowa last week, her constituents confronted her about the expected cuts to Medicaid. They rightly told her that people could die.
That’s when she said it — _“Well, we all are going to die”_ — as if the possibility of everyday people losing health coverage and dying was simply inevitable.
Newsflash: It’s not!
**One of the best ways you can help defeat Joni Ernst next year is by giving today to Iowa’s Democratic U.S. Senate Nominee Fund.** This is a fund that will become immediately available to Iowa’s 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate nominee after they win the primary election — and it will play a big role in making sure their campaign has the resources to get their message in front of voters in the moments it matters most.
Taking back the Senate in 2026 will depend on competing in places like Iowa and winning races like this one. Your support for the eventual Democratic nominee today could play a big role in making that happen. That’s why we’re urgently asking:
**[Peter, will you please help defeat Joni Ernst and take back the Senate in 2026 by splitting a donation of $10 or more between our movement and Iowa’s Democratic U.S. Senate Nominee Fund today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89421?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89422?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89421?refcode=em20250602-8982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8982%2E614464%2Elm3OfQ)

With so much on the line this cycle, this is a moment we absolutely cannot let go to waste. We need to make sure every voter in Iowa knows who Joni Ernst is really fighting for. And that will only be possible with your help.
Thank you in advance,
Heartland Patriots HQ

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Dictatorship? DENIED.
body:
When it comes to the federal government, it doesn’t work like that. We have a judicial system and legal processes for a reason, and you don’t just get to ignore it because of how you “feel.” | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtpCEKrKKc4fCAs0YeGp8J06YvFgt9uJH-fFdEfPG5bZcJG1qf1MuvNtW7Olpy-lZkl7PX0uUiZaRGMXelHxLp0mR4o1uEtd7ar7LUKfTTOjoWS0aAVmY3w8x3JZ7UVlqB6TnyTcl7SXq_vbSNry8EZWtOzL3tvtNxzc58o2qObrJxc9wG9rAYA7UnEzXZvSkOrw-NtPUQ9v-D-r3k-VE0MOVmk_tIcvqrcdpcrIUBaxoZTAbNU61ozJWVMN36uc5RHmDrWX8truuCC4D6U5D7WVoD5w5eXr4hXk10t4g7yeDj2sz0axemiaMX2x8iFq2s/4h0/e7Yhe36rS0e2_bYtExCQ9g/h0/h001.HRdXba_nNlGmG2xf7dV0RfgNsEj-AYB8yQ8CKKYYvWs)
---
Peter, Y'all, thank god for the courts. **They just stopped Trump from dismantling the Department of Education.** Newsflash, MAGA: you don't get to gut public education without Congress. Thousands of workers? **Saved.**
Public education? **Protected.**
Dictatorship? **Denied.**

I'll be blunt: **At this point, the Republicans are the party of feelings over facts.** Whatever they feel, is what they go with -- regardless of what the law says or whether or not there's any supporting evidence. When it comes to the federal government, it doesn't work like that. **We have a judicial system and legal processes for a reason, and you don 't just get to ignore it because of how you "feel."** But the Republican majorities in Congress will never stand up to Trump like that -- so it's time we elect people who will. That's what I'm fighting to do each and every day from now until Election Day -- and I need your help like never before. **[If you're committed to replacing the MAGA House Majority with strong House Democrats and protecting our courts, join me in the fight by chipping in $10, $25 or more, split with Defend Our Courts. We can't do this without you and we can't afford anyone on the sidelines.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtpCEKrKKc4fCAs0YeGp8J06YvFgt9uJH-fFdEfPG5bZcJG1qf1MuvNtW7Olpy-lZn4Y9j91VTq1D_KF13gsARVeRybZAFGm28ivZEv56p0etjmfO6Eh1xj-ImAcfVWn4jTCRcuB2QjlbwmNBcPCQjCWftPOxSX3c2ftrFhPVhH946E3Hd4_G--I62bknkJuH4sscZ31xH0Lzu1cx-N4mg2QJ-oxPTJEhqpi0fbnbi9SXpgMtlkMzumOt3SpgutHdrA8SIqRx-ToGl8njUaT_r1_RZQdtpDAvt_EvDtTAqivOvBlwUq56qvJ3S-jtK4alg/4h0/e7Yhe36rS0e2_bYtExCQ9g/h2/h001.XTT9iXSTrfj-q1SsbQO3_9-H3bl4uZF5M7V6PHCrbPA)**

clean_body: When it comes to the federal government, it doesn’t work like that. We have a judicial system and legal processes for a reason, and you don’t just get to ignore it because of how you “feel.” | | Peter, Y'all, thank god for the courts. They just stopped Trump from dismantling the Department of Education. Newsflash, MAGA: you don't get to gut public education without Congress. Thousands of workers? Saved. Public education? Protected. Dictatorship? Denied. | I'll be blunt: At this point, the Republicans are the party of feelings over facts. Whatever they feel, is what they go with -- regardless of what the law says or whether or not there's any supporting evidence. When it comes to the federal government, it doesn't work like that. We have a judicial system and legal processes for a reason, and you don 't just get to ignore it because of how you "feel." But the Republican majorities in Congress will never stand up to Trump like that -- so it's time we elect people who will. That's what I'm fighting to do each and every day from now until Election Day -- and I need your help like never before. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Jasmine | | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. name: Tyler Kistner
subject: My Next Mission
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SKOL PAC
body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Tyler Kistner, and I’m running for United States Congress
in Minnesota’s 2nd district to support President Trump’s America
First agenda.

As a Marine veteran I know what it means to put America first. From
the battlefield to Minnesota, I’ve spent my life serving this great
nation. It’s time Washington put America First and not special
interests.

This is the best time since 2016 to flip this seat from the Democrats.
Tim Walz, Hakeem Jeffries and Ilhan Omar know this, and they are going
to spend millions to protect it.

This is why I’m reaching out to you today. Will you join my campaign
to support President Trump and the American First agenda in Congress.

JOIN MY CAMPAIGN!
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

LET ME INTRODUCE MYSELF

#
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m a Minnesotan, born and raised in Prior Lake. I married my high
school sweetheart, Marie, and went to college at the University of
Minnesota.

After graduating I served our great nation in the Marine Special
Forces leading missions and managing over $100 million in assets.
After 10 years of active duty, I knew I wanted to return home and
became a reservist to raise my two children Elodie and Gabriel here in
Minnesota.

Just like I have done all my life, I’M STEPPING UP TO SERVE MY
COUNTY.

I’m running for Congress because Minnesota and America need strong
servant leadership again. I have served you in the battlefield and now
I need your help to serve you in the halls of Congress. Which is why
I’m hoping you will chip in $26 to send this Marine Raider to
Congress.
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

PRESIDENT TRUMP NEEDS REINFORCEMENTS TO HELP PASS HIS AMERICA FIRST
AGENDA IN CONGRESS.

President Trump needs fighters like me to pass his agenda. Let me be
honest with you President Trump will have a two-year term instead of a
four-year term if the any of the Democrats I’m running against win.

You remember what happened after we lost the house in 2018 right? The
Democrats turned the rest of President Trump’s term into a circus

You and I can’t let this happen again.

Democrats like AOC have already raised over 9 MILLION this year to
elect more radical democrats like her and to destroy America First
candidates like me that will stand with President Trump.

I would be honored if you could send my campaign a donation. Even a
small contribution like $5, $10, or $26 will help my campaign get off
the ground.
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

DONATE TODAY!
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Semper Fi,

[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Tyler Kistner

America First Candidate for MN-02

P.S. I have faced tough battles before, but I need your help to win
this one. Chip in now to send this Marine to Congress
[https://secure.winred.com/tylerkistner/wmac0b10d808b4aa?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250530_BDG_TKMN_Announcement_BDG_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

# [https://www.facebook.com/kistnerforcongress]
# [https://x.com/KistnerCongress]
# [https://www.instagram.com/tylerkistnermn]

PAID FOR BY SKOL PAC

14870 Granada Ave, #1035
Apple Valley, MN 55124

_Use of military rank, job titles, or photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or the Marine Corps._

[] Semper Fi, [] Tyler Kistner America First Candidate for MN-02 P.S. I have faced tough battles before, but I need your help to win this one. | | Patriot, I've always promised to shoot straight with you. When our Party is winning, I'll be the first to tell you it's well deserved. But when we're _LOSING_ , I'm not going to sugarcoat it. And right now, federal reports just dropped that show the Democrats are badly BEATING us in one specific area. Frankly, this has never happened in recent history... **_The Democrats - the party of out-of-touch Hollywood elites, mega-donors like George Soros, and liberal special interests - are OUTRAISING us among grassroots donors!_** Look, I understand it's easy to feel the fight is over after our resounding victory last November. I wish that were so, Patriot . But the truth is, this fight is far from over, and the Democrats have only doubled down. _We simply can 't afford to have YOU on the sidelines._ The Left has used lawfare and judicial activism to stall President Trump's agenda at every turn. _And their final plot?**IMPEACH AND CONVICT.**_ Make no mistake, the Democrats will use their newly acquired war chest to FLIP the President's congressional majorities. And at that point, there will be NOTHING left to stop them from their one and only goal: unjustly removing our President from office. clean_body: I wish I didn’t have to tell you this, but I think you need to hear it all the same. I wish I didn’t have to tell you this, but I think you need to hear it all the same. | | | | | Patriot, I've always promised to shoot straight with you. When our Party is winning, I'll be the first to tell you it's well deserved. But when we're LOSING , I'm not going to sugarcoat it. And right now, federal reports just dropped that show the Democrats are badly BEATING us in one specific area. Frankly, this has never happened in recent history... The Democrats - the party of out-of-touch Hollywood elites, mega-donors like George Soros, and liberal special interests - are OUTRAISING us among grassroots donors! Look, I understand it's easy to feel the fight is over after our resounding victory last November. I wish that were so, Patriot . But the truth is, this fight is far from over, and the Democrats have only doubled down. We simply can 't afford to have YOU on the sidelines. The Left has used lawfare and judicial activism to stall President Trump's agenda at every turn. And their final plot?IMPEACH AND CONVICT. Make no mistake, the Democrats will use their newly acquired war chest to FLIP the President's congressional majorities. And at that point, there will be NOTHING left to stop them from their one and only goal: unjustly removing our President from office. But to fend off their attacks and multi-million dollar warchest, we're counting on YOU to join the fight. Remember, it 's never about the amount you give, but the sheer number of grassroots patriots standing with us. Together, thousands of grassroots donors like YOU can successfully FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' latest plot. Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | | id: 2024-08-16-13:12:08:136t

name: Chris Pappas
subject: The spirit of Pride
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’ve come so far since I was a kid, but it wasn’t always easy.

**I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** Sharice Davids said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride. Growing up in New Hampshire, I often wondered if there would be a place for me here — if I’d be able to live openly and authentically in the state I love. I certainly never imagined I could one day be elected to public office as my authentic self. But after I finished college, I came home and ran for the state legislature because I wanted to give back to the community that had given me so much. **And somewhat to my surprise, not only did my community accept me, they gave me their trust and sent me to Concord to serve them in the legislature.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108851573/549214303/278514719?refcode=email_060225_davids-pappas-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYxYmUzNC1lNTNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fG1SSfmJhOXCEhIcraCi1QAYQWHvakFXnr3qCr_05nc=) _Celebrating with supporters on Election Night 2018_ I’ll never forget the first speech I made from the State House floor. At the time marriage equality was far from the law of the land, and the legislature was debating a bill that would have prohibited New Hampshire from recognizing same-sex marriages performed in other states. I urged my colleagues, Republicans and Democrats alike, to vote this bill down. I told them that it ran counter to the “Live Free or Die” spirit we’re so proud of in New Hampshire. And that we shouldn’t be legislating based on fear or hate or trying to punish people for who they love. Unfortunately the bill passed, and we lost that fight.**But we didn’t give up.** We persevered, and not long after we passed a new bill recognizing civil unions between same-sex partners. And a few years after that, New Hampshire became the first state in the nation to legalize marriage equality through legislative action. **Then in 2018 I was elected to Congress as New Hampshire’s first openly gay member** — part of a rainbow wave that ushered in the most pro-equality majority in congressional history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108851574/549214304/278514719?refcode=email_060225_davids-pappas-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYxYmUzNC1lNTNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fG1SSfmJhOXCEhIcraCi1QAYQWHvakFXnr3qCr_05nc=) _Delivering my victory speech on Election Night 2018_ **That’s the spirit of Pride.** It’s not just about celebrating — it’s about persevering in the face of what can seem like overwhelming odds and refusing to give up, even after a devastating loss. **And although we’ve come a long way since I was growing up, we have to keep persevering today.** Because right now anti-equality extremists are renewing their attacks on LGBTQ+ rights, targeting trans kids, banning books, and spreading fear to divide us. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate. New Hampshire needs a voice in Washington who will stand strong for equality, dignity, and freedom — a voice who will continue to uphold our state’s “Live Free or Die” motto. **I’ll never forget the trust my community has placed in me over the years, and I’ll _always_ keep up the fight to make sure every single person in New Hampshire and our country has the freedom to live openly, authentically, and with pride.** [_**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll split a donation to support my campaign and Sharice Davids today. New Hampshire is going to be one of the most closely-watched races in the country, and I’m counting on your help to win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108851575/549214305/278514719?refcode=email_060225_davids-pappas-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYxYmUzNC1lNTNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fG1SSfmJhOXCEhIcraCi1QAYQWHvakFXnr3qCr_05nc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108851576/549214306/278514719?refcode=email_060225_davids-pappas-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYxYmUzNC1lNTNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fG1SSfmJhOXCEhIcraCi1QAYQWHvakFXnr3qCr_05nc=)

---

In solidarity,
Chris Pappas
