**[JOIN US on June 3rd at 12PM ET with ECU President Tiffany Muller, U.S. Senator Jon Tester and Representative Jasmine Crockett for a Virtual Town Hall. ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61791?t=4&akid=23106%2E4449941%2EXRyQVh)**
The ECU Organizing Network arms supporters like you with the resources, support, and language you need to fight back today. **[Remember to sign up so you don’t miss any upcoming events.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60761?t=5&akid=23106%2E4449941%2EXRyQVh) **

Thank you and see you soon!

Emily
_National Organizing Director_

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: ICYMI: DNC Chair Ken Martin Lays Groundwork to Winning Back Red States With Crucial State Party Investments
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b000c5182d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
| | | | |
---
| | | **ICYMI: DNC Chair Ken Martin Lays Groundwork to Winning Back Red States With Crucial State Party Investments**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | In Arkansas, Utah, and Florida, DNC Chair Ken Martin is outlining and implementing his vision to build a strong Democratic Party operation that can mobilize voters and begin the necessary work to flip these states blue. As part of Chair Martin’s mission to “organize everywhere, win anywhere,” the DNC announced a historic investment in Democratic state parties, totaling $1 million a month, to turbocharge grassroots organizing, build infrastructure, and strengthen on-the-ground operations. With this investment, the DNC is laying the groundwork to ensure state Democrats, especially in red states and swing states, have the support they need to meet the moment and build critical infrastructure that will enable us to win elections nationwide for years to come.

**Take a look at some of the coverage below:**

_**In Arkansas:**_

[**Northwest Arkansas Democrat Gazette**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=482ceb5634&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: National Democrats’ chairman urges state parties to lead way in connecting with voters**
[Alex Thomas, 6/1/25]

“When Ken Martin ascended to the top position in the Democratic Party earlier this year, he brought with him this motif: organize everywhere to win anywhere.

“‘There's no such thing as a perpetual red state. There's no such thing as a perpetual blue state,’ he told the Arkansas Democrat-Gazette. ‘What our role is to do is to build the infrastructure to win the moment right now, but also to win the future.’ ...

“Martin has emphasized the importance of state parties in his new national party position. The Democratic National Committee and the Association of State Democratic Committees announced in April a revised State Partnership Program focused on providing state parties with a minimum of $17,500 each month. State Democratic parties in Republican-led states, such as Arkansas, will get an extra $5,000 per month. ...

“‘We've seen in areas of the country that are historically blue, because of the lack of investment over the years, we're losing vote share,’ Martin said. ‘We've seen in areas that are red that when you make investments, you can actually start to move the needle.’

“‘Arkansas is an emerging target for us,’ he added. ‘It's a future target for us, and we need to start making the investments right now.’

“Jannie Cotton, the Democratic Party of Arkansas' vice chair, said Martin's attention toward helping state parties is crucial for states like Arkansas that have lacked national engagement in statewide organization efforts, limiting state parties' potential.

“‘I think when someone understands the fight, they know how to equip,’ she said. ‘He's able to equip us with the things we've been needing for a long time.’ ...

“[Democratic Party of Arkansas Chair Grant] Tennille found guidance from Martin when the Arkansan took over the state party in October 2021. A new chair at the time, Tennille considered pursuing bankruptcy with the party holding thousands of dollars in debt and maxed-out credit cards, but Martin encouraged Tennille against this action.

“With Martin providing Tennille with mentorship, the Democratic Party of Arkansas reentered solid financial standing.

“Tennille, acknowledging Martin's background in Minnesota, said Martin's focus as national chair on helping state parties could translate to electoral improvements for Democrats in areas written off as unwinnable for the party.

“‘It's tough to raise money in Arkansas right now,’ he said. ‘Ken understands that, and he's really focused on getting us all the tools we need -- money, tech, any of it -- to really be able to run races we can be proud of and to support candidates that need to be supported.’”

[**Arkansas Advocate**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=81833c08e8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: State, national Democrats meet in Little Rock to sketch out party's future**[Sonny Albarado, 5/30/25]

“Ahead of a meeting of the Democratic National Committee’s Executive Committee in Little Rock on Friday, DNC chair Ken Martin said the national party is committing the largest financial assistance to state Democratic parties ever.

“‘The DNC will push out over a million dollars every month to the state parties,’ Martin said in an interview. That includes $22,500 a month to the Arkansas Democratic Party to help it mobilize its efforts to improve the party’s position in the Natural State, he said.

“‘Arkansas is one of the only states where we saw legislative gains (in 2024),’ he said. Democrats gained a single seat in the 100-member Arkansas House in the state’s only majority-Latino district last year.

“‘There’s real opportunity for us, but that means we have to take advantage of it. Arkansas is really an important part of the calculus of how we build our future,’ Martin said. ...

“He said he’s focused on rebuilding the party infrastructure, especially in Republican-controlled states like Arkansas. He noted that political power in the U.S. is shifting to the South, where six of the 10 fastest-growing states are.

“‘If we don’t lay down a foundation here, we won’t be prepared to meet that moment when it comes upon us. I don’t want to be caught flatfooted when the map shifts. If we do get caught flatfooted, we could be in a permanent minority for a long time.’”

[**Northwest Arkansas Democrat Gazette**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1a1f78082b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: Democrats converge in Little Rock as state, national parties chart course for future elections**[Alex Thomas, 5/29/25]

“The Association of State Democratic Committees started its spring meeting on Wednesday, nearly four months after Democrats elected Ken Martin as the new national chair. Martin served as chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party before taking the top Democratic National Committee role. ...

“‘I will always be honest with you, and I will always deliver on the promises that I make to actually build this party from the grassroots up,’ Martin said Thursday in an address to the association. ‘The most critical thing I can do is to raise resources and get those resources out to you so you guys can do the work of building this party in each of your states.’ ...

“Martin and Kleeb have encouraged an ‘organize everywhere’ approach in Democrats' handling of future election cycles. Under Martin's leadership, the Democratic National Committee is seeking to provide state Democratic parties with increased investments to win races. Democrats' updated state partnership program will result in each state party receiving $17,500 per month from the national party, and state parties in Republican-controlled states like Arkansas will get an additional $5,000 each month.

“Both Martin and Kleeb have argued the investment should result in state parties hiring additional staff and improving party infrastructure.”

_**In Utah:**_

[**Deseret News**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=863fd1dc14&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: Democratic Party Chair Ken Martin looks to turn red states like Utah blue.**[Lauren Irwin, 5/27/25]

“Sitting at a Salt Lake City restaurant on Tuesday, Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin said he came to the state because he believes it will one day be blue — despite his party’s struggle to win any statewide elections in Utah in recent years. ...

“A Minnesota native, Martin put it in hockey terms with a famous line from NHL Hall-of-Famer Wayne Gretzky: ‘You have to skate to where the puck will be, not where the puck is.’

“‘That’s what we’re trying to do with this new DNC, is to both win the moment right now but also win the future,’ Martin said. ...

“Under the DNC’s new State Partnership Program, the Utah Democratic Party, along with state parties in other red states, will receive $22,500 a month from the DNC.

“‘We know that with the investment of time, energy and money, a red state can become a purple state and then eventually a blue state,’ he said, later adding, ‘It’s not for charity’s sake, just to give money to the state party, it’s actually to help build the infrastructure we need to actually win elections and meet the moment.’ ...

“While Utah’s delegation in Washington is currently entirely Republican, Martin believes that can change, with effort.

“‘It doesn’t happen organically. You have to make some investments, you have to actually see a little bit of the future and be willing to take some risks,’ Martin said.”

[**Axios Salt Lake City**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=54bf0ff26b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: DNC launches longshot strategy to flip deep-red Utah**[Kim Bojórquez, 5/28/25]

“The Democratic National Committee is pouring more than $1 million into Utah to lay the groundwork to some day turn the state blue. ...

“Utah is among other GOP-controlled states where the DNC will invest $22,500 monthly in the state Democratic Party over four years through its new State Partnership Program.

“Martin said the funding will boost infrastructure for races from school board to the federal level. ...

“‘We have to actually build a party that's not just in seven battleground states,’ Martin told Axios during an interview in downtown Salt Lake City. ‘We have to build everywhere. There's no such thing as a perpetual red state.’

“‘Eventually, the state will turn blue. It's not going to happen overnight,’ he said, noting Colorado's decadeslong transition from a former Republican-leaning state to a blue state. ...

“Martin also sees an opening to connect with Latino Utahns, who comprise about 15% of the state population.

“‘When you think about the future voters of this state, the Latino community is really critical,’ he said. ‘Whoever is first to organize that community, especially younger Latino voters, is likely going to win the future.’ ...

“What's next: If the state gains congressional power and redraws districts, Martin sees Utah's shift to purple coming into view in as soon as five to 10 years.”

_**In Florida:**_

[**South Florida Sun Sentinel**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2aa242591f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: Broward Democrats urged to summon all their energy to combat Trump and look for 2026 wins. ‘This is not for the weak.’**[Anthony Man, 6/2/25]

“During the main speech of the night on Saturday, Democratic National Chair Ken Martin brought up the enormous advantage — 1.2 million — Republicans have over Democrats in registered voters in Florida. ...

“He and state Democratic Party Chair Nikki Fried urged county activists to begin engaging immediately with friends, coworkers, neighbors and fellow parishioners about what’s going on politically and not wait until 2026 to begin registering them to vote and getting signups to vote by mail — areas where Florida Democrats have fallen short as Republicans have built a massive, and effective, organization throughout the state.

“‘We cannot give up on any part of this country, including here in Florida,’ Martin said. ‘There’s an opportunity right now because what we’re seeing around the country is a huge backlash to what this administration is doing, the pain and the anguish that were inflicted upon the American people. There is a buyer’s remorse amongst independent voters and even some Republican voters who voted for Trump.’ ...

“Martin also said Democrats shouldn’t pull their punches when describing Trump administration policies. ...

“‘We have to be aggressive. You cannot worry about offending someone.’

“‘One of the reasons we’ve lost trust with so many people,’ he said, is that ‘sometimes Democrats get elected to office and they sit on their power. What good is power if you don’t use it to improve people’s lives?’

“‘What pisses me off is when we have Democrats on the sidelines, not willing to stick their neck out, not willing to stand up right now. Not willing to roll up their sleeves and get in this fight and do what we need to, to not only resist but to organize, to mobilize, to give people a sense that we’re gonna fight for them and their families,’ Martin said. ‘This is the fight of our lives. This is not the time to sit on the sidelines.’ ...

“Crockett, Fried and Martin all said the road back to power for Democrats starts by focusing on lower-profile, so-called down-ballot offices for things like school board and city commission seats.”
---
| ###
---
|
---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I didn’t run to make history, I ran to make a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Let’s recommit ourselves to working towards the day when all LGBTQ+ people can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4741%2E35263%2EhWOOEH)
Happy Pride, Peter. 🏳️🌈 When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.

After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: **I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did.** [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-jun25.jyIeiz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4741%2E35263%2EhWOOEH) When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. But I didn’t run to make history, I ran to make a _difference_. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. **[I can’t keep up this work without your help. Will you help me continue to make a difference by pitching in a grassroots donation today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4741%2E35263%2EhWOOEH)** | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-jun25.BSYi_x&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4741%2E35263%2EhWOOEH)
---
With Trump back in the White House, the LGBTQ+ community is facing an onslaught of concerning attacks. To date, this administration has already launched **261 attacks on LGBTQ+ people.**
From pulling over $800 million in research on LGBTQ+ health care, to targeting universities that refuse to discriminate against transgender athletes, to scrubbing mere mentions of the word “gay” from federal websites — these attacks are meant to intimidate a community that’s only asked for true equality.
As this administration pulls every lever to undo the progress we’ve made toward equality, I’ll **never** stop fighting to create a more accepting and equal country that lives up to the ideals of our nation.
It’s going to take all of us to counter these extreme attacks so everyone grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred and division — are American values.
**[This Pride Month, I’m hoping you’ll support this important work by chipping in to my fight for a more equal future, and to help me support democratic candidates who will do the same.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4741%2E35263%2EhWOOEH)**

clean_body: | Let’s recommit ourselves to working towards the day when all LGBTQ+ people can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. Happy Pride, Peter. 🏳️🌈 When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did. When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. But I didn’t run to make history, I ran to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. | With Trump back in the White House, the LGBTQ+ community is facing an onslaught of concerning attacks. To date, this administration has already launched 261 attacks on LGBTQ+ people. From pulling over $800 million in research on LGBTQ+ health care, to targeting universities that refuse to discriminate against transgender athletes, to scrubbing mere mentions of the word “gay” from federal websites — these attacks are meant to intimidate a community that’s only asked for true equality. As this administration pulls every lever to undo the progress we’ve made toward equality, I’ll never stop fighting to create a more accepting and equal country that lives up to the ideals of our nation. It’s going to take all of us to counter these extreme attacks so everyone grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred and division — are American values. name: Dan Goldman
subject: New York Republicans chose Trump over their constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Yesterday, I held a rally in Staten Island outside Rep. Nicole Malliotakis’ district office to urge her and her Republican colleagues to reverse course, save Medicaid for the 8 million Americans — and 52,000 of her own constituents — who will lose it if the GOP billionaire bill becomes law. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108852261/549216497/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzQ1NDVmNS1lNzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gjwgNGV0tYdWXleXglX4kTeQ4iCxHF6P0PyLd13Lf3I=) After insisting she wouldn't cut Medicaid, Rep. Malliotakis yet again caved to Donald Trump and sold out her constituents to cut taxes for billionaires. **Do not fall for their lies, Peter**. They are not cutting waste, fraud, and abuse. They are not just firing staff. And illegal immigrants already cannot enroll in federal Medicaid. Staten Island is a vibrant, diverse borough that is home to countless union members, teachers, police and fire department employees, and health care professionals. Rep. Malliotakis just voted to take away health care, food benefits, childcare, and other vital programs from her own constituents, which will also jack up prices of everything, especially health care. I am speaking out today and every single day to make sure that Nicole Malliotakis and every New York Republican know that we are not buying their lies. Nicole Malliotakis’ district office to urge her and her Republican colleagues to reverse course, save Medicaid for the 8 million Americans — and 52,000 of her own constituents — who will lose it if the GOP billionaire bill becomes law. = After insisting she wouldn't cut Medicaid, Rep. Malliotakis yet again caved to Donald Trump and sold out her constituents to cut taxes for billionaires. Do not fall for their lies, Peter. They are not cutting waste, fraud, and abuse. | | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6fb4fee5f8904a9d82504b22cf032278&_e=S7R_drMMDEJRDQkkhC1XdHzJMatyaNiLVuC3uaBnedx1N_MVWAsqD3Np4Ib-VX1MICMtdWWpIkjcIokI89dwOkcPDqza7PegcDISAxtmVWmeMhGcZit1lxrZecYzu1gwdYn4VuYGsYishtpLhLjJAsLOUoWZxczPcKn06J3CUu5hSsnB6dVv2gq0SvmSChWRKiGmz1rZFF2ddHRAX9Q0Aweowi9Z-YJvq5fqjx9tAsLNQEaOiZvxtaON6zZWeiINtHAPB9jDTTZ5zqmhxYsEzbv4fVf1jOa5p7vAJVWDyla8GFQFzM8tA_hNHo4tlOAzPOmN4V2AFYvoB5nCC9BgHIZh900ApyXUL5VBF-MDg5U%3D)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---

_Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6fb4fee5f8904a9d82504b22cf032278&_e=S7R_drMMDEJRDQkkhC1XdHzJMatyaNiLVuC3uaBnedx1N_MVWAsqD3Np4Ib-VX1MICMtdWWpIkjcIokI89dwOkcPDqza7PegcDISAxtmVWmeMhGcZit1lxrZecYzu1gwdYn4VuYGsYishtpLhLjJAsLOUoWZxczPcKn06J3CUu5hSsnB6dVv2gq0SvmSChWRKiGmz1rZFF2ddHRAX9Q0AxN70qLVycXBtAEqkUgaEwdQKvqF58d24K8sxMnH1A-as4kkjoYbisgCcDcbgWFCOI9r1In1ETcC0wk3tvlwbLdUVT1D-pOI-bSJ7RkLLp2Kh3hcO0l7TezsWf7vIvBJcZ56d0qcWGilRb0UdVM02dI%3D activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6fb4fee5f8904a9d82504b22cf032278&_e=S7R_drMMDEJRDQkkhC1XdHzJMatyaNiLVuC3uaBnedx1N_MVWAsqD3Np4Ib-VX1MICMtdWWpIkjcIokI89dwOkcPDqza7PegcDISAxtmVWmeMhGcZit1lxrZecYzu1gwdYn4VuYGsYishtpLhLjJAsLOUoWZxczPcKn06J3CUu5hSsnB6dVv2gq0SvmSChWRKiGmz1rZFF2ddHRAX9Q0A78kVR-gX9QOrGjdEhMXW5O7Epzo_LsjFCr5dqBnx0c7mA7MTotw6nHAtzLuSS9gFGd4X1mfwR6EdUHfAdtweoX1TrB_LQZmMtgL5CWVH1xCxrmHxAjpeKVW0uCisI-bC5PG9gFlFYWZpmORzIfvvfM%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=SUMMIT")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**

**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. clean_body: Take the Birthright Citizenship Survey| | | | | | | | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message:From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I'll be taking some time off
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In the middle of my campaign for Senate, my wife Sydney gave birth to our daughter, Isla. I took some time off the campaign trail then, because you never get these early moments back.
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Ruben.
I am writing to let you know that I am going to be taking some time off from the Senate soon.
To be clear, it's not a bad thing.
In the middle of my campaign for Senate, my wife Sydney gave birth to our daughter, Isla. I took some time off the campaign trail then, because you never get these early moments back. Now, Sydney and I are expecting our second child together. Just like last time, I am committed to being a father and a husband first in these first few weeks. I want to make the most of it.
Now, the timing is not ideal. This is an official FEC fundraising deadline month, right when I’ll be going on parental leave. But I am going to be there for my wife and our growing family.
I made that decision hoping you'd help me close the gap. That you'd replace the fundraising calls I can't make with donations made in response to emails like this one.
This is a magical time for my family, but it's also an important week for our campaign. And I am hoping you'll help.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5 to my campaign as we head into this official FEC deadline month? I need your help, especially now, to reach our goals while I'm with my family.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250602-1-160&t=1&akid=3882%2E734936%2ENZpifQ)

Now, the timing is not ideal. This is an official FEC fundraising deadline month, right when I’ll be going on parental leave. But I am going to be there for my wife and our growing family. I made that decision hoping you'd help me close the gap. That you'd replace the fundraising calls I can't make with donations made in response to emails like this one. This is a magical time for my family, but it's also an important week for our campaign. And I am hoping you'll help. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. Your support really means a lot to me. Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Maud Maron
subject: Defeat Alvin Bragg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.| | |
---

---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKHCPj9abDkbicId8ysGX_AaPNPewSPS0ml25F56xZsJ55OpuzI90JoXWOVZY_pJjr2YLdbFA_rud6dIaNCTdHeBvGxTEFCO1Cl8jMTtf5T5XSOMeH6yTbpkryidrBrHHrjuxdt5MBwRaBeFZ2akhLUVg%3D%3D)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKHt1y6_n_YXrmqgF25lb1_n3TebCwCq5-hyYC01u6-pD03a0ys431eX_U6idUr20TYeQ62tQboYXAFQ0tf3FadAhMZqOpiqa1rsSDv39CY29fYAJdHjOUwTeLTP7crTMk6QzCyRP4hp2LrCYnR6_NbUw%3D%3D) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKHYVO5JqQ1chaCNoKdnhhXN2KowvL6_2DrJbA39LEJ6XkPo92Ko-GhpScsPv8RhCKodAVOJywuEbBdRyGibGLUInxm-3L-mP9dhE1No6-j9j_nZbzbLw46r4DM649lPZdbMw9kRRIfRZ6pBeKWi3HP2A%3D%3D)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKHDUxowRPTETQr6K4N9t-i4Mis4fh5doB6wd6KOiTJGTA-2iiMIeYWmUMLHo6qO5qBEzUL99T4J_w4HXHiYz--LG9qSgYjwGSWfPBapob7oxfH8PAPO2R6seMKxBlRMdcq2WikOJfkWY7CZQcUtLPSQw%3D%3D)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKH4Ba6tkSJCsSNuHet_faNzfJ-H7hC5LXpp_sNZJ44ZbaqxP3SEm2npMpEN8PT6Tx3b2Xtw5xR-oF7gELkWta2l9rHzqJwU_E4NPlysKO9QTYTEt1rr-GUcFfMk_-TLHd22KZWpbFxe_8f7BibWNMUAA%3D%3D)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a2c657002f72488bba1d38735b61a11c&_e=zu-oznmMKCIwokvhYQPV85fR51BwTdZUq76MMfYyryM7dV4uugJWbPbItMT8AXANQlpqRXSJbJ3LFtsQdMBYM8MSxW681euIQx5B-TX9pCBAJaiaf3y4yjdsPxzPxb98uwn0mhqzYeWnXzk934RKKSGopwr9pknlF_tV18BSDzHTYIls2R8lrXbUCsCwTZ398pQw1RBo_bb-R7uD2uFK729cbr3E4wMJ5IkhnZsael9fUo41bVH8n5sHrtz5WxKHSDx1UvIrHbPfA5SPOxsHIOrSL2CZ2BSQGBC05HwJ0ibGdQSOFiGN5py4Pa8xmED5llIg8Xl8Cf_SpMgy2mjV8E5p3pdAkQcstdm7DhAvwIA6_7ma9duxcpTIL6DPky8Y3i1Evn2m3FwedIokW3uJkA%3D%3D)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274
---

# [When Strong Women Intimidate Weak Men](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165028462&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MDI4NDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDg4OTQ1MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1MTQ4NjUxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1ffxkf76CB0bQ8QWebAfkAFvlZrxXJR73Sq7vByjk_E)
### Greta Thunberg and Ms. Rachel are speaking up for Palestine, and weak men are responding by threatening violence
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165028462&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MDI4NDYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODg5NDUxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzUxNDg2NTEyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hJ25cAN7hhLmfHutPrDmydVdjcEwwLOuNsO0ZsNZqtw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/when-strong-women-intimidate-weak?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

While the world's most powerful institutions remain complicit in a genocide against Palestinians in Gaza, powerful women are rising up for justice--undaunted, unapologetic, and unbowed. Greta Thunberg and Ms. Rachel are showing the world what real courage and leadership looks like. Meanwhile, weak men are responding to these courageous women by threatening their livelihoods and their lives. It is imperative we call out this violence and stand up for justice. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wIGT_MnPdbbtOha8THFF3UEk-5fVR_yknlam_FPtrNU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165028462)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13989301-f481-4188-a64d-fbdff74dd664?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Greta Thunberg (top) speaking up for Palestine. Ms. Rachel (bottom) with a Palestinian girl named Rahaf from Gaza.
For the past 20 months Greta Thunberg has fearlessly spoken out against the genocide in Gaza. She has stood shoulder-to-shoulder with Palestinians, enduring smear campaigns and violent rhetoric. And now, she's on a flotilla en route to Gaza, risking her life to deliver aid and stand in solidarity with a besieged people. This isn't just activism--it's defiance in the face of brutality.
Ms. Rachel, a beloved children's content creator whose platform reaches hundreds of millions of families, could have stayed silent. She could've pretended it Gaza doesn't affect her and just played it safe for her personal brand and livelihood. Instead, she chose to speak up--to humanize Palestinian children, to call out injustice, and to embrace Palestinian children with open arms. As a result, she has been forced to endure an avalanche of harassment and hate. She's risking her career, her safety, and her livelihood because she knows that neutrality in the face of oppression is complicity.
What do these women get in return for their moral clarity and courage? Threats.
U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham--yes, an elected official--posted a veiled threat on social media about Greta's humanitarian voyage, writing: "Hope Greta and her friends can swim!" This isn't a joke. This is a U.S. Senator threatening a young woman for trying to deliver aid.
Israeli-based international human rights lawyer Arsen Ostrovsky described Thunberg as a "little Jihadi" and sneered that it would be "so sad if something were to happen to her flotilla." He later deleted his tweet. This isn't advocacy. It's incitement. And it's coming from someone who dares to call himself a human rights lawyer. As an _actual_ human rights lawyer myself--one who cares for and speaks up for _all_ humanity--I cannot express my disgust strongly enough at Ostrovsky's vile threat against Greta.
Then there's the corporate media. Instead of celebrating Ms. Rachel's bravery, The New York Times launched a hit piece against her, pushing baseless conspiracy theories that she was being "paid by Hamas." No evidence. No sources. Just vile propaganda designed to smear her reputation and silence her voice. It's not just bad journalism--it's cowardice in print.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wIGT_MnPdbbtOha8THFF3UEk-5fVR_yknlam_FPtrNU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165028462)
## We Must Stand Against These Threats
Let's be clear about what this is: it's not just threats against Greta and Ms. Rachel. It's a warning to all women: if you speak out against genocide, if you challenge injustice, we will come for you. It's a chilling effect. It's patriarchy wielding its power to silence truth. And we cannot let it stand.
Greta and Ms. Rachel have more courage than all the world's so-called leaders combined. They are the voice of conscience in a time of mass silence. They are the soul of our shared humanity in a time of unspeakable horror. And they deserve not only our applause--but our protection.
Their stories remind us that women are leading the moral fight for Gaza. And when powerful women rise, insecure men panic. That panic manifests as threats, smears, and violence. But we must not be deterred. This is not just about Gaza. This is not just about Greta or Ms. Rachel. This is about the world we are choosing to create. Are we building a world where speaking up for justice gets you killed, or one where silence is the real crime?
To those trying to smear and silence these amazing women--know this: we see you. And we stand with these amazing women, and against your injustice. My ask of everyone reading this is to take the simple action to support Greta. Support Ms. Rachel. Share their stories. Elevate their platforms. Let us do what is in our power to give those courageous women the support they need and deserve. And speak up--because there is nothing weak men fear more than courageous women who have won the hearts of the people.

Greta Thunberg and Ms. Rachel are speaking up for Palestine, and weak men are responding by threatening violence | | | Jun 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | While the world's most powerful institutions remain complicit in a genocide against Palestinians in Gaza, powerful women are rising up for justice--undaunted, unapologetic, and unbowed. Greta Thunberg and Ms. Rachel are showing the world what real courage and leadership looks like. Meanwhile, weak men are responding to these courageous women by threatening their livelihoods and their lives. It is imperative we call out this violence and stand up for justice. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Greta Thunberg (top) speaking up for Palestine. Ms. Rachel (bottom) with a Palestinian girl named Rahaf from Gaza. For the past 20 months Greta Thunberg has fearlessly spoken out against the genocide in Gaza. She has stood shoulder-to-shoulder with Palestinians, enduring smear campaigns and violent rhetoric. And now, she's on a flotilla en route to Gaza, risking her life to deliver aid and stand in solidarity with a besieged people. This isn't just activism--it's defiance in the face of brutality. Ms. Rachel, a beloved children's content creator whose platform reaches hundreds of millions of families, could have stayed silent. She could've pretended it Gaza doesn't affect her and just played it safe for her personal brand and livelihood. Instead, she chose to speak up--to humanize Palestinian children, to call out injustice, and to embrace Palestinian children with open arms. As a result, she has been forced to endure an avalanche of harassment and hate. She's risking her career, her safety, and her livelihood because she knows that neutrality in the face of oppression is complicity. What do these women get in return for their moral clarity and courage? Threats. U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham--yes, an elected official--posted a veiled threat on social media about Greta's humanitarian voyage, writing: "Hope Greta and her friends can swim!" This isn't a joke. This is a U.S. Senator threatening a young woman for trying to deliver aid. Israeli-based international human rights lawyer Arsen Ostrovsky described Thunberg as a "little Jihadi" and sneered that it would be "so sad if something were to happen to her flotilla." He later deleted his tweet. This isn't advocacy. It's incitement. And it's coming from someone who dares to call himself a human rights lawyer. As an actual human rights lawyer myself--one who cares for and speaks up for all humanity--I cannot express my disgust strongly enough at Ostrovsky's vile threat against Greta. Then there's the corporate media. Instead of celebrating Ms. Rachel's bravery, The New York Times launched a hit piece against her, pushing baseless conspiracy theories that she was being "paid by Hamas." No evidence. No sources. Just vile propaganda designed to smear her reputation and silence her voice. It's not just bad journalism--it's cowardice in print. We Must Stand Against These Threats Let's be clear about what this is: it's not just threats against Greta and Ms. Rachel. It's a warning to all women: if you speak out against genocide, if you challenge injustice, we will come for you. It's a chilling effect. It's patriarchy wielding its power to silence truth. And we cannot let it stand. Greta and Ms. Rachel have more courage than all the world's so-called leaders combined. They are the voice of conscience in a time of mass silence. They are the soul of our shared humanity in a time of unspeakable horror. And they deserve not only our applause--but our protection. Their stories remind us that women are leading the moral fight for Gaza. And when powerful women rise, insecure men panic. That panic manifests as threats, smears, and violence. But we must not be deterred. This is not just about Gaza. This is not just about Greta or Ms. Rachel. This is about the world we are choosing to create. Are we building a world where speaking up for justice gets you killed, or one where silence is the real crime? To those trying to smear and silence these amazing women--know this: we see you. And we stand with these amazing women, and against your injustice. My ask of everyone reading this is to take the simple action to support Greta. Support Ms. Rachel. Share their stories. Elevate their platforms. Let us do what is in our power to give those courageous women the support they need and deserve. And speak up--because there is nothing weak men fear more than courageous women who have won the hearts of the people. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is made possible by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Join us & subscribe to help advance the fight for human rights. ❤️ | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: U.S. Credit Downgrade: What Savers and Investors Should Know
body:
| Hi Peter, One of the world's top credit rating agencies just made a move no one wanted to see, and the financial media took notice. Last week, Moody's downgraded the U.S. from Aaa to Aa1.1 Their concerns? Rising debt, persistent deficits, and a lack of political will to change course. As you might have guessed, that triggered a wave of scary headlines. News outlets ran with bold claims. Pundits warned of economic doom. So should you panic, sell everything, and build a bunker? Not quite. Let's take a look at what this debt rating downgrade actually means... Think of credit ratings like a country's credit score. For years, the U.S. had a perfect 800. High income. Clean payment history. Strong reputation. But lately, it's like we've been racking up credit card debt. Income's still solid, but lenders are starting to raise their eyebrows. That's pretty much what happened here. While this downgrade isn't great news, it wasn't a total shock either. Moody's has been sounding the alarm for a while. Moreover, despite its growing tab, the U.S. still has a lot going for it. Its debt is backed by the deepest, most dynamic economy in the world. Its borrowing is backed by the most powerful military. And its financial system remains the global gold standard. To continue with our credit rating analogy, the U.S. just dropped from a 800 to maybe a 780. Still excellent. We're still one of the best borrowers in the world. But lenders are starting to watch a little more closely. The fundamentals are strong: steady income, unmatched global influence, and the ability to meet every payment. **This downgrade is a ding, not a disaster. And that seems to be how investors read the situation, too.** After a 300-point drop at the open, the Dow finished Monday's trading session higher.2 Bond yields, which initially spiked, eased back down by the afternoon.3 The U.S. dollar index ended the day basically unchanged. That said, it's not all just media drama. **This downgrade still matters.** How much the government pays to borrow money sets the benchmark for everyone. Higher yields can lead to higher mortgage rates, pricier car loans, and bigger credit card bills. If you're thinking about borrowing (or already are) this change could hit close to home. In other words, it's not just Wall Street feeling the impact. Rising rates touch wallets in places like Nashville, garages in Des Moines, and retirement plans in Phoenix. Think higher monthly payments, slower home sales, and tighter margins for growing businesses.4 For savers and income-focused investors, however, higher yields could be good news. If you've been sitting on cash or exploring fixed income, you could see more attractive bond opportunities, stronger CD rates, or better returns on money markets. That said, things could stay bumpy for a while. Credit downgrades don't shake the core strength of the U.S. economy, but they do stir uncertainty, and markets tend to wobble when interest rate stability feels shaky. Looking ahead, the pressure is still building. Lawmakers are debating new tax cuts and spending plans that could add to the deficit. The more the debt grows, the more we pay in interest. That could mean more downgrades down the road and even higher borrowing costs.
---
|
---
This also puts the Federal Reserve in a tough spot. Chair Jerome Powell is trying to fight inflation without crushing growth. Rate cuts might take longer. Swings in the market could stick around. Still, let's not get too carried away. This isn't the first credit rating agency to cut America's credit rating. S&P;, another major ratings agency, downgraded the U.S. in 2011.5 Fitch followed suit in 2023.6 Both caused short-term waves. But investors who stayed the course over the long haul saw positive results. The U.S. is still the anchor of the global financial system, even if the shine is a little dimmer today. In other words, this week's news doesn't mean the sky is falling. The U.S. still has a deep, dynamic economy and remains a global financial leader. Credit ratings shift, headlines come and go, but long-term planning is what really moves the needle. If your goals haven't changed, your strategy may not need to either. Stay focused. Stay steady. Stay invested in what matters. Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IkFwS21mUTZYbEhyQnB6MyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. If you're planning a big purchase, reviewing your debt, or just want to check how all this affects your portfolio, let's talk. These moments don't call for panic. But they do call for a plan. Know someone who's unsure how this downgrade affects them? Feel free to connect with us. I'm happy to help make sense of it.
---

Chart sources: Congressional Budget Office, 2025 [URL:[https://www.cbo.gov/system/files/2025-01/60870-Outlook-2025.pdf](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY2JvLmdvdlwvc3lzdGVtXC9maWxlc1wvMjAyNS0wMVwvNjA4NzAtT3V0bG9vay0yMDI1LnBkZiIsImhhc2giOiJBcEttZlE2WGxIckJwejMiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)]

1️⃣ **_Nevada:_ Democrats advance legislation to cap the cost of insulin **
The Nevada Assembly has advanced AB 555, legislation sponsored by Speaker Steve Yeager, to cap the cost of insulin at $35 for a 30-day supply for private insurance policyholders. [If passed, this bill will improve the lives and health of thousands of Nevadans → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3QvvOfZxHYj2X0BHwh4mrj1u93nNuHT1yvpYCSPyVQfHjwZjbKeG9UnRUXFIVG0IM5fnsgR7_V3z3QaofVzLBVbDdeXiQH2p3srgzjSF0mXJ5fbEhlfW01EAvpD4fZGL6Mj5unfKVi45yPRgmmgeI0ZldYiZZ5-SHJ9akN2SObJq3HZyxZqkcvvFn_W-b621PiieQ67kaVaQa-aWlTMNUw2nR5BB6hSb0onLAqE1rH85budq_tql4n_eP0PAy7blE8yFzlWeYEX55VB6BrFyyH0Qx5wxQzjEgMqyDfGVpq7gxk4MhdaaPw0wFgWrfF6oWGb41Oq6NqSU1xEy5OtM0JhH0Amd28AM9tU0Yrm44dTE3J3iMWML2n8Ekv4patb3NlJKGDZDU2qx-FqAL-fm4tXlaW_ORLvjEDPNVrfVz3b00fujORrj7Vz_b-_dKYHeLA5QMoCneL4Bi6_Ea61J-LueWPM0gUCCk7CCOO_HDnUwoOeG7uez9z5A37zB9YHmVY3GU80YYWxuhtMnHOCnQnKYdW1WI3L40zEUjxiq-uh0Kmvg6pij6BFrtK1ZwUeUPUz2XtY8yQYJthtbBQebhcN0t2DbgJyceXfxOwdyFhAdg6yic5u8Jt9Oj3sxNsj0pGj416hiUXXqMpwEmjPKczs/4h0/rvIdZgg8TKSDIjtzFqNGlw/h1/h001.T8A8LwCDwU2A1uWC2PgcSZGYX4vYlRKhNKiyxUUq1Os)
2️⃣ **_Missouri:_ State Supreme Court sides with GOP agenda and halts abortions **
The Missouri Supreme Court has halted abortions in the state, effectively overturning the will of voters who struck down an abortion ban last November. [This decision follows Republican legislators’ push to put abortion back on the ballot in 2026 → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMZ0ws1DfJmNfsubcOy4Lqn4a---ejTTKzXEzwM5o82uRU3cbuOu8SfA-OHqDrzTZ_Sq7MyM1foBBPBQd6dzOIWugIt8cFWC7jHJH2z_AbRVj4sck8uFl4zLcJqJuTrDK4kSD8OZZparx6smOeqMsCYn458I1mhhcGUiiM18yXVlZivr37k8CUpdabiRBzjtdnfwINsEEFSDxJV3bK13TWTrc0ZZMdj4P62hn1buqDYe48sLeDEYiQorTkm_GpOne54QL9e0QLaOiFTLklLKJFXyHrNNgE19ZmKRL84Kkhx7OR6d-Iko0wi1v8bnAecu1ea5RekMJ4r6GrhfUo0M0qLoF_potI4n5MB9FQyC_5-M_dXil-ND2l7T35Hyrjz99Bsq154kPhZSYyBicBNFi33-h9NB7wmAuwN8Rfg-fscrhr-UFkSyr0Lv_Wh9L041L4VxZBNu84_3NakKssrmPr20M9HKHONz333lTTaWGrT1Au-4EJkX1p12EwCI3au9oL1qeuoWT4Jrii_dJx8R117CuVn9c6-e9OtNQxBn6NfYu5fAq1rykPH4Qzk0UObzi_uPMJKzXjgPW8eBkim290xCSJTmEVKE4jXqkk0j-uBqvobeKjJddMUvEbg_BxygNiA/4h0/rvIdZgg8TKSDIjtzFqNGlw/h2/h001.-Y1WwVmZpQgZRrDpiZTAwtFy4kFHEvCOVnJ-wEgKKtQ)
3️⃣ **_Georgiai:_ State law forces brain-dead women to incubate a fetus **
After being declared brain dead, Adriana Smith, a 30-year-old nurse and mother, has been forced to remain on life support to serve as an incubator to sustain her 9-week-old fetus until delivery. [This cruel anti-abortion law has had devastating consequences for women in Georgia, and sets a dangerous precedent → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWvOZtoJ8meSwEepCDh3cD8IlM5rRnLAOq1oW2gRDoQgzrEW7VLXgOMSczCfjtGT7vyfp5L7EFg12e9H3KSUyUP1rCXQrY6TRWoSUXdwTp9VsTJb4Ii7wharWXJDPFfNpxMqp4U9KzfrFwQoCF8NcLrQ55qhfGzg-Nlr5ZuUVz2F0sSl3zB-hzyTnLXxDggY9hEDzbfjzO7vzjmvy6_b_lE59SOtoe3JPkPjarDb0spbf-PfcPnNOztfcHvLdVevFDn9hiiq3yvnsmP2_w-T1KwqMv5n1tgLF236Kk-T_y6BlwLaY_JDFSiwoNk7CwAWtDvx7ZFH2Eks0PBaKLJfSBoaa6A54pvM89SBLUjGf72pq5Rsn-OpOiguRUAk_1Sl8BZvPmKL4_Ohj3NWTae5PRkxN9E2nhhCg7y7K_Pf410Es96x90RJ3zFhROvNKT_73GkFg4CU2qj6uv90_OldFbw9z1HW0fOOPKy6DzhlIXZgpyIdbTT92scGIJwWZIUY_3wy8i3Pxq2QGl-XJvpdBfPoIKqfqLHvRsymHTcZ8KM3zxFzR21mjcbTe2Q9XU3pt6dDOJ_DRzHy0Dvd8HzJc9Y/4h0/rvIdZgg8TKSDIjtzFqNGlw/h3/h001.Jyd8jfSOp2_jF1IAZc7muE8FU_kdk8YbuGr-iROAG5M)
📖 **_Read:_ State Democrats Continue Show-Stopping Wins and Overperformances **
As Republicans force their backwards budget proposals through Congress, Democratic momentum in state legislatures is strengthening, showing the GOP that voters are watching. [Read more here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWz34niZGWk9MlD4HQtQ6r0uvnzbBaDTBRZg0TE78yAqkg28WhxVYCJC0NSFowDNuvzR0tMqDoAA_sMNJxUjNGJ0FZW9pX6bKPzRxpql-FIh4VMIUQXaVuzoiagO6Ea658PD5tWFuMCOwApzfI1EUwVhmtpRlgrEteQrigrFUFmwoVkmiONqLrsJYyiL1oTGYUamasPQMIZMRP9FY-TWUFuqf0y6qwo01bEAFYz0qdOuyN65ADwMe4seu_cWx_V5QQglzTnsaZve_SmJMTIEgx79JJeLimQbmjwEN3-OROVsdrU6A_kDZLylmxZkaCve04A_QzE8tK-UMqKWe500F_FDem4CMZWTIA-Q2gUolP_xdNdCHGw8UWaTqOM_Mrlkant-CyHsf1P3fULauXAtbsDuHON1cYz6PTF9WDF7NMhRJL5mZGg6Lvvujj4fQ0GQRiUDz5sXruBJmownSPM2i6BZ9aO5jbFrKXuzMcPoJv_4LttRuw8HaUYBffosK_vAppJZRL9EZ8PDliI2hlbZvM6w0eKlkYdR--VKAfN3xR9dQnDLKtQK0frNW9bUz4gPji-Ra9bSuCdB6xv1905H8CR-nLzuSex8DUAh2tmbz_4V5/4h0/rvIdZgg8TKSDIjtzFqNGlw/h4/h001.bS_hT5FpOBpkDqJRkW0q3la-Dj6PYMBFC_B7T6PGxgM)

clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, June 2nd, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Nevada: Democrats advance legislation to cap the cost of insulin The Nevada Assembly has advanced AB 555, legislation sponsored by Speaker Steve Yeager, to cap the cost of insulin at $35 for a 30-day supply for private insurance policyholders. 2️⃣ Missouri: State Supreme Court sides with GOP agenda and halts abortions The Missouri Supreme Court has halted abortions in the state, effectively overturning the will of voters who struck down an abortion ban last November. 3️⃣ Georgiai: State law forces brain-dead women to incubate a fetus After being declared brain dead, Adriana Smith, a 30-year-old nurse and mother, has been forced to remain on life support to serve as an incubator to sustain her 9-week-old fetus until delivery. 📖 Read: State Democrats Continue Show-Stopping Wins and Overperformances As Republicans force their backwards budget proposals through Congress, Democratic momentum in state legislatures is strengthening, showing the GOP that voters are watching. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. **_ICYMI_ \- Republican Senator justifies Medicaid cuts saying "Well, we are all going to die"** Yes, you read that right. Republican Senator Joni Ernst is using the most absurd reasoning to justify cruel cuts to Medicaid. In response to audience members letting her know that people will die from cuts to Medicaid, the Senator brushed it off and insulted everyone in the room with, “Well, we are all going to die.” Severe cuts will cost Georgians’ lives and drastically impact the well-being of folks in every corner of the country. From Governor Brian Kemp refusing to expand Medicaid and Trump loyalists all across the country, including Georgia Republicans, choosing to cut Medicaid, **we’re in trouble**. But here’s the good news: While Senator Ernst attacks Medicaid and downplays the loss of human life, we’re working hard to keep Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats BLUE and flip the Senate for Democrats. That’s why we need you to rush whatever you can to help us fight back! We can’t ignore this. [We’re calling on 5,000 Georgians to sound the alarm, speak out, and rush what you can right now! disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=94Q0nnR8U%2FuqLpbZqpGeD%2F7kF1ZGJDji%2B%2B8K9J7dANg2XDVp1wS5YteKZwzZtuLo8xqpjC7%2FaxRAxT91tknHQi5%2BVFAe8iSp3UoSEy3p8lMSlFAEM9zmP6NGG3jZ7IQbBe8MICg7e4SRPNX%2Bmwe5TSzGG9Z26%2FcKFioYdQrmQF4wdMy27oX%2B5hB%2BAxFpCG7O7LYTt47nXxU2glqaODWNvXa%2BifANuJfTcxnDRYxxbgly4S3L6EXUTXuf1DrE4JDWw7yaFp1vw5RZ0Y1xpOWvYIEygEa0Q5M8xMwrmU49vSAKxGIqPYtxbZjeFJFsV1lj%2Fvc7%2FM%2F9uacc1Ct%2FTvJ7CM1sCZwJw%2BHgOAXp3TKcQWr%2BggKNaksf0bNlCEr4C9dX%2FUc3d6rECThVG4Tzk6beb0ku%2BAfNndspUfX73H2LU%2Fs692nnRetzRG9xKK2l9Dvv)

| |
---
Peter,

This June, we celebrate Pride Month, a time to celebrate the progress we’ve made in securing people the right to love whoever they choose.

This Pride Month, I reaffirm my commitment to supporting the LGBTQ+ community in Rhode Island and across the country – and recommit to building a nation that is truly inclusive and welcoming, no matter who you are or who you love.

Across the country, LGBTQ+ Americans, especially young people, are increasingly under attack from harmful legislation. **We cannot afford to be silent or passive.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108853726/549221696/1586149540?refcode=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZDA3ODc3LWVlM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=THK6Rii-nxK_y50_P6McCubyaMr6Yg8Xl1S-Ck91ue8=) We’re almost one week out from one of the most competitive and consequential state legislative primaries in the country — and JanePAC is going all in to endorse two bold climate champions. **Ravi Bhalla** and **Katie Brennan** are running together on a progressive slate for the two Assembly seats for **New Jersey’s 32nd District** , representing Hoboken and parts of Jersey City. They’re rejecting fossil fuel money and pushing for the kind of climate leadership this moment demands. **[This is a competitive primary, and races like this can come down to just a handful of votes, so every bit of support from this grassroots movement truly makes a difference. Can you split a $20 donation to help power Ravi and Katie’s grassroots campaigns across the finish line on June 10th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108853727/549221697/1586149540?amount=20&refcode=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZDA3ODc3LWVlM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=THK6Rii-nxK_y50_P6McCubyaMr6Yg8Xl1S-Ck91ue8=)** | [**SPLIT A $20 DONATION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108853728/549221698/1586149540?amount=20&refcode=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZDA3ODc3LWVlM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=THK6Rii-nxK_y50_P6McCubyaMr6Yg8Xl1S-Ck91ue8=)
---
* * *
**Meet the candidates:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108853729/549221699/1586149540?refcode=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.a4d07877-ee3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZDA3ODc3LWVlM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=THK6Rii-nxK_y50_P6McCubyaMr6Yg8Xl1S-Ck91ue8=)
🌍 **Ravi Bhalla** is the mayor of Hoboken. Under his leadership, the city became the first in New Jersey to establish a Climate Action Department and the first to sue Big Oil for climate damages.
Ravi turned climate vision into action, building green parks and stormwater systems to reduce flooding and fighting back against new gas-fired power plants in the region. He’s spent his career standing up for working families, immigrant communities, and the right to a sustainable planet. As a civil rights attorney and former city councilor, he knows how to lead with policy and principle — grounded in community, powered by justice, and focused on impact.
He’s the kind of climate leader who _constantly_ shows up, speaks out, and _never_ backs down. Now, he’s running to bring that same fearless leadership to the State Assembly.
