clean_body: Help elect two climate champions who fight like it matters. | = We’re almost one week out from one of the most competitive and consequential state legislative primaries in the country — and JanePAC is going all in to endorse two bold climate champions. Ravi Bhalla and Katie Brennan are running together on a progressive slate for the two Assembly seats for New Jersey’s 32nd District , representing Hoboken and parts of Jersey City. They’re rejecting fossil fuel money and pushing for the kind of climate leadership this moment demands. = | = Meet the candidates: = 🌍 Ravi Bhalla is the mayor of Hoboken. Under his leadership, the city became the first in New Jersey to establish a Climate Action Department and the first to sue Big Oil for climate damages. Ravi turned climate vision into action, building green parks and stormwater systems to reduce flooding and fighting back against new gas-fired power plants in the region. He’s spent his career standing up for working families, immigrant communities, and the right to a sustainable planet. As a civil rights attorney and former city councilor, he knows how to lead with policy and principle — grounded in community, powered by justice, and focused on impact. He’s the kind of climate leader who constantly shows up, speaks out, and never backs down. Now, he’s running to bring that same fearless leadership to the State Assembly. = = 🌍 Katie Brennan is a national leader in climate resilience and housing justice, with deep experience working across government and community coalitions to build lasting, equitable infrastructure. She’s led the charge to protect frontline communities from the devastating impacts of the climate crisis, launching bold, state-level plans that deliver real relief. She’s a relentless advocate for policies like congestion pricing, stronger protections for public parks, safer housing, and cleaner transportation. Katie is also firmly opposed to all new fossil fuel projects in New Jersey. She’s more than ready to take the fight for environmental justice to the Assembly — and she’s doing it without a dime of fossil fuel or lobbyist money. = JanePAC was built for moments like this — when bold climate leaders step up to change the system, they need people like you to join them in meeting the moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, – Jane = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood corruption
body:
If we want kids to have Godly values, we have to teach them ourselves | | |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=090be3cc71984f7aa383131230ac7771&_e=qaEBQ74ORROKbl9q2iSjItrYPf8txhfbYHA9nxgH-Vab9fpeeNHQxvBOYgVrlnNEGqUrF6Q-T2YcpvTRal8g-iR3K_tkVNhNBGsIJkiCfijoQk1zO-a6w16DEtQpuzduCPru6PEX9tGPqNpd_xPMCBM0zQHZXJXOrCTv_Sy7hLbs_7QG_scgdKeZSy2ekFkE1uGcJYBLMj1uVqRBY8kvrBc2p-w3V8_1E7xtB80Js5ec1ikiw32nxtqa7bt2frQjg3s7EGzz0EbR4F6BJUJ_9zAr4fSY3jhUZp1Xm9_rVmU-ILngOQqU7ESE_2nVX821lKuwt_2c7tbJ7Zd7vaIMuUIfp33U7XYP7-rtiwVgUnCL6L84sRmmVUiOu9UeU0P2ppSH2H72yEgp9Ah9uizKvw%3D%3D)

name: David Hogg
subject: They're pissed at me, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter, I’m always direct in my
emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help us win.

So I’ll get right to the point — it is a hell of a lot harder to slow,
derail, and stop Trump from crashing the economy, disappearing people, and
leading our country into ruin with a weak Democratic Party.

With a 26% approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the
midterms were held today, we would lose.

And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are
pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We
Deserve would consider primarying complacent, ineffective congressmen who
are asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our
political history.

In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat,
it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That
is a culture we have to break.

I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly
better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective
Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the
future they believe in.

The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party
that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the
American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To
do that requires serious change, though.

Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are
stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at
the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable.

We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. That’s
why Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next
generation by:

1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might
seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide
their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans
overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a
liability for us all.
2. Supporting young, bold Democrats running in tight red-to-blue races.
Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts have our
full support in flipping Republican seats and increasing Democratic
majorities at the State and National level.

When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the
occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will
demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party
gets stronger, and the American people win.

This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number
pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the
amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think
about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two
important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash.

But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it
together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret
billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a
lottery ticket.

This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to
each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they
have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and
the plan will work.

I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate.
That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a
truly progressive way. Here’s how:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider
investing more for those who can’t. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250602_1_pissed?refcode=em20250602-2211&amount=1000&refcode2=2211_587540_1NTmfn&akid=2211%2E587540%2E1NTmfn ]Click to donate $1,000, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250602_1_pissed?refcode=em20250602-2211&amount=500&refcode2=2211_587540_1NTmfn&akid=2211%2E587540%2E1NTmfn ]$500
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250602_1_pissed?refcode=em20250602-2211&amount=100&refcode2=2211_587540_1NTmfn&akid=2211%2E587540%2E1NTmfn ]or $100 or as much as you can.

⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re
all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each
month, this plan will still work. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250602_1_pissed?refcode=em20250602-2211&amount=25&refcode2=2211_587540_1NTmfn&akid=2211%2E587540%2E1NTmfn ]Click to donate $25 — [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250602_1_pissed?refcode=em20250602-2211&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2211_587540_1NTmfn&akid=2211%2E587540%2E1NTmfn ]or $5 each
month.

⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We
each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the
free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends
about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as
important in this fight.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really
believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction
on fundraising for the plan.

Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a
lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as
dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me
fighting every day. So thank you.

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

[PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE]
clean_body: Peter, I’m always direct in my emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help us win. So I’ll get right to the point — it is a hell of a lot harder to slow, derail, and stop Trump from crashing the economy, disappearing people, and leading our country into ruin with a weak Democratic Party. With a 26% approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the midterms were held today, we would lose. And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We Deserve would consider primarying complacent, ineffective congressmen who are asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our political history. In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat, it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture we have to break. I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the future they believe in. The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To do that requires serious change, though. Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable. We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. That’s why Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next generation by: 1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a liability for us all. 2. Supporting young, bold Democrats running in tight red-to-blue races. Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts have our full support in flipping Republican seats and increasing Democratic majorities at the State and National level. When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party gets stronger, and the American people win. This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash. But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a lottery ticket. This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and the plan will work. I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate. That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a truly progressive way. Here’s how: ⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider investing more for those who can’t. [ ]Click to donate $1,000, [ ]$500 [ ]or $100 or as much as you can. ⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each month, this plan will still work. [ ]Click to donate $25 — [ ]or $5 each month. ⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as important in this fight. We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction on fundraising for the plan. Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me fighting every day. So thank you. David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: We did it! | = Hey Peter, my team just gave me the best update and I wanted to personally reach out so you could hear it from me: We surpassed our May end-of-month fundraising goal! Thank you to every person who stepped up and made a donation to power this campaign forward in May. I truly hope you know how much your support means to me, Peter. But now we can’t let our momentum stall. Our Democracy can’t afford another 2 years of a MAGA trifecta. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie Torres | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bfd11fc57724f2b8ecbdb8c83b70c73&_e=vO1O000coKYSN6uc76BSqLxuxovFfizL5fwzoc2zJBFn4iC3hzLUjinhuaVrFzl4ZPjhMrcyUF5YaOh44P7Z5CErTBgA3jAdBvzOQyEQA9ith6TcZImFEH1zbjY6krByt-xajMVuoFHmfI2icwwSl_-yqZ9e2bBSiIOUXmVkzFWPdm3Jo40VaYYk-nVAI__Ef9YjZcoEVacM64qTd-kC27_1h2PryfXbpz0LLZA1d-Dx16DWMTS78Aue_h_NxXTVFb4H20WIdXeVODhulOpSCA3pplYE63JkTTNsaTAq-HDxnuCf3J9QloUSvYGqhAGtoac8nKVhxluicy_x4-8mNpMoy3jhjmTBgn6N5IIjPCYBsYOUhqdFhxQCQL1WqboHtmYaTKlYNXmaejPSDeNcoQ%3D%3D)

Peter, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop.

My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

**I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.**

That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors.

**I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders.

Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure.**

[**But I can’t do it without your support.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bfd11fc57724f2b8ecbdb8c83b70c73&_e=vO1O000coKYSN6uc76BSqLxuxovFfizL5fwzoc2zJBFn4iC3hzLUjinhuaVrFzl4ZPjhMrcyUF5YaOh44P7Z5CErTBgA3jAdBvzOQyEQA9ith6TcZImFEH1zbjY6krByt-xajMVuoFHmfI2icwwSl_-yqZ9e2bBSiIOUXmVkzFWPdm3Jo40VaYYk-nVAI__Ef9YjZcoEVacM64qTd-kC27_1h2PryfXbpz0LLZA1d-Dx16DWMTS78Aue_h_NxXTVQjQSA-51DPs0V1u9Ua4h71NBBQ6-qQlXIVK7IYaIf8cqlnxmM68_AK6fwh4SV3xXz_XUrG7FPYkbkdDx6uZbbwa60WGpCEy-a9GXTAaUKoAXmPadcuhYIBwnUD4v-P2V8jl5TSAKlEGg-WYQqbJHpg%3D%3D)

When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when __**"Cop City"**__ protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center.

He must be defeated.

[**Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will help me bring determination, resolve, and support for our law enforcement officers to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bfd11fc57724f2b8ecbdb8c83b70c73&_e=vO1O000coKYSN6uc76BSqLxuxovFfizL5fwzoc2zJBFn4iC3hzLUjinhuaVrFzl4ZPjhMrcyUF5YaOh44P7Z5CErTBgA3jAdBvzOQyEQA9ith6TcZImFEH1zbjY6krByt-xajMVuoFHmfI2icwwSl_-yqZ9e2bBSiIOUXmVkzFWPdm3Jo40VaYYk-nVAI__Ef9YjZcoEVacM64qTd-kC27_1h2PryfXbpz0LLZA1d-Dx16DWMTS78Aue_h_NxXTVPXqAq9xpxJZnJa57HuchYuH_U8c8FBR_3nDuIbbSNXgMFmDDyjeyrYRmm7BS75nQw-zwoxOGhYtzO0ZzxIUTp_spM7APhpGzkuBbl2-yknk79z4shPGBo11S2-n480gHNctpVSdJuwn-PQ-NvQT79A%3D%3D)

clean_body: During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. | Peter, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop. My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors. I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders. Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure. When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when "Cop City" protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center. He must be defeated. I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) - STAND WITH OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS - | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Urgent Trump Tank Parade Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Tanks are Rolling into DC – Help Us Drown Out Trump's Parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1011&refcode=email-20250602_v&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Right now, dozens of tanks and other military hardware are being loaded
onto trains, heading straight from Texas to D.C. as Trump prepares his
authoritarian-style birthday tank parade on June 14.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250602&t=1061&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Headline: Tanks, trucks, howitzers from Texas are headedto DC for
Trump's military parade

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250602&t=1062&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Image of tanks being transported to DC

It's completely outrageous – not to mention a massive waste of resources.
And Our Revolution is NOT going to let Trump get away with it – which is
why we're organizing MASSIVE "No Kings Day" protests in D.C. and across
the country to counter Trump's dangerous spectacle with a powerful show of
grassroots resistance.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250602nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]It's going to be huge, but pulling this off requires your help RIGHT NOW.
Can you donate today to help us fund signs, sound systems, permits, and
more, so we can drown out Trump's tank birthday celebration with a message
loud and clear: America has no king?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump's parade isn't just expensive political theater – it's a tired
playbook used by regimes that rely on military displays to prop up their
leaders' egos rather than serve their people.

We know the costs of this kind of reckless display. Experts estimate
Trump's military parade could cost taxpayers up to $45 million – money
that could support veterans, fund healthcare, or help struggling families.
Instead, the Army’s parachute team will descend onto the streets and
personally deliver an American flag birthday gift to Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250602&t=1060&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Headline: Paratroopers set to give Trump Birthday gift during army
parade

That's why we're naming our protest "No Kings Day" – a defiant reminder to
Trump and his enablers that democracy is built not on tanks and displays
of power, but on principle, accountability, and the voices of everyday
Americans standing up together.

Our Revolution is working around the clock to mobilize the public, train
volunteers, and ensure that the big story on June 14 is the MASSIVE
nationwide resistance...not Trump's birthday parade. But we're against the
clock, and resources are limited – every single dollar counts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250602nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]This is an all-hands-on-deck moment to defend our democracy from the
dangerous symbolism Trump plans to showcase to the world. Right now, as
Trump's tanks make their way to DC, can you chip in to help us drown them
out?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1007&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu ]GIVE ONCE

http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8641%2E5885482%2Eu2F-Iu

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
Hi Peter, Let me walk you through the Republican playbook:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108854785/549225738/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-06-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODk5MmQ5Ni1mMzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lAUHAVqZE11HDolsOXOrvZAh3_QIzZW0lqIfuyZMDw=)
---
| Hi Peter,

Let me walk you through the Republican playbook:

**✅ **Tax cuts for billionaires

**❌ **Health care for working families

Yep, seriously. House Republicans introduced a bill that slashes hundreds of billions from Medicaid, ripping health coverage away from millions of people.

If this sounds cruel, it’s because it is.

Working families are already stretched thin—paying more for food, gas, rent, and medicine. Meanwhile, GOP lawmakers are handing out more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations.

[_**I’m fighting back, but I need you in this fight with me. subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2051dpqens0916h7ij7bxwmxigs93tlg97hyke9bzwj93w36v1oki32oas5ksnbds6uotjme0pntxv4ugxe&__stmp=sx8y30&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jeienr0ikddmdy3fetv38p61klx6ha1n73zbsjdtfbh8h1y1cs8urbecikarrrazkwl1b0xr1zzd4obvyiy4t198hbbu0m34c50fwtl0cct9o7r2yzy8b6brrv8zn1zr7j8rg9f0s3kemditqsph&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jeienr0ikddmdy3fetv38p628yzz3rl5l0h5645502t3bonlszhay9993te4i13bgu1pbw1m4nu2ssrqs1c03zulwyusj8q4yhhaqllz36udz549awbho6nb4suwdh6lw6jeycs0n5atesleo4fo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx8y30&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108855677/549229114/-581098138?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_BigBeautifulBill_250602_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRhNTQyYi1mNTNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBj0wZm6y2XqWqOlJhqSdEaLq544vHjYixTbZiIZCQU=) Derek,

Donald Trump just jammed his “Big, Beautiful Bill” through the House – legislation that would rip health care from MILLIONS of Americans in order to fund big tax giveaways for the wealthiest Americans.

That came on the heels of the news that he’ll be throwing himself a birthday military parade. That’s right, Derek. Trump is bringing 28 tanks, over 6,000 soldiers, 50 helicopters, 34 horses, two mules, and even a dog to Washington to celebrate... **oh, and he’s using your taxpayer money to fund it. As much as $45 million, to be exact.**

So let’s get this straight: Trump is throwing himself a million dollar vanity parade, on the taxpayers’ dime, while simultaneously pushing a bill through Congress that backs the largest cuts to Medicaid in history, strips away food assistance for low income families, and could shutter rural hospitals across the country.

Unfortunately even amidst this corruption, my Republican colleagues continue to stay silent.

clean_body: | | | = Derek, Donald Trump just jammed his “Big, Beautiful Bill” through the House – legislation that would rip health care from MILLIONS of Americans in order to fund big tax giveaways for the wealthiest Americans. That came on the heels of the news that he’ll be throwing himself a birthday military parade. That’s right, Derek. Trump is bringing 28 tanks, over 6,000 soldiers, 50 helicopters, 34 horses, two mules, and even a dog to Washington to celebrate... oh, and he’s using your taxpayer money to fund it. As much as $45 million, to be exact. So let’s get this straight: Trump is throwing himself a million dollar vanity parade, on the taxpayers’ dime, while simultaneously pushing a bill through Congress that backs the largest cuts to Medicaid in history, strips away food assistance for low income families, and could shutter rural hospitals across the country. Unfortunately even amidst this corruption, my Republican colleagues continue to stay silent. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: MAGA wants to rename Metro “Trump Train”

body:
| | | Rep. Greg Steube just filed a bill to defund Washington, DC’s Metro unless it renames itself “Trump Train,” and changes its agency name WMATA to WMAGA.
This comes after Rep. Addison McDowell filed a bill to rename Virginia’s Dulles Airport to Donald J. Trump International Airport.
MAGA Republicans aren’t just attacking Northern Virginia’s commutes and landmarks - they’re taking direct aim at our economy by illegally firing thousands of federal workers.
**But we can fight back,_right here in Northern Virginia_ , by winning this November’s Virginia House of Delegates elections.**
Democrats control the House of Delegates by just ONE seat - 51 - 49 - and Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is running in a red-to-blue “DLCC Spotlight” district that Donald Trump lost.

name: EMILYs List
subject: Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud.
body:
She admitted what we’ve known all along: GOP cuts come with a body count. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108855752/549229338/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE602_20250602_ErnstTownHall_PL&sourceid=1056310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDMwNTc5OC1mNDNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FTXCyzoDa28xu6ldEpXecBt6YHgnAcLdjDh-tnRse9M=) Last week, GOP Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall.

When a concerned constituent pointed out that people would die as a result of Republicans' devastating proposed cuts to Medicaid, Ernst's response wasn't concern. It wasn't urgency. It wasn't compassion. It was a shrug, a smirk — and six chilling words:

**"We all are going to die."**

This is the Republican agenda in action: Prioritize billionaire tax breaks above all. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost.

At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. It's still early in the cycle, but comments like this are a clear signal to us: It's time to take a closer look at states like Iowa and races like Joni Ernst's (who happens to be up for election in 2026!). We've seen this kind of cruel nonchalance from Republicans since the day Trump arrived at the White House. Comments like Ernst's don't just expose how dangerous the Republican agenda is — they also create real political vulnerability. The public outrage in response to Ernst's remarks has proven one thing: Voters across the political spectrum are paying attention, and they're furious.

If Republicans are willing to be this brazenly dismissive and careless to their own voters just to stay in Donald Trump's good graces, it won't be long until the ripple effect reaches the ballot box. **In fact, they may be more beatable than anyone thought.**

clean_body: She admitted what we’ve known all along: GOP cuts come with a body count. | = Last week, GOP Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall. When a concerned constituent pointed out that people would die as a result of Republicans' devastating proposed cuts to Medicaid, Ernst's response wasn't concern. It wasn't urgency. It wasn't compassion. It was a shrug, a smirk — and six chilling words: "We all are going to die." This is the Republican agenda in action: Prioritize billionaire tax breaks above all. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost. At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. It's still early in the cycle, but comments like this are a clear signal to us: It's time to take a closer look at states like Iowa and races like Joni Ernst's (who happens to be up for election in 2026!). We've seen this kind of cruel nonchalance from Republicans since the day Trump arrived at the White House. Comments like Ernst's don't just expose how dangerous the Republican agenda is — they also create real political vulnerability. The public outrage in response to Ernst's remarks has proven one thing: Voters across the political spectrum are paying attention, and they're furious. If Republicans are willing to be this brazenly dismissive and careless to their own voters just to stay in Donald Trump's good graces, it won't be long until the ripple effect reaches the ballot box. In fact, they may be more beatable than anyone thought. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're not exaggerating when we say: Republican policies have a body count. And if we let these candidates go unchallenged, it will only get worse. Thanks for stepping up, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Team, LGBTQ+ Americans have contributed so much to our nation, and Pride Month is a time to honor and celebrate those contributions. **It’s also a time to recognize the painful history of discrimination that LGBTQ+ people have faced – and acknowledge that the fight for equality is far from over.** Since Trump took office, he and his far-right administration have been gutting protections for LGBTQ+ Americans. **And we need to stand up against his dangerous attacks.** As a member of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I’m dedicated to defending LGBTQ+ rights. I was an original cosponsor of the Equality Act – a bill that would expand protections for discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity. **But I can’t fight the fight alone, team. We all need to stand together to ensure hard-won LGBTQ+ rights remain safe from Trump’s attacks.** Every contribution helps us fight back against Trump's administration and uphold our democracy. [**Will you chip in $5 right now so I have the resources needed to continue fighting back against discrimination in the Senate? Every dollar makes a difference, so please give today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108855983/549230037/-499364019?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_PrideMonth_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NWJhYy1mNjNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Xh3Gxtdn4v3d5czTbeFpmZcrS9a--glXEUlKT6LNnc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[CHIP IN $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108855984/549230038/-499364019?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_PrideMonth_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NWJhYy1mNjNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Xh3Gxtdn4v3d5czTbeFpmZcrS9a--glXEUlKT6LNnc=)****

### **THE BLUE LETTER**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5350142b-78fb-4bda-861b-115945ce8e4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### **ICE Is Knocking on Democracy 's Door--And Democrats Are Still Tiptoeing Around...ENOUGH!**

Seriously what the hell is going on in this country when armed federal agents storm a sitting Congressman's office and cuff a staff member for daring to provide refuge to peaceful protestors?? That's not law enforcement--because as is contained in that phrase--that would require enforcing "law." No, this is straight up authoritarianism.
Yes, Rep. Jerry Nadler's aide was dragged out of his office like an he was a convicted criminal--ya know, like...Donald Trump! Why? For letting immigration advocates escape harassment from the jack-booted thugs the NRA once saw everywhere, only to go Trump-years-legally blind. Yep, ICE agents showed up unannounced, uninvited and quite literally un-warranted. You've seen these ICE guys, so confident they're following the letter of the law they wear face coverings like they're extras in a shitty 3rd sequel to "Young Guns."
So, **these roid-raged galoots barged into the Congressional office of an elected Congressman without a warrant and claiming they were "checking for rioters." **Line 1, please hold, we have Horseshit on Line 2! And as bad as this was, it wasn't a one-off, folks.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ef7f0d9b-3086-4504-8744-e7b5feaa0f18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's part of an increasingly disturbing pattern. The Trump regime's DHS, which habeas corpus Kristi runs with the coolheaded demeanor of Sonny Corleone and compassion of late-stage Walter White, has gone from enforcing immigration law to muscling elected officials like they're a reenacting scenes from "Ozark." Anyone check Kristi's knuckles for butterfly tattoos that may resemble MS-13?
In Newark, Mayor Ras Baraka was arrested while peacefully protesting an ICE facility--**on public property**. Congresswoman LaMonica McIver was slapped with bogus assault charges for intervening in this clear abuse of power--by U.S. Attorney for the District of New Jersey, Alina Habba. Yes, that's the same Alina Habba you think it is, onetime unemployed poltroon and Mar-a-Lago mascot who now plays make-believe lawyer.
So what's Democratic leadership doing? Issuing sternly worded statements and tweets. Look, I've pointed out many times we have a new crop of fighting Democrats, from Swalwell to Stansbury, Booker to Beshear. But leadership, that's a different story. And I've really tried to give the benefit of the doubt to House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, hoping he wouldn't turn into another Schumer. Jeffries has had some good moments, to be sure, but then he's had others where I can't figure out _what in the hell_ he's thinking. **This, sadly, is one of the latter.**
In response to this blatant act of harassment, intimidation and anti-Constitutional violation of freedom of speech, assembly and the Separation of Powers, this is what we got, from the House Democratic Leader, "we don't work for Donald Trump." Wait, WHAT? This was a real response to an out-of-control agency of little fascist Ferdinand Marcos' assaulting Democrats--Americans!--in congressional offices without a warrant? Are you fucking kidding me?
Sorry, Congressman, we're outta time for genteel badinage. If you're not up to being a wartime leader, i.e. if you can't bring yourself--_who 's right there_--to get as outraged as I am--_who 's out here_--Please Step Aside. We've wasted _way_ too much time already, and this response _is so not-worthy-of-the-crime_. Sorry, we can't afford Democratic House Leader Merrick Garland right now.
**So, off the top of my head, I 'd have gone with this:**
> Once again 34-count-felon Donald Trump--a convicted criminal--is using his criminal, Putinite Administration to attack democracy, just as he did on January 6th. Mr. Trump, listen and understand this: You will _not_ do this again. My advice? Concentrate on helping farmers you've bankrupted and 401Ks you've destroyed with your TACO Trump tariff plan. And pick up the audiobook of the Constitution. Because, the next time your thugs step foot in a congressional office to detain anyone without a warrant, I'll call the police, the FBI, Interpol, if I have to, and you'll find yourself back in a place you seem to spend your whole life: Court.
Trump doesn't get anything that doesn't have consequences. He's incapable. So where are the subpoenas, hearings, investigations? Rallies to stir up public outrage, ads on tv in key congressional districts? **Where is the fire?** **The mobilization?** Trump's goons are openly threatening to jail members of Congress, and Democratic leaders act like it's just a bad headline on a normal day in our lovely democratic republic. **What is it you need us to do so you understand this a constitutional five-alarm fire? Please take off the noise-cancelling headphones, stat.**
I also don't get how you get _this response_ from the actual Congressman whose staffer was assaulted...I've always liked Jerry Nadler. Met him a few times. But this, also, i _s not even close to meeting this terrifying moment_ :
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0022e18f-7deb-449c-84fc-4ea49ba6bb44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The incident was 'troubling" You were. "alarmed!?" Is this a "Twighlight Zone" episode? This isn't a policy disagreement, Rep. Nadler, we need you to politically react to this like [Elon Musk's son](https://substack.com/redirect/1897466e-c913-4db2-aa2d-a2fc385e513a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) did to his dad's--at-the-time--normally colored eye. We have a lawless executive using the full force of government to attack his political opponents. If you can't find the passion, anger, guts to fight back now, when is the plan to do so? After the next election? After Trump cancels the next election?
**Get angry. Get loud. And start fighting back like our freedoms depend on it --**_**because they do**_**.** Nadler, Jeffries, Schumer--whoever's listening--_your base doesn 't give two craps about decorum, they care about democracy_. Independents and disaffected Republicans feel much the same way, they wanna see strength, they want to see you engage in this fight!
**We 're looking for courage. Trump's people just handcuffed democracy's staffer. What are **_**you**_**gonna do about it?**

I'm gonna break my..I'm gonna break my rusty cage and run - Soundgarden | | | Jun 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | THE BLUE LETTER | | ---|---|--- `Independent Media For $1.32/Week!` We 're running a special! And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! ICE Is Knocking on Democracy 's Door--And Democrats Are Still Tiptoeing Around...ENOUGH! Seriously what the hell is going on in this country when armed federal agents storm a sitting Congressman's office and cuff a staff member for daring to provide refuge to peaceful protestors?? That's not law enforcement--because as is contained in that phrase--that would require enforcing "law." No, this is straight up authoritarianism. Yes, Rep. Jerry Nadler's aide was dragged out of his office like an he was a convicted criminal--ya know, like...Donald Trump! Why? For letting immigration advocates escape harassment from the jack-booted thugs the NRA once saw everywhere, only to go Trump-years-legally blind. Yep, ICE agents showed up unannounced, uninvited and quite literally un-warranted. You've seen these ICE guys, so confident they're following the letter of the law they wear face coverings like they're extras in a shitty 3rd sequel to "Young Guns." So, these roid-raged galoots barged into the Congressional office of an elected Congressman without a warrant and claiming they were "checking for rioters." Line 1, please hold, we have Horseshit on Line 2! And as bad as this was, it wasn't a one-off, folks. It's part of an increasingly disturbing pattern. The Trump regime's DHS, which habeas corpus Kristi runs with the coolheaded demeanor of Sonny Corleone and compassion of late-stage Walter White, has gone from enforcing immigration law to muscling elected officials like they're a reenacting scenes from "Ozark." Anyone check Kristi's knuckles for butterfly tattoos that may resemble MS-13? In Newark, Mayor Ras Baraka was arrested while peacefully protesting an ICE facility--on public property. Congresswoman LaMonica McIver was slapped with bogus assault charges for intervening in this clear abuse of power--by U.S. Attorney for the District of New Jersey, Alina Habba. Yes, that's the same Alina Habba you think it is, onetime unemployed poltroon and Mar-a-Lago mascot who now plays make-believe lawyer. So what's Democratic leadership doing? Issuing sternly worded statements and tweets. Look, I've pointed out many times we have a new crop of fighting Democrats, from Swalwell to Stansbury, Booker to Beshear. But leadership, that's a different story. And I've really tried to give the benefit of the doubt to House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, hoping he wouldn't turn into another Schumer. Jeffries has had some good moments, to be sure, but then he's had others where I can't figure out what in the hell he's thinking. This, sadly, is one of the latter. In response to this blatant act of harassment, intimidation and anti-Constitutional violation of freedom of speech, assembly and the Separation of Powers, this is what we got, from the House Democratic Leader, "we don't work for Donald Trump." Wait, WHAT? This was a real response to an out-of-control agency of little fascist Ferdinand Marcos' assaulting Democrats--Americans!--in congressional offices without a warrant? Are you fucking kidding me? Sorry, Congressman, we're outta time for genteel badinage. If you're not up to being a wartime leader, i.e. if you can't bring yourself--who 's right there--to get as outraged as I am--who 's out here--Please Step Aside. We've wasted way too much time already, and this response is so not-worthy-of-the-crime. Sorry, we can't afford Democratic House Leader Merrick Garland right now. So, off the top of my head, I 'd have gone with this: Once again 34-count-felon Donald Trump--a convicted criminal--is using his criminal, Putinite Administration to attack democracy, just as he did on January 6th. Mr. Trump, listen and understand this: You will not do this again. My advice? Concentrate on helping farmers you've bankrupted and 401Ks you've destroyed with your TACO Trump tariff plan. And pick up the audiobook of the Constitution. Because, the next time your thugs step foot in a congressional office to detain anyone without a warrant, I'll call the police, the FBI, Interpol, if I have to, and you'll find yourself back in a place you seem to spend your whole life: Court. Trump doesn't get anything that doesn't have consequences. He's incapable. So where are the subpoenas, hearings, investigations? Rallies to stir up public outrage, ads on tv in key congressional districts? Where is the fire? The mobilization? Trump's goons are openly threatening to jail members of Congress, and Democratic leaders act like it's just a bad headline on a normal day in our lovely democratic republic. What is it you need us to do so you understand this a constitutional five-alarm fire? Please take off the noise-cancelling headphones, stat. I also don't get how you get this response from the actual Congressman whose staffer was assaulted...I've always liked Jerry Nadler. Met him a few times. But this, also, i s not even close to meeting this terrifying moment : | | ---|---|--- The incident was 'troubling" You were. "alarmed!?" Is this a "Twighlight Zone" episode? This isn't a policy disagreement, Rep. Nadler, we need you to politically react to this like did to his dad's--at-the-time--normally colored eye. We have a lawless executive using the full force of government to attack his political opponents. If you can't find the passion, anger, guts to fight back now, when is the plan to do so? After the next election? After Trump cancels the next election? Get angry. Get loud. And start fighting back like our freedoms depend on it --because they do. Nadler, Jeffries, Schumer--whoever's listening--your base doesn 't give two craps about decorum, they care about democracy. Independents and disaffected Republicans feel much the same way, they wanna see strength, they want to see you engage in this fight! We 're looking for courage. **We have to act fast:**[**Chip in $5 to keep Democratic momentum going and flip seats like Ohio's and Florida's BLUE!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250602-SpecialElectionAlert-FTNSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250602-SpecialElectionAlert-FTNSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&akid=20406%2E9716520%2Ej0Hqj7)
**FIRST:** Democrats _FLIPPED_ a pair of _deep red_ districts in Iowa and Pennsylvania -- **winning seats that had just backed Trump by more than _15 points_.**

**THEN:** We _CRUSHED_ Trump's candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court by **over 10 points.**

**NOW:** Trump's approval rating is _TANKING_ in Ohio and Florida -- giving Democrats an opening to flip TWO U.S. Senate seats _years_ before they were supposed to be on the ballot!

[**Momentum is on our side, team: Rush $5 IMMEDIATELY to help us win crucial races like these and take back the Senate >> **](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250602-SpecialElectionAlert-FTNSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250602-SpecialElectionAlert-FTNSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&akid=20406%2E9716520%2Ej0Hqj7)

We’re packing City Hall tomorrow at 1pm | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108856643/549232354/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250602_rsvp_shh2_team_oc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MzI4NzU1LWY5M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wSPJfHBNALN4cWFNyol5CLlfJm6fsCQewTVA0cewvRk=)

Tomorrow is the big day, Peter. The cost of living has been soaring astronomically high. The rich get richer and the rest of us struggle to get by having to stretch our paychecks thinner and thinner. The Safe and Healthy Housing Act in Philly City Council is our big opportunity to do something about it. This is not just about Philly and not just for Pennsylvanians. Americans are tired of feckless legislators playing defense and pointing at who’s the worst. We want action towards a proactive vision to make our lives better. **When we win this, renters everywhere will know that good change can happen — when we fight for what’s right.** Tomorrow is going to be a turning point for housing justice and renters rights. We need you with us to make sure City Council hears us loud and clear over the slumlords and mega-corporate landlords. | [Join us in person TOMORROW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108856644/549232355/-1456004516?utm_source=EM_FL_OPA_20250602_rsvp_shh2_team_oc_act_xx_sbt1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MzI4NzU1LWY5M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wSPJfHBNALN4cWFNyol5CLlfJm6fsCQewTVA0cewvRk=&emci=de0942fb-d33f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=66328755-f93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1206669)

clean_body: We’re packing City Hall tomorrow at 1pm | = Tomorrow is the big day, Peter. The cost of living has been soaring astronomically high. The rich get richer and the rest of us struggle to get by having to stretch our paychecks thinner and thinner. The Safe and Healthy Housing Act in Philly City Council is our big opportunity to do something about it. This is not just about Philly and not just for Pennsylvanians. Americans are tired of feckless legislators playing defense and pointing at who’s the worst. We want action towards a proactive vision to make our lives better. When we win this, renters everywhere will know that good change can happen — when we fight for what’s right. Tomorrow is going to be a turning point for housing justice and renters rights. We need you with us to make sure City Council hears us loud and clear over the slumlords and mega-corporate landlords. | Let’s do this together, One PA P.S. Our organizing is powered by grassroots donations from supporters like you. At a time when government and foundation funding is all but halted, your donations keep us afloat. = | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system. | = = * = | | Paid for by One Pennsylvania One PA P.O. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/rkroMkhXlJMtLB9wncZu-ImaV9Ygp3MAY3ybOcw6fj1eDtFTkde9Tns-7o0Sf3tEzk5pkv4Ex6GzST_fYGSLyyjnpmPbuclkNK3czmIaD923WALTcMfav4j0Jsps6NhT1HIffFSqGEggN6Gq8_34bOVxpEMBEf_pigJL5R93j__asdjqk2_eaSqL36c4AUlO9RMFFv7LCTIcPcX31AMTg4PnT8eZk5aI_JXzbBVoaq8ri6UvidSdK2cBa2DDVitoYykkc8fJw1UW6INOgoaswpsl5PSYTRPxaBYb4K_HE87pNvOu8AM2wUZcvRjvTp1gUy46QLtvpf9DDhPIjJISbVptuB-bWz0bz6NYRzJ0l8bTB40V7LhDfiHLKAW-n_18r_q9V8HC66mvG3V7uDpwNaYE46grdwq1kiTy1wY78y07JomCxNBk7_17oslRi21lkA/ZrBU4OJ_6K3e2_6Ke9qPweJokkh0tAPu/9) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/JtZKbBQWYFX5pJis_qcfsUr_q6GFQD1PD7L0h_6m3OwIp32jf0cl4oB13JSru4mAayjnT-Z1hTYTBY8UH_amJVr-7RcKS6UGptlSAuMzAQO3Osm7ME9NwkC7UMm5M5RLPMt_igD3O7mg6oGpPkHLsr8IDeRYhhHbhg5BRS8GVxZNwmnev_DBKl2bNi8_79Yy7_rRzusSFmIEROQAil0Q-ABCKf3gzL9RlUAsxaiJCBHnqKIb3qreSGUcX5IhybdYtabWATBzaukyWJ8blsrsJ5OOrkatDqscR7wumU7crlrQLHZJPulrxxJB3OHW48RaDd-hhMHiYNS40OAP1bxjJ74qx7RfxJFLeoqztauwkgvlgDXePZPVgrO2xOFF_wxhgOgxLTK-7cJPeZpVu57xMkhMyrfpM95Cqmkva7vEwV1MQhU5N-8d5KAvomev6mx_hQ/zUYmPlfD5zx-7vtXAmT9L7JoMCDP9InW/9) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/XItzZ1hpKqtij99VVkv_B4MGxqd3HhRVezW_s4yRrcGioLp3u1KzLCm46UN705Tjw6zV8S9Vu3eFiRIiA_U_nwmnXo9Z3o-vBh_Tk9nrJGHZT8xApWTIGhcyA_Ct14FHweCJUnrV8wbrDBmMcb2WpsZztXyGYBw50uESV6qvgzisBocFUdvSBbxf3ZX0JQ45h_DXTvBfHZMVeokOe2z1HGshhQYgZsP-IS8EqrFFDglCQ3c3t2W3ua7_fOIf9iwpqUfJBqtxWP3anJzcKVupLNUFCB2m0Cg138D0nggbQiOxMkn6QQP5pwRMez9dxldgUzeeR3Q-tC_0RurMigpfxBzEamhPtdbcsJMYfvpATMokkVwNFMrs40olwao6IdkwgASjXRjB145WmQj4qgjPWBNfyB6z92b9ASsOmS5-kkNcY9jUeao1MCXBdhNI-tN8Jg/Z03FzNNlsMNanmpA8jI52M9gvr-_2G2h/9)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

subject: We were so close to our goal!

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Your support means everything to this fight.
Thanks to you, we were so close to our May fundraising goal and are kicking off summer at full speed. But make no mistake—this fight is far from over.
The Republicans’ cruel budget cuts are just the beginning.
MAGA extremists are rigging the economy to favor the wealthy, gutting your hard-earned benefits, making it easier for corporations to exploit workers and families, and blocking the path for our kids to reach the American Dream.
We can’t afford to let up—not for a single moment.
At Team Maxine, we’re building a movement powered by people like you.
Thank you again for your support. We couldn’t do this without you! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250602_EOMthankyou_act]
Onwards,
Team Maxine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250602_EOMthankyou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250602_EOMthankyou_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

name: Kotek Survey Team
subject: The voice of the people is powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#

Peter — Despite the chaos at the national level, Tina is committed to delivering on her promises and securing a better future for every Oregonian. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857187/549234402/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.06.02_ThankYou_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzNmOTU2Ny1mYzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIw0i9ZtXtUY6M9RETPDzbHIA2VoBnuKSijILeUKKtA=&emci=f53e9567-fc3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=033f9567-fc3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | Peter– It’s easy to get overwhelmed with the seemingly endless, constant barrage of headlines from the other Washington, but **I want to stop for a second and say thank you** for all of the hard work you’ve put in – despite all the chaos. Because of the generosity of supporters like you last week, we hit our fundraising goal! I’m feeling so grateful for everyone on our grassroots team for all that you’ve done to support our campaign. Whether it’s continuing to stand up to GOP attacks on our values and critical programs like Medicaid, or sending support to Joanna Mendoza in AZ-06, we still have a lot of work ahead of us. But with you on our team, I’m confident that we can overcome any hurdle in our path. Also, I want to wish you a happy Pride Season! In a time when LGBTQ+ people, especially queer and trans kids, are under attack from cynical Republican politicians in dozens of states and in Congress, it’s never been more important for our community to band together and continue fighting back. Stay tuned for more updates from the team, but in the meantime: Once again, thank you from the bottom of my heart! We are truly in this together, and for that, I am deeply honored and eternally grateful. – Emily [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857188/549234403/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.06.02_ThankYou_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzNmOTU2Ny1mYzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIw0i9ZtXtUY6M9RETPDzbHIA2VoBnuKSijILeUKKtA=)

Elon's last day as a special government employee was on Friday, he and President Trump held an epic press conference in the Oval Office. Meanwhile in California, Cory Booker was giving his Democratic constituents the fellow Nazi salute. There is no getting around it, Spartacus, the record holder for the longest speech on the Senate floor is a Nazi. Secretary of Treasury, Scott Bessent was back on Face The Nation to humiliate Margaret Brennan on the economy and tariffs, once again. Today, my guest is Christina Bobb, she was the attorney for President Trump present at Mar-a-Lago the day the FBI decided to raid. After months of President Trump and his team cooperating with Biden's DOJ and government officials, the FBI raided Mar-a-Lago on August 8, 2022. In this exclusive interview, Christina gives us details about the experience. The FBI actually prevented Christina from observing what they were doing and tried to incriminate her personally when it came to the documents in question. Jack Smith and his outrageous lawfare was an extreme abuse of government power. Christina advocates for the current Trump administration to shut down government weaponization as next time these people come into power, there is no telling what they will do.
Featuring:
**Christina Bobb**
U.S. Attorney | Judicial Watch
https://x.com/christina_bobb
Christina's new book:
Defiant: Inside the Mar-a-Lago Raid and the Left's Ongoing Lawfare
"A gripping first-hand expose of the coordinated legal and political attacks against Donald Trump and his allies, revealing the deep-state efforts to undermine democracy."

name: Andy Beshear
subject: We’re in this together — and the next month is key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

As we close out May, I just want to take a minute to say **thank you.**

Whether you made a donation or simply took the time to open up and read one of our emails, your support has shown what we can do when we come together — _and I’m truly grateful._

But with the second fiscal quarter of 2025 coming to a close, June is going to be a big month, and we’ve got to keep up the momentum. Look, I'll be the first to admit that this work isn’t always easy, **but it’s always been worth it.**

[**And the truth is, how we kick off this month will help set the tone for everything that comes next. Can I count on you to chip in anything you can to help us head into June strong? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857433/549235386/739826862?refcode=em25_250602_eomty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250602_eomty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=93646ff7-fc3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM2NDZmZjctZmMzZi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l6_-mHUxMBjKS9tueTrT7a3kMmQUBhzUAAMH2kmvpQE=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857434/549235387/739826862?refcode=em25_250602_eomty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250602_eomty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=93646ff7-fc3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM2NDZmZjctZmMzZi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l6_-mHUxMBjKS9tueTrT7a3kMmQUBhzUAAMH2kmvpQE=) We’ve got a lot of work to do, but I know we can get it done — together.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Houston
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Thursday night in Houston, folks packed the room for our town hall:

I met John, who told me at age 15, he doctored his birth certificate to
pass for 17, his mom signed his enlistment papers and he was off to Korea.
He told me that he wants to make sure we protect the Constitution he swore
an oath to, that he was willing to give his life for. Pretty damn
inspiring.

I met Benjamin, who drove in from Wharton. He drives a truck for a living,
keeps a vegetable garden at home (he told me when I asked how do you stay
in such good shape driving a truck) and wants Democrats to listen to
people and fight for them.

I met Steve-o who screwed up when he was in high school, got 6 months in
state prison, worked his way back up and out, from fast food jobs to
bartending to working for a property management company. This was his
first town hall or political event he had been to. He sang us some Woody
Guthrie: “This land was made for you and me.” And he asked, what can I do
to help?

I met an amazing woman who told us at 72 she’s the sole caretaker for her
husband who’s 77 and has Parkinson’s. Her best hope is that she outlives
him because, what’s gonna happen if she passes first? And now Trump is
cutting research dollars to help people with terminal conditions out of
spite and vengeance. And with tears in her eyes she says she’s gonna fight
back with all she’s got.

I met so many amazing, beautiful, and fierce people. These town halls
bring us together, allow us to share stories with one another, and
encourage us to take action to make things better.

I don’t take a salary from Powered by People. But putting gas in the car,
renting spaces to meet, giving our teams the tools they need to connect
with voters—all of that costs money.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250602.xc-QNW&refcode=ema20250602-240133&t=1001&akid=240133%2E444211%2EpGN5N1 ]If you’re able, I’m asking you to chip in $3 right now to
help keep me on the road. This is how we win—not with big checks, but with
thousands of people doing what they can, when it matters most.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250602.xc-QNW&refcode=ema20250602-240133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=240133%2E444211%2EpGN5N1 ]DONATE $3

We’ve got a tough road ahead. I’m proud to be in this fight with you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=240133%2E444211%2EpGN5N1

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: A free eBook for you
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5935c485949a4f5ca01c33b89f138a66-d01dd4e6d5c946da8f4109036908587e/63)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

This revolutionary document laid down the foundation of American political thought, far before our Founding Fathers won the Revolutionary War and wrote the Constitution.
---
|
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5935c485949a4f5ca01c33b89f138a66-d01dd4e6d5c946da8f4109036908587e/63)
---
| | In an era where the radical Left has attacked our individual liberty and America’s founding ideals, all Americans should have a robust understanding of this document, and the principles found within.

**That’s why our policy experts at The Heritage Foundation created[ _The Guide to the Declaration of Independence eBook_](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5935c485949a4f5ca01c33b89f138a66-d01dd4e6d5c946da8f4109036908587e/63).**

This FREE eBook breaks down this important founding document’s history, including:
* Why our Founders decided to declare independence.
* The writing process for the Declaration.
* The philosophical tradition that informed our Founding Fathers’ thinking.
* How the Declaration affected American politics.
* And much more!

This eBook is an essential tool for all American patriots who want to learn more about our nation’s founding principles.

**You can get your FREE digital copy using the secure link below.**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/guide-to-the -declaration-ebook/](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5935c485949a4f5ca01c33b89f138a66-d01dd4e6d5c946da8f4109036908587e/63)**

I hope you find it both informative and edifying.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. My family taught me how to build things - like roads and bridges - and I’ve carried that with me everywhere: from construction sites and factory floors to boardrooms. I’m running because Lindsey Graham has forgotten about the people back home. He’s leading the charge to gut Social Security and Medicaid, and now, he backs the chaotic tariffs that are raising prices and cutting paychecks across South Carolina. We need honest leadership in Washington. I’ll fight to ban members of Congress from profiting off of public service. And I pledge to serve no more than two terms as your Senator, to ensure that our state has fresh, accountable leadership in Congress. [**This is a fight we can win, but we need your support. I believe that Washington needs more builders - not dividers. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - to build an economy that works for everybody, not just the elite few.
Lindsey Graham hasn’t held a town hall in 8 years. He stopped listening, and we’re paying the price.
That’s why I’m hitting the road to listen to voters across South Carolina and make their voices heard. [**If you can, split a donation between our campaign and Ohio House Dems to help us reach voters across South Carolina and build a movement to beat the Washington establishment and fire Lindsey Graham.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857828/549236547/-1003770560?refcode=250602_Johnson_Retire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1MWVjZC1mZDNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XfUnJIzpGRuxvbK0BwD-RunCIdu7ciWLDujNvG_UvnQ=)
From building infrastructure, to working on major water and energy projects, to leading major companies - I’ve spent my entire life building things from the ground up and fixing them when they break.
I know how tough it is just to get by right now. Prices are rising. Wages aren’t moving. The gap between the haves and have nots is widening. And politicians in Washington - like Lindsey Graham - have left us behind.
That’s why I’m running for the US Senate. [**Split a donation between our campaign and Ohio House Dems today to join our fight and together, we will fire Lindsey Graham.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108857829/549236548/-1003770560?refcode=250602_Johnson_Retire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1MWVjZC1mZDNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XfUnJIzpGRuxvbK0BwD-RunCIdu7ciWLDujNvG_UvnQ=)
